en.tldr: This paper considers 2D incompressible Euler equations with a free surface under gravity and surface tension in an unbounded domain, constructing initial data that leads to at least double-exponential growth of the vorticity gradient's L∞ norm within the solution's lifespan.
en.motivation: To generalize Zlatos' result to the free-surface setting and extend Hu--Luo--Yao's work to unbounded domains, investigating small-scale vorticity creation in gravity-capillary water waves.
en.method: Consider 2D incompressible Euler equations in an unbounded domain with finite depth and a free surface, construct initial data with flat free surface and small velocity, and analyze the evolution of vorticity gradient.
en.result: Demonstrates that the L∞ norm of the vorticity gradient grows at least double-exponentially within the solution's lifespan, revealing rapid amplification mechanisms in free-surface flows with gravity and capillary effects.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for understanding vorticity gradient amplification in free-surface flows, extending existing results to more general physical settings.

idea_spark.idea: Investigate how varying surface tension coefficients affect vorticity gradient growth rates; explore whether similar growth behaviors occur in three-dimensional settings.
idea_spark.risk: Mathematical constructions may heavily rely on 2D and specific boundary condition assumptions; experimental validation poses significant challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: The coupling between free surfaces and vorticity dynamics may offer new theoretical perspectives on natural phenomena like wave breaking and microscale mixing in oceans.

papers.title: Global well-posedness and temporal decay estimates for the viscous $β$-plane equations
papers.summary: We consider the Cauchy problem of the viscous $β$-plane equations. We first establish the global well-posedness of the system for the initial data sufficiently small compared to the Rossby parameter. The smoothing effect of the flow is then proved, and it is shown that the obtained global solution satisfies the equation in the classical sense. We also reveal that under some additional assumptions, the solution decays as fast as the corresponding linear solution and asymptotically behaves like a constant multiple of the integral kernel of the linearized equation. In particular, the decay rate of the solution is faster than expected from the flow of the heat equation.

ai.tldr: 研究粘性β-平面方程的柯西问题，证明小初值下的全局适定性，并建立解的时空衰减估计。
ai.motivation: β-平面方程是描述地球物理流体旋转效应的经典模型，其粘性版本的全局适定性和长时间行为尚需严格分析。
ai.method: 通过将初值充分限制于罗斯贝参数之下，建立全局解的存在唯一性，并利用线性化方程核分析解的衰减行为。
ai.result: 证明了系统在小初值下的全局适定性，解具有光滑效应，且在附加条件下衰减速率快于热方程，渐近行为类似于线性化方程的积分核。
ai.help_to_user: 为旋转流体方程的数学理论提供了严格的适定性和衰减分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将衰减估计与线性化核的渐近行为关联，可推广至更一般的耗散系统。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于初值相对于罗斯贝参数的小性假设，可能不适用于大扰动情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法或可应用于海洋环流、大气动力学中类似旋转效应主导的数学模型。

zh.tldr: 研究粘性β-平面方程的柯西问题，证明小初值下的全局适定性，并建立解的时空衰减估计。
zh.motivation: β-平面方程是描述地球物理流体旋转效应的经典模型，其粘性版本的全局适定性和长时间行为尚需严格分析。
zh.method: 通过将初值充分限制于罗斯贝参数之下，建立全局解的存在唯一性，并利用线性化方程核分析解的衰减行为。
zh.result: 证明了系统在小初值下的全局适定性，解具有光滑效应，且在附加条件下衰减速率快于热方程，渐近行为类似于线性化方程的积分核。
zh.help_to_user: 为旋转流体方程的数学理论提供了严格的适定性和衰减分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将衰减估计与线性化核的渐近行为关联，可推广至更一般的耗散系统。
idea_spark.risk: 结论依赖于初值相对于罗斯贝参数的小性假设，可能不适用于大扰动情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法或可应用于海洋环流、大气动力学中类似旋转效应主导的数学模型。

en.tldr: Studies the Cauchy problem for viscous β-plane equations, proving global well-posedness for small initial data and establishing temporal decay estimates.
en.motivation: The β-plane equations model rotational effects in geophysical fluids; their viscous version requires rigorous analysis of global well-posedness and long-time behavior.
en.method: By restricting initial data sufficiently relative to the Rossby parameter, global existence and uniqueness are established; decay behavior is analyzed via the linearized equation kernel.
en.result: Global well-posedness is proved for small initial data; solutions exhibit smoothing effects and, under additional assumptions, decay faster than the heat flow, asymptotically resembling the linearized equation's integral kernel.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous framework for well-posedness and decay analysis of rotating fluid equations.

idea_spark.idea: Linking decay estimates to asymptotic behavior of linearized kernels could generalize to broader dissipative systems.
idea_spark.risk: Results depend on smallness of initial data relative to the Rossby parameter, possibly limiting applicability to large disturbances.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach may be adapted to similar rotation-dominated models in ocean circulation or atmospheric dynamics.

papers.title: Remask, Don't Replace: Token-to-Mask Refinement in Masked Diffusion Language Models
papers.summary: Masked diffusion language models such as LLaDA2.1 rely on Token-to-Token (T2T) editing to correct their own generation errors: whenever a different token crosses a confidence threshold, the committed token is overwritten. We identify three structural failure modes of this rule. The trigger cannot fire when no single alternative is confident enough; the replacement is computed under a context that may itself contain errors; and the uniform perturbations used to train the T2T stream do not resemble the coherent, semantically plausible mistakes that the model actually makes at inference. As an alternative, we propose Token-to-Mask (T2M) remasking. Rather than overwriting a suspect token with a new guess, T2M resets the position to the mask state, so that the next denoising step re-predicts it from an in-distribution context. The method is training-free, modifies only the editing rule, and introduces no new parameters. We pair it with three detection heuristics and give a short theoretical account of why a mask is a better conditioning signal than an erroneous token. Across 8 benchmarks, T2M improves accuracy on tasks that require exact token-level output. Its largest gain is +5.92 points on CMATH, where we attribute 79.9% of baseline errors to last-mile corruption (correct reasoning followed by a garbled final answer); T2M repairs 41.3% of these cases.

ai.tldr: 提出Token-to-Mask重掩码方法，通过将可疑token重置为掩码状态，在去噪步骤中重新预测，以修复扩散语言模型的生成错误。
ai.motivation: 现有Token-to-Token编辑规则存在三个结构性缺陷：无法在无高置信度替代时触发、在可能包含错误的上下文中计算替换、训练扰动与推理时的语义连贯错误不匹配。
ai.method: 训练免费方法，仅修改编辑规则：检测可疑token后将其重置为掩码状态，让下一步去噪过程从分布内上下文重新预测该位置。
ai.result: 在8个基准测试中提升精确token级输出任务的准确率，CMATH任务上提升5.92分，修复41.3%的基线最后阶段错误。
ai.help_to_user: 为扩散语言模型提供无需训练的错误修复机制，特别适用于需要精确输出的推理任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将错误token视为噪声，通过掩码化让模型重新生成，而非直接替换。
idea_spark.risk: 过度掩码可能破坏已正确生成的内容，需要平衡检测敏感度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成过程视为迭代优化，错误位置可回溯到更早的生成状态重新决策。

idea_spark.risk: 过度掩码可能破坏已正确生成的内容，需要平衡检测敏感度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将生成过程视为迭代优化，错误位置可回溯到更早的生成状态重新决策。

en.tldr: Proposes Token-to-Mask remasking that resets suspect tokens to mask state for re-prediction in denoising steps, repairing generation errors in masked diffusion language models.
en.motivation: Three structural failures in Token-to-Token editing: cannot fire when no single alternative is confident enough, replacement computed in potentially erroneous context, and training perturbations mismatch coherent semantic errors at inference.
en.method: Training-free method modifying only the editing rule: after detecting suspect tokens, reset them to mask state so the next denoising step re-predicts from in-distribution context.
en.result: Improves accuracy on exact token-level output tasks across 8 benchmarks, with +5.92 points on CMATH, repairing 41.3% of baseline last-mile corruption errors.
en.help_to_user: Provides training-free error repair for diffusion language models, particularly beneficial for reasoning tasks requiring precise output.

idea_spark.idea: Treat erroneous tokens as noise to be regenerated via masking rather than directly replaced.
idea_spark.risk: Over-masking may disrupt correctly generated content, requiring balanced detection sensitivity.
idea_spark.inspiration: View generation as iterative optimization where error positions can be rolled back to earlier states for re-decision.

papers.title: A new equal-area isolatitudinal grid on a spherical surface
papers.summary: A new method SREAG (spherical rectangular equal-area grid) is proposed to divide a spherical surface into equal-area cells. The method is based on dividing a sphere into latitudinal rings of near-constant width with further splitting each ring into equal-area cells. It is simple in construction and use, and provides more uniform width of the latitudinal rings than other methods of equal-area pixelization of a spherical surface. The new method provides a rectangular grid cells with the latitude- and longitude-oriented boundaries, near-square cells in the equatorial rings, and the closest to uniform width of the latitudinal rings as compared with other equal-area isolatitudinal grids. The binned data is easy to visualize and interpret in terms of the longitude-latitude rectangular coordinate system, natural for astronomy and geodesy. Grids with arbitrary number of rings and, consequently, wide and theoretically unlimited range of cell size can be built by the proposed method. Comparison with other methods used in astronomical research showed the advantages of the new approach in sense of uniformity of the ring width, a wider range of grid resolution, and simplicity of use.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种新的球面等面积等纬度网格划分方法SREAG，通过将球面划分为近似等宽的纬度环，再将每个环分割为等面积单元，实现了比现有方法更均匀的环宽和更简单的构造。
ai.motivation: 在天文学和大地测量学中，需要将球面数据划分为等面积单元进行可视化与分析，现有等面积像素化方法在纬度环宽度均匀性、网格分辨率范围和易用性上存在不足。
ai.method: 基于将球面划分为近似恒定宽度的纬度环，然后将每个环进一步分割为等面积单元。该方法支持任意数量的环，从而提供宽范围且理论上无限的单元尺寸。
ai.result: 与天文研究中其他方法相比，新方法在环宽均匀性、网格分辨率范围和易用性方面具有优势，产生具有经纬度定向边界的矩形网格单元，在赤道环中接近方形。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理球面数据的研究人员提供了一种更均匀、灵活且易于使用的网格划分工具，特别适用于天文和大地测量数据的可视化与分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂曲面划分问题分解为纬度环的均匀宽度控制与环内等面积分割两个子问题，通过近似恒定环宽简化设计。
idea_spark.risk: 在极高纬度区域，单元形状可能因投影变形而偏离矩形，可能影响某些方向敏感的分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从地图制图学的等面积投影中获得启发，但将其转化为离散网格划分，平衡几何精度与计算实用性。

idea_spark.risk: 在极高纬度区域，单元形状可能因投影变形而偏离矩形，可能影响某些方向敏感的分析。

en.tldr: Proposes a new spherical rectangular equal-area grid (SREAG) method that divides a spherical surface into equal-area cells by creating latitudinal rings of near-constant width, offering more uniform ring width and simpler construction than existing methods.
en.motivation: In astronomy and geodesy, spherical data needs to be partitioned into equal-area cells for visualization and analysis; existing equal-area pixelization methods have limitations in latitudinal ring width uniformity, grid resolution range, and ease of use.
en.method: Based on dividing the sphere into latitudinal rings of near-constant width, then splitting each ring into equal-area cells. The method supports an arbitrary number of rings, enabling a wide and theoretically unlimited range of cell sizes.
en.result: Compared to other methods used in astronomical research, the new approach shows advantages in ring width uniformity, grid resolution range, and simplicity of use, producing rectangular grid cells with latitude- and longitude-oriented boundaries and near-square cells in equatorial rings.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers handling spherical data with a more uniform, flexible, and easy-to-use gridding tool, particularly suitable for visualization and analysis of astronomical and geodetic data.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the complex surface partitioning problem into two subproblems: controlling uniform width of latitudinal rings and equal-area splitting within each ring, simplifying design through near-constant ring width.
idea_spark.risk: Cell shapes may deviate from rectangular in very high latitude regions due to projection distortion, potentially affecting direction-sensitive analyses.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by equal-area projections in cartography but transformed into discrete grid partitioning, balancing geometric accuracy with computational practicality.

papers.title: Minimizers for the Cahn-Hilliard energy functional with the Flory-Huggins potential under strong anchoring conditions
papers.summary: In this paper, we theoretically and numerically study the minimizers for the Cahn-Hilliard energy with the Flory-Huggins potential under the strong anchoring condition, i.e., the Dirichlet boundary condition. We reveal bifurcation phenomena mediated by the boundary condition, the transition layer thickness, and the temperature of the system. Numerical simulations are also presented to approximate the minimizers of this energy by solving a gradient-flow equation, namely the Allen-Cahn equation constrained with strong anchoring conditions and random initial data. The effects of varying the transition layer thickness and temperature are presented to confirm the theoretical analysis.

ai.tldr: 本文从理论和数值上研究了在强锚定边界条件下，具有Flory-Huggins势的Cahn-Hilliard能量泛函的极小元。揭示了边界条件、过渡层厚度和温度介导的分岔现象，并通过数值模拟验证了理论分析。
ai.motivation: 研究强锚定边界条件如何影响具有Flory-Huggins势的Cahn-Hilliard能量泛函的极小元结构，理解边界条件、材料参数和温度诱导的分岔行为。
ai.method: 理论分析能量泛函的极小元特性；数值上通过求解带强锚定条件和随机初始数据的约束Allen-Cahn方程（梯度流方程）来逼近极小元。
ai.result: 揭示了边界条件、过渡层厚度和温度参数共同介导的分岔现象；数值模拟结果与理论分析一致，展示了参数变化对极小元形态的影响。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解强边界约束下相场模型能量景观的复杂行为提供了理论和数值框架，适用于材料科学中界面与边界效应研究。

idea_spark.idea: 探索不同几何形状或非均匀边界条件对分岔模式的影响，或研究动态边界条件下的能量极小化路径。
idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖于特定势函数和边界条件，推广至更复杂势或混合边界条件时可能需要新的数学工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可启发对生物膜形态、液晶排列或复合材料界面在约束下的自组织行为研究。

en.tldr: This paper theoretically and numerically studies minimizers of the Cahn-Hilliard energy with the Flory-Huggins potential under strong anchoring (Dirichlet) boundary conditions. It reveals bifurcation phenomena mediated by boundary conditions, transition layer thickness, and temperature, with numerical simulations confirming the theoretical analysis.
en.motivation: To understand how strong anchoring boundary conditions affect the structure of minimizers for the Cahn-Hilliard energy with Flory-Huggins potential, and to elucidate bifurcation behaviors induced by boundary conditions, material parameters, and temperature.
en.method: Theoretical analysis of minimizer properties; numerical approximation of minimizers by solving a constrained Allen-Cahn equation (gradient-flow) with strong anchoring conditions and random initial data.
en.result: Reveals bifurcation phenomena mediated jointly by boundary conditions, transition layer thickness, and temperature; numerical simulations confirm theoretical predictions and illustrate parameter effects on minimizer morphology.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical and numerical framework for understanding complex energy landscapes of phase-field models under strong boundary constraints, applicable to interface and boundary effect studies in materials science.

idea_spark.idea: Explore effects of different geometries or non-uniform boundary conditions on bifurcation patterns, or study energy minimization paths under dynamic boundary conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical analysis relies on specific potential and boundary conditions; extension to more complex potentials or mixed boundary conditions may require new mathematical tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: The methodology could inspire studies on self-organization of biomembranes, liquid crystal alignment, or composite material interfaces under constraints.

papers.title: Solving Convex-Concave Problems with $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-4/(3p+1)})$ $p$th-Order Oracle Complexity
papers.summary: When the objective has Lipschitz continuous $p$th-order derivatives, it is known that convex-concave minimax problems can be solved with $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2/(p+1)})$ $p$th-order oracle calls. This complexity upper bound was speculated to be optimal as it is achieved by a natural generalization of the optimal first-order method. In this work, we show an improved upper bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-4/(3p+1)})$ by applying the Monteiro-Svaiter acceleration. We also establish a lower complexity bound of $Ω(ε^{-2/(3p-1)})$, suggesting a gap still exists for $p \ge 2$.

ai.tldr: 本文改进了具有Lipschitz连续p阶导数的凸凹极小极大问题的p阶Oracle复杂度上界，从已知的O(ε^{-2/(p+1)})提升至Õ(ε^{-4/(3p+1)})，并建立了Ω(ε^{-2/(3p-1)})的下界，表明对于p≥2仍存在理论间隙。
ai.motivation: 已知凸凹极小极大问题在目标函数具有Lipschitz连续p阶导数时，可通过p阶Oracle以O(ε^{-2/(p+1)})的复杂度求解，且该上界被认为可能最优。本文旨在探索是否可通过加速技术进一步改进该复杂度。
ai.method: 应用Monteiro-Svaiter加速技术，对具有Lipschitz连续p阶导数的凸凹极小极大问题进行算法设计与分析。
ai.result: 获得了改进的复杂度上界Õ(ε^{-4/(3p+1)})，同时建立了下界Ω(ε^{-2/(3p-1)})，表明对于p≥2，上界与下界之间仍存在间隙，未完全闭合。
ai.help_to_user: 为高阶优化算法设计提供了新的理论复杂度上界，并揭示了当前理论极限的间隙，推动了对极小极大问题最优算法复杂度的进一步研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将加速技术与高阶导数信息结合，可能进一步改进其他结构优化问题的复杂度上界。
idea_spark.risk: 下界表明当前上界可能非紧，最优复杂度仍待确定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 探索其他加速框架或问题结构特性，以缩小或闭合p≥2时的复杂度间隙。

en.tldr: This paper improves the pth-order oracle complexity upper bound for convex-concave minimax problems with Lipschitz continuous pth-order derivatives from the known O(ε^{-2/(p+1)}) to Õ(ε^{-4/(3p+1)}), and establishes a lower bound of Ω(ε^{-2/(3p-1)}), indicating a theoretical gap remains for p ≥ 2.
en.motivation: It is known that convex-concave minimax problems can be solved with O(ε^{-2/(p+1)}) pth-order oracle calls when the objective has Lipschitz continuous pth-order derivatives, and this upper bound was speculated to be optimal. This work aims to explore whether this complexity can be further improved via acceleration techniques.
en.method: Apply the Monteiro-Svaiter acceleration technique to design and analyze algorithms for convex-concave minimax problems with Lipschitz continuous pth-order derivatives.
en.result: An improved upper bound of Õ(ε^{-4/(3p+1)}) is obtained, while a lower bound of Ω(ε^{-2/(3p-1)}) is established, showing that a gap between upper and lower bounds still exists for p ≥ 2.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new theoretical complexity upper bound for higher-order optimization algorithm design and reveals the current gap in theoretical limits, motivating further research on optimal algorithm complexity for minimax problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining acceleration techniques with higher-order derivative information may further improve complexity upper bounds for other structured optimization problems.
idea_spark.risk: The lower bound indicates the current upper bound may not be tight, and the optimal complexity remains undetermined.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore other acceleration frameworks or problem structural properties to narrow or close the complexity gap for p ≥ 2.

papers.title: A direct algebraic proof for the non-positivity of Liouvillian eigenvalues in Markovian quantum dynamics
papers.summary: Markovian open quantum systems are described by the Lindblad master equation $\partial_tρ=\mathcal{L}(ρ)$, where $ρ$ denotes the system's density operator and $\mathcal{L}$ the Liouville super-operator, which is also known as the Liouvillian. For systems with a finite-dimensional Hilbert space, it is a fundamental property of the Liouvillian, that the real-parts of all its eigenvalues are non-positive which, in physical terms, corresponds to the stability of the system. The usual argument for this property is indirect, using that $\mathcal{L}$ generates a quantum channel and that quantum channels are contractive. We provide a direct algebraic proof based on the Lindblad form of Liouvillians.

ai.tldr: 本文为马尔可夫开放量子系统中Liouvillian算符特征值实部非正性提供了一个直接的代数证明，替代了传统的基于量子信道收缩性的间接论证。
ai.motivation: 通常论证Liouvillian特征值实部非正性依赖于量子信道的收缩性，这是一种间接方法。本文旨在提供一种基于Lindblad形式的直接代数证明。
ai.method: 基于Liouvillian的Lindblad形式，通过代数操作直接证明其特征值实部的非正性。
ai.result: 成功构建了一个不依赖于量子信道收缩性的直接代数证明，确立了有限维希尔伯特空间下Liouvillian特征值实部非正的根本性质。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解开放量子系统稳定性提供了更直接的数学基础，简化了相关性质的论证过程。

idea_spark.risk: 证明可能强烈依赖于有限维和Lindblad形式的具体结构，推广存在限制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对开放量子系统其他基本性质（如稳态唯一性、退相干时间）进行直接代数论证的探索。

en.tldr: This paper provides a direct algebraic proof for the non-positivity of the real parts of Liouvillian eigenvalues in Markovian open quantum systems, replacing the traditional indirect argument based on quantum channel contractivity.
en.motivation: The usual argument for the non-positivity of Liouvillian eigenvalue real parts relies on the contractivity of quantum channels, which is an indirect approach. This work aims to provide a direct algebraic proof based on the Lindblad form.
en.method: Using the Lindblad form of the Liouvillian, a direct algebraic proof is constructed to demonstrate the non-positivity of the real parts of its eigenvalues.
en.result: Successfully establishes a direct algebraic proof independent of quantum channel contractivity, confirming the fundamental property of Liouvillian eigenvalue real parts being non-positive for finite-dimensional Hilbert spaces.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more direct mathematical foundation for understanding stability in open quantum systems, simplifying the argumentation for related properties.

idea_spark.idea: Could similar direct algebraic proofs be extended to infinite-dimensional systems or non-Markovian dynamics?
idea_spark.risk: The proof may heavily depend on the specific structure of the finite-dimensional Lindblad form, limiting generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of direct algebraic arguments for other fundamental properties of open quantum systems, such as uniqueness of steady states or decoherence timescales.

papers.title: Bootstrapping Tensor Integrals
papers.summary: This work proposes a bootstrapping with positivity methodology to study random $U(N)^{D}$ invariant tensors in the large $N$ limit. As has been done for $U(N)$ invariant random matrices, we combine the Dyson-Schwinger equations and positivity constraints of moments to approximate the moments of such tensor models. As examples, we bootstrap the quartic and two hexic rank three tensor models. All models studied converge quickly, and for those which have known analytic formulae, they converge to such solutions. We conjecture new explicit formulae for all moments of the rank three quartic model and support this conjecture using bootstrapped results and explicit double-series computations with 'feyntensor'.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合正定性约束的引导方法，用于研究大N极限下U(N)^D不变的随机张量模型。
ai.motivation: 借鉴U(N)不变随机矩阵的成功经验，将Dyson-Schwinger方程与矩的正定性约束结合，以近似张量模型的矩。
ai.method: 使用引导方法结合正定性约束，对四次和六次秩三张量模型进行数值求解。
ai.result: 所有模型快速收敛，对于已知解析解的情况，收敛到该解。对秩三四次模型的所有矩提出了新的显式公式猜想，并通过引导结果和'feyntensor'的双级数计算予以支持。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究大N极限下的随机张量模型提供了一种有效的数值引导框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用正定性约束和运动方程系统性地约束张量矩。
idea_spark.risk: 高秩或复杂相互作用可能导致收敛困难或计算复杂度爆炸。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可能应用于量子引力、全息对偶或复杂系统中张量网络的研究。

en.motivation: Following the success for U(N) invariant random matrices, combine Dyson-Schwinger equations and positivity constraints of moments to approximate moments of such tensor models.
en.method: Employ bootstrapping with positivity to numerically solve quartic and hexic rank three tensor models.
en.result: All models converge quickly, and for those with known analytic solutions, they converge to such solutions. Conjecture new explicit formulae for all moments of the rank three quartic model, supported by bootstrapped results and explicit double-series computations with 'feyntensor'.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective numerical bootstrapping framework for studying random tensor models in the large N limit.

idea_spark.idea: Systematically constraining tensor moments using positivity constraints and equations of motion.
idea_spark.risk: High rank or complex interactions may lead to convergence difficulties or computational complexity explosion.
idea_spark.inspiration: The method could be applied to quantum gravity, holographic duality, or tensor network studies in complex systems.

papers.title: The filter of singularities in global anisotropic microlocal analysis
papers.summary: We define a filter of time-frequency anisotropic global singularities of phase space for tempered distributions. The filter contains information from the corresponding anisotropic Gabor wave front set and admits propagation results for the Cauchy problem for certain linear evolution equations of Schrödinger type that generalize the harmonic oscillator.

ai.tldr: 本文定义了一个用于缓增分布的相空间全局奇异性滤波器，该滤波器包含各向异性Gabor波前集信息，并可用于证明一类广义谐振子的薛定谔型线性演化方程柯西问题的传播结果。
ai.motivation: 在全局各向异性微局部分析中，需要一种能够捕捉相空间全局奇异性并适用于演化方程的工具。
ai.method: 定义了一个时间-频率各向异性的全局奇异性滤波器，该滤波器与各向异性Gabor波前集相关联。
ai.result: 该滤波器能够包含Gabor波前集信息，并成功应用于一类广义谐振子的薛定谔型线性演化方程柯西问题的传播分析。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种分析相空间全局奇异性的新工具，特别适用于处理各向异性演化方程问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将各向异性Gabor波前集信息嵌入到全局奇异性滤波器中，用于演化方程研究。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将时间-频率分析与微局部分析结合，处理更广泛的物理方程奇异性问题。

en.tldr: This paper defines a filter of time-frequency anisotropic global singularities in phase space for tempered distributions. The filter contains information from the anisotropic Gabor wave front set and yields propagation results for the Cauchy problem of certain Schrödinger-type linear evolution equations generalizing the harmonic oscillator.
en.motivation: There is a need for a tool in global anisotropic microlocal analysis that captures global singularities in phase space and is applicable to evolution equations.
en.method: Defined a filter of time-frequency anisotropic global singularities that relates to the anisotropic Gabor wave front set.
en.result: The filter incorporates Gabor wave front set information and successfully applies to propagation analysis for Cauchy problems of Schrödinger-type linear evolution equations generalizing the harmonic oscillator.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new tool for analyzing global singularities in phase space, particularly useful for anisotropic evolution equations.

idea_spark.idea: Embed anisotropic Gabor wave front set information into a global singularity filter for evolution equation studies.
idea_spark.risk: The method may be limited to linear evolution equations; extension to nonlinear cases requires further investigation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining time-frequency analysis with microlocal analysis to address singularity problems in broader physical equations.

papers.title: Distributed Multi-Sensor Control for Multi-Target Tracking Using Adaptive Complementary Fusion for LMB Densities
papers.summary: Tracking multiple targets in dynamic environments using distributed sensor networks is a fundamental problem in statistical signal processing. In such scenarios, the network of mobile sensors must coordinate their actions to accurately estimate the locations and trajectories of multiple targets, balancing limited computation and communication resources with multi-target tracking accuracy. Multi-sensor control methods can improve the performance of these networks by enabling efficient utilization of resources and enhancing the accuracy of the estimated target states. This paper proposes a novel multi-sensor control method that utilizes multi-agent coordinate descent to address this problem, ensuring distributed consensus of optimal sensor actions throughout the sensor network. To achieve this, a novel adaptive complementary fusion approach that prioritizes information from the most informative sensors is developed. Our method improves computational tractability and enables fully distributed control, ensuring the scalability and flexibility necessary for large-scale real-time sensing systems. Experimental results on several challenging multi-target tracking scenarios demonstrate that our approach significantly improves both multi-target tracking accuracy and computation efficiency over competing methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于自适应互补融合和LMB密度的分布式多传感器控制方法，用于多目标跟踪，通过多智能体坐标下降实现传感器网络的最优动作共识。
ai.motivation: 在动态环境中使用分布式传感器网络跟踪多个目标是一个基本问题，需要协调传感器动作以平衡有限的计算通信资源与跟踪精度。
ai.method: 开发了一种自适应互补融合方法，优先融合信息量最大的传感器数据，并采用多智能体坐标下降实现分布式最优传感器动作共识。
ai.result: 在多个挑战性多目标跟踪场景中的实验表明，该方法在跟踪精度和计算效率上均显著优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模实时传感系统提供了一种可扩展、灵活的完全分布式控制方案，提高了计算可行性和跟踪性能。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将信息论度量与分布式优化结合，设计轻量级、可扩展的传感器网络协同机制。

en.tldr: Proposes a distributed multi-sensor control method for multi-target tracking using adaptive complementary fusion for LMB densities, achieving optimal sensor action consensus via multi-agent coordinate descent.
en.motivation: Tracking multiple targets in dynamic environments using distributed sensor networks requires coordinating sensor actions to balance limited computation/communication resources with tracking accuracy.
en.method: Develops an adaptive complementary fusion approach that prioritizes information from the most informative sensors, and employs multi-agent coordinate descent to achieve distributed consensus on optimal sensor actions.
en.result: Experimental results on challenging multi-target tracking scenarios demonstrate significant improvements in both tracking accuracy and computational efficiency over competing methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable, flexible, fully distributed control scheme for large-scale real-time sensing systems, enhancing computational tractability and tracking performance.

idea_spark.idea: Prioritize fusion of high-information sensor data combined with distributed optimization to achieve network consensus.
idea_spark.risk: Consensus convergence may be affected in scenarios with extreme communication constraints or high sensor heterogeneity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining information-theoretic measures with distributed optimization to design lightweight, scalable sensor network coordination mechanisms.

papers.title: Analysis of persistence thresholds for a nonlocal PDE--ODE model of bacterial persister cells
papers.summary: Within many bacterial colonies, persister cells exist as a subpopulation that is tolerant to antibiotics and other stressors, yet not genetically distinct from the rest of the colony. A recent study has proposed epigenetic inheritance as a mechanism that leads to the presence of persister cells. We analyze a nonlocal PDE--ODE model introduced in that study to describe the epigenetic inheritance process and establish its mathematical well-posedness, including existence, uniqueness, and nonnegativity of solutions. We identify a sharp parameter threshold delineating extinction from persistence of the colony: below this threshold the washout equilibrium is globally asymptotically stable, while above it a unique positive equilibrium exists and the population is weakly persistent. Notably, this threshold is independent of the internal community structure.

ai.tldr: 分析一个描述细菌持久细胞表观遗传的非局部PDE-ODE模型，建立了数学适定性，并确定了区分菌落灭绝与存活的尖锐参数阈值。
ai.motivation: 细菌持久细胞对抗生素具有耐受性，但无遗传差异，近期研究提出表观遗传是其形成机制，需要数学建模分析其动力学。
ai.method: 分析一个已有的非局部偏微分方程-常微分方程耦合模型，证明解的存在性、唯一性和非负性，并通过稳定性分析确定持久性阈值。
ai.result: 模型数学适定性成立；发现一个独立于群落内部结构的尖锐参数阈值：低于阈值时清洗平衡态全局渐近稳定，高于阈值时存在唯一正平衡态且种群弱持续。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解细菌持久性的表观遗传机制提供了严格的数学框架和明确的存活条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将阈值条件与实验可测的细菌表观修饰速率关联，设计验证实验。
idea_spark.risk: 模型简化了生物细节，阈值在实际复杂环境中的适用性需检验。
idea_spark.inspiration: 独立于内部结构的全局阈值提示持久性可能由少数核心调控参数主导，而非群落细节。

en.tldr: Analyzes a nonlocal PDE-ODE model for epigenetic inheritance in bacterial persister cells, establishes mathematical well-posedness, and identifies a sharp parameter threshold for colony extinction vs. persistence.
en.motivation: Bacterial persister cells are antibiotic-tolerant but not genetically distinct; recent studies propose epigenetic inheritance as a mechanism, requiring mathematical modeling of its dynamics.
en.method: Analyzes an existing nonlocal PDE-ODE coupled model, proves existence, uniqueness, and nonnegativity of solutions, and determines persistence thresholds via stability analysis.
en.result: Mathematical well-posedness is established; a sharp parameter threshold independent of internal community structure is found: below it, the washout equilibrium is globally asymptotically stable; above it, a unique positive equilibrium exists and the population is weakly persistent.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and clear survival conditions for understanding the epigenetic mechanism of bacterial persistence.

idea_spark.idea: Link the threshold condition to experimentally measurable rates of bacterial epigenetic modification to design validation experiments.
idea_spark.risk: The model simplifies biological details; the applicability of the threshold in complex real-world environments needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The global threshold independent of internal structure suggests persistence may be governed by a few core regulatory parameters rather than community details.

papers.title: A semi-smooth Newton method for the nonlinear conic problem with generalized simplicial cones
papers.summary: In this work we develop and analyze a semi-smooth Newton method for the general nonlinear conic programming problem. In particular, we study the problem with a generalized simplicial cone, i.e., the image of a symmetric cone under a linear mapping. We generalize Robinson's normal equations to a conic setting, yielding what we call the conic projection equations. The resulting system is equivalent to the KKT conditions associated with the nonlinear conic programming problem. A semi-smooth Newton iteration is proposed for solving it, and local quadratic convergence is established. We study properties of generalized simplicial cones and prove strong semi-smoothness of the projection operator onto them. Numerical experiments compare the method against a recent smoothing Newton approach on the circular cone programming problem, and we also apply it to the low-rank matrix completion problem.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种求解广义单纯锥非线性锥规划问题的半光滑牛顿法，建立了局部二次收敛性，并在数值实验中验证了其有效性。
ai.motivation: 非线性锥规划问题在优化领域具有广泛应用，但针对广义单纯锥（对称锥在线性映射下的像）的高效求解算法仍需发展。
ai.method: 将Robinson法方程推广至锥设置，得到锥投影方程（等价于KKT条件），并针对广义单纯锥的投影算子证明了强半光滑性，从而设计半光滑牛顿迭代。
ai.result: 理论证明了算法的局部二次收敛性；数值实验表明，在圆锥规划问题上优于近期光滑牛顿方法，并能有效求解低秩矩阵补全问题。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有广义单纯锥结构的非线性锥规划问题提供了一个理论保证强、计算高效的求解框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将广义单纯锥的投影算子性质与半光滑牛顿法结合，实现快速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 对投影算子强半光滑性的证明依赖锥的特殊结构，可能难以直接推广至任意锥。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将对称锥的优良性质通过线性映射传递至更一般的锥类，并利用投影算子的半光滑性设计高效算法。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a semi-smooth Newton method for nonlinear conic programming with generalized simplicial cones, establishes local quadratic convergence, and demonstrates its effectiveness in numerical experiments.
en.motivation: Nonlinear conic programming has broad applications in optimization, but efficient algorithms specifically for generalized simplicial cones (images of symmetric cones under linear mappings) require further development.
en.method: Generalizes Robinson's normal equations to a conic setting, yielding conic projection equations (equivalent to KKT conditions). Proves strong semi-smoothness of the projection operator onto generalized simplicial cones and designs a semi-smooth Newton iteration.
en.result: Theoretical local quadratic convergence is established. Numerical experiments show superiority over a recent smoothing Newton method on circular cone programming and effective application to low-rank matrix completion.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically sound and computationally efficient framework for solving nonlinear conic problems with generalized simplicial cone structures.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the properties of the projection operator for generalized simplicial cones with the semi-smooth Newton method to achieve fast convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Proof of strong semi-smoothness for the projection operator relies on the specific structure of the cone and may not generalize directly to arbitrary cones.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires leveraging the favorable properties of symmetric cones transmitted through linear mappings to more general cone classes, and utilizing semi-smoothness of projection operators to design efficient algorithms.

papers.title: Unsupervised Confidence Calibration for Reasoning LLMs from a Single Generation
papers.summary: Reasoning language models can solve increasingly complex tasks, but struggle to produce the calibrated confidence estimates necessary for reliable deployment. Existing calibration methods usually depend on labels or repeated sampling at inference time, making them impractical in many settings. We introduce a method for unsupervised confidence calibration of reasoning LLMs when only a single generation is available at inference time. Our approach uses offline sampling on unlabeled data to derive a self-consistency-based proxy target, then distills this signal into a lightweight deployment-time confidence predictor. In a broad evaluation across 5 math and question-answering tasks using 9 reasoning models, our method substantially outperforms baselines, including under distribution shift, and improves downstream performance in selective prediction and simulated downstream decision-making.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无监督置信度校准方法，仅需推理时单次生成即可为推理大语言模型提供校准的置信度估计。
ai.motivation: 推理大语言模型在复杂任务上表现提升，但难以产生可靠的校准置信度估计。现有校准方法通常依赖标签或推理时重复采样，在许多实际场景中不实用。
ai.method: 在未标注数据上进行离线采样，基于自一致性生成代理目标，然后将该信号蒸馏到一个轻量级的部署时置信度预测器中。
ai.result: 在5个数学和问答任务、9个推理模型上的广泛评估表明，该方法显著优于基线，包括在分布偏移下，并提升了选择性预测和模拟下游决策的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 为部署推理大语言模型提供了一种无需标签、仅需单次生成即可获得可靠置信度估计的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将推理时昂贵的重复采样转移到离线阶段，通过蒸馏压缩为轻量级预测器，实现高效部署。
idea_spark.risk: 离线采样的质量和对未标注数据的依赖可能影响代理目标的可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将训练/推理阶段的计算资源重新分配，用离线预处理换取在线效率的思路。

en.tldr: Proposes an unsupervised confidence calibration method that provides calibrated confidence estimates for reasoning LLMs using only a single generation at inference time.
en.motivation: Reasoning LLMs show improved performance on complex tasks but struggle to produce reliable calibrated confidence estimates. Existing calibration methods typically depend on labels or repeated sampling at inference time, making them impractical in many real-world settings.
en.method: Uses offline sampling on unlabeled data to derive a self-consistency-based proxy target, then distills this signal into a lightweight deployment-time confidence predictor.
en.result: In a broad evaluation across 5 math and QA tasks using 9 reasoning models, the method substantially outperforms baselines, including under distribution shift, and improves downstream performance in selective prediction and simulated decision-making.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical method for deploying reasoning LLMs with reliable confidence estimates without requiring labels and using only a single generation at inference time.

idea_spark.idea: Shift the computationally expensive repeated sampling from inference time to an offline phase, then distill it into a lightweight predictor for efficient deployment.
idea_spark.risk: The quality of offline sampling and reliance on unlabeled data may affect the reliability of the proxy target.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires rethinking the allocation of computational resources between training/inference phases, trading offline preprocessing for online efficiency.

papers.title: Pilot-Free Predictive Multi-User Beamforming via Sensing Management in Cell-Free Networks
papers.summary: This paper presents a sensing management frame- work for integrated sensing and communications (ISAC) within cell-free massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems to reduce pilot-based channel state information (CSI) acquisition overhead. Conventional communication systems rely on frequent channel estimation procedures that impose significant signaling overhead, consuming valuable time-frequency resources. To ad- dress this inefficiency, we propose a state-based architecture that partitions users into communication and sensing groups based on service requirements. When users are not requesting data, the system utilizes sensing capabilities to track their location. Upon receiving a communication request, the system transitions to communication mode, leveraging the tracked state for predictive beamforming to eliminate the need for uplink pilot training. We develop an extended Kalman filter (EKF) based tracking algorithm coupled with adaptive resource allocation strategies. Furthermore, we analyze the impact of inter-target interference and design a sensing management protocol that performs sensing operations only when necessary to maintain the accuracy of user location estimates. Simulation results demonstrate that the pro- posed EKF-based tracking and sensing management can support predictive beamforming with downlink spectral efficiency close to the perfect-CSI case, while requiring sensing only occasionally after an initial convergence period. The results also indicate that this performance is robust in a cell-free massive MIMO setup and can be achieved with practical sensing waveforms.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无蜂窝大规模MIMO系统中集成感知与通信的感知管理框架，通过用户位置跟踪实现免导频预测性波束成形，显著降低信道估计开销。
ai.motivation: 传统通信系统依赖频繁的信道估计过程，导致巨大的信令开销，消耗宝贵的时频资源。
ai.method: 提出基于状态的架构，根据服务需求将用户分为通信组和感知组。系统在用户不请求数据时利用感知能力跟踪其位置；收到通信请求后，切换到通信模式，利用跟踪状态进行预测性波束成形，无需上行导频训练。开发了基于扩展卡尔曼滤波的跟踪算法和自适应资源分配策略，并设计了仅在必要时执行感知操作的感知管理协议。
ai.result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的基于EKF的跟踪和感知管理能够支持预测性波束成形，其下行频谱效率接近完美CSI情况，且仅在初始收敛期后偶尔需要感知。该性能在无蜂窝大规模MIMO设置中具有鲁棒性，且可通过实用感知波形实现。
ai.help_to_user: 为降低大规模MIMO系统中信道估计开销提供了免导频解决方案，通过智能感知管理平衡通信与感知资源，提升系统效率。

idea_spark.idea: 利用感知信息（如位置）作为信道状态的替代或先验，减少显式信道估计需求。
idea_spark.risk: 感知精度、干扰管理以及移动性模型失配可能影响跟踪和波束成形性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将环境感知与通信控制更深层次融合，实现更自主、低开销的下一代无线系统。

en.tldr: This paper presents a sensing management framework for integrated sensing and communications in cell-free massive MIMO systems to enable pilot-free predictive beamforming via user location tracking, significantly reducing channel estimation overhead.
en.motivation: Conventional communication systems rely on frequent channel estimation procedures that impose significant signaling overhead, consuming valuable time-frequency resources.
en.method: A state-based architecture partitions users into communication and sensing groups based on service requirements. The system uses sensing to track user locations when no data is requested; upon a communication request, it switches to communication mode and leverages the tracked state for predictive beamforming, eliminating uplink pilot training. An EKF-based tracking algorithm with adaptive resource allocation is developed, and a sensing management protocol performs sensing only when necessary to maintain location estimate accuracy.
en.result: Simulation results show that the proposed EKF-based tracking and sensing management can support predictive beamforming with downlink spectral efficiency close to the perfect-CSI case, requiring sensing only occasionally after an initial convergence period. The performance is robust in a cell-free massive MIMO setup and achievable with practical sensing waveforms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a pilot-free solution to reduce channel estimation overhead in massive MIMO systems, intelligently balancing communication and sensing resources through sensing management to improve system efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Using sensing information (e.g., location) as a substitute or prior for channel state to reduce explicit channel estimation needs.
idea_spark.risk: Sensing accuracy, interference management, and mobility model mismatch may affect tracking and beamforming performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires deeper integration of environmental sensing with communication control for more autonomous, low-overhead next-generation wireless systems.

papers.title: Quantitative approximation of the Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck)-Navier-Stokes system by stochastic particle systems
papers.summary: This paper is concerned with a fluid-particle system given by the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations coupled with the Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck) equation through a drag force. Such a model arises naturally in the study of aerosols, sprays, and more generally two-phase flows. In dimensions $d\in \{2,3\}$, we establish a rate of convergence for a system of $N$ interacting stochastic particles coupled with a fluid, towards the Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck)-Navier-Stokes system, as $N\to \infty$. The case of particles with a noise that vanishes as $N\to \infty$ is considered and leads specifically to the Vlasov-Navier-Stokes system. More precisely, we prove that the empirical measure associated with the particle system converges to the Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck) component, while the fluid velocity converges to the Navier-Stokes component of the coupled system. The proofs combine stochastic calculus and PDE techniques to establish energy estimates and commutator estimates for both the discrete and continuous systems.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了由不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程与Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck)方程通过阻力耦合的流体-粒子系统，建立了N个相互作用的随机粒子与流体耦合系统向Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck)-Navier-Stokes系统收敛的速率。
ai.motivation: 该模型自然出现在气溶胶、喷雾及更一般的两相流研究中，需要从离散粒子系统到连续流体动力学方程的定量近似理论。
ai.method: 结合随机分析和偏微分方程技术，对离散和连续系统建立能量估计和交换子估计。
ai.result: 证明了粒子系统的经验测度收敛于Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck)分量，流体速度收敛于Navier-Stokes分量，并给出了收敛速率。当粒子噪声随N→∞而消失时，系统退化为Vlasov-Navier-Stokes系统。
ai.help_to_user: 为两相流中离散粒子模型与连续介质模型的数学联系提供了严格的收敛性分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将能量估计和交换子估计技术同时应用于离散随机系统和连续偏微分方程系统
idea_spark.risk: 高维情况下的估计可能更复杂，需要更精细的分析
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可扩展到其他带有随机相互作用的流体-粒子耦合系统

en.tldr: This paper studies a fluid-particle system coupling incompressible Navier-Stokes equations with Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck) equation via drag force, establishing convergence rates of stochastic particle systems to the continuum system as N→∞.
en.motivation: The model arises naturally in aerosols, sprays, and two-phase flows, requiring quantitative approximation theory from discrete particle systems to continuum fluid equations.
en.method: Combines stochastic calculus and PDE techniques to establish energy estimates and commutator estimates for both discrete and continuous systems.
en.result: Proves convergence of the empirical measure to the Vlasov(-Fokker-Planck) component and fluid velocity to the Navier-Stokes component, with explicit rates. The vanishing noise case yields the Vlasov-Navier-Stokes system.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous convergence analysis framework linking discrete particle models to continuum models in two-phase flows.

idea_spark.idea: Applying energy estimates and commutator estimates simultaneously to discrete stochastic systems and continuous PDE systems
idea_spark.risk: Estimates in higher dimensions may require more refined analysis
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach could extend to other fluid-particle coupling systems with stochastic interactions

papers.title: Regulation Zero 2: A Flow-Centric Sequential Regulation Planning Framework to Counter Regulation Cascading in Pre-tactical Air Traffic Flow Management
papers.summary: Air Traffic Flow Management (ATFM) traffic regulations are being increasingly used as rising demand meets persistent workforce shortages. This operational strain has amplified a critical phenomenon that we call \emph{regulation cascading}: the compounding, non-linear interactions that occur when multiple regulations influence one another in unpredictable ways. As the number and complexity of regulations grow, cascading effects become more pronounced, undermining the network operator's ability to protect sectors reliably.   To address this challenge, we introduce Regulation Zero 2, an updated sequential planning framework that natively operates in the regulation space, optimizing over ordered sequences of flow-level regulations that remain compatible as much as possible with existing slot-allocation systems such as CASA and RBS++. We equipped Regulation Zero 2 with new heuristics to render flow finding more efficient. At its core, the method employs a hierarchical Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) that first samples congestion hotspots and then selects candidate regulations synthesized by a local proposal engine. Each proposal is evaluated by a fast First-Planned-First-Served (FPFS) allocator to estimate its reward, with these feedbacks guiding the subsequent MCTS exploration.   Experiments on many pan-European summer-peak traffic days that Regulation Zero delivers promising and consistent performance. Compared to a flight-centric simulated-annealing and NSGA-II baselines, it achieves markedly higher objective improvements, while maintaining a tighter scope of impact on the network. Ablation studies also found that Regulation Cascading could reduce up to 50\% of potential effectiveness. RZ also preserves FPFS fairness and supports expert knowledge injection, offering a pragmatic and low-disruption pathway toward automation in operations.

ai.tldr: Regulation Zero 2是一个针对空中交通流量管理中法规级联问题的顺序规划框架，它使用分层蒙特卡洛树搜索优化流量级法规序列，以减少对网络的整体影响。
ai.motivation: 空中交通流量管理法规使用增加，但法规间存在级联效应，即多个法规以不可预测的方式相互作用，削弱了网络运营商可靠保护扇区的能力。
ai.method: 框架在法规空间内运行，采用分层蒙特卡洛树搜索：首先采样拥塞热点，然后通过本地提案引擎合成候选法规，并使用快速FPFS分配器评估其奖励以指导后续搜索。
ai.result: 在欧洲夏季高峰交通日的实验中，相比以航班为中心的模拟退火和NSGA-II基线，该方法实现了显著更高的目标改进，同时保持对网络更小的影响范围。法规级联可能降低高达50%的潜在有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个实用的、低干扰的自动化操作路径，能保持FPFS公平性并支持专家知识注入。

idea_spark.idea: 将全局搜索（热点采样）与局部优化（提案引擎）结合，并用快速仿真（FPFS分配器）提供即时反馈，以平衡探索与计算效率。
idea_spark.risk: 框架性能依赖于本地提案引擎的质量和快速分配器的准确性，在极端或未见的交通模式下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将“法规”视为可组合的操作单元，并在其序列空间中进行优化，而非直接操作底层实体（航班），这为管理复杂系统的干预措施提供了新视角。

zh.tldr: Regulation Zero 2是一个针对空中交通流量管理中法规级联问题的顺序规划框架，它使用分层蒙特卡洛树搜索优化流量级法规序列，以减少对网络的整体影响。
zh.motivation: 空中交通流量管理法规使用增加，但法规间存在级联效应，即多个法规以不可预测的方式相互作用，削弱了网络运营商可靠保护扇区的能力。
zh.method: 框架在法规空间内运行，采用分层蒙特卡洛树搜索：首先采样拥塞热点，然后通过本地提案引擎合成候选法规，并使用快速FPFS分配器评估其奖励以指导后续搜索。
zh.result: 在欧洲夏季高峰交通日的实验中，相比以航班为中心的模拟退火和NSGA-II基线，该方法实现了显著更高的目标改进，同时保持对网络更小的影响范围。法规级联可能降低高达50%的潜在有效性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一个实用的、低干扰的自动化操作路径，能保持FPFS公平性并支持专家知识注入。

idea_spark.idea: 将全局搜索（热点采样）与局部优化（提案引擎）结合，并用快速仿真（FPFS分配器）提供即时反馈，以平衡探索与计算效率。
idea_spark.risk: 框架性能依赖于本地提案引擎的质量和快速分配器的准确性，在极端或未见的交通模式下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将“法规”视为可组合的操作单元，并在其序列空间中进行优化，而非直接操作底层实体（航班），这为管理复杂系统的干预措施提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Regulation Zero 2 is a sequential planning framework to counter regulation cascading in Air Traffic Flow Management, using hierarchical Monte Carlo Tree Search to optimize sequences of flow-level regulations and minimize network-wide impact.
en.motivation: Increased use of ATFM regulations leads to regulation cascading, where multiple regulations interact in unpredictable, compounding ways, undermining the network operator's ability to reliably protect sectors.
en.method: The framework operates natively in regulation space. It employs a hierarchical MCTS that first samples congestion hotspots, then selects candidate regulations synthesized by a local proposal engine. Each proposal is evaluated by a fast FPFS allocator to estimate its reward, guiding subsequent exploration.
en.result: Experiments on pan-European summer-peak traffic days show it achieves markedly higher objective improvements compared to flight-centric simulated-annealing and NSGA-II baselines, while maintaining a tighter scope of network impact. Regulation cascading was found to reduce up to 50% of potential effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Offers a pragmatic, low-disruption pathway toward automation, preserving FPFS fairness and supporting expert knowledge injection.

idea_spark.idea: Combine global search (hotspot sampling) with local optimization (proposal engine) and use fast simulation (FPFS allocator) for immediate feedback to balance exploration and computational efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Performance relies on the quality of the local proposal engine and the accuracy of the fast allocator; it may fail under extreme or unseen traffic patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating 'regulations' as composable operational units and optimizing over their sequence space, rather than directly manipulating underlying entities (flights), offers a new perspective for managing interventions in complex systems.

papers.title: Scalable Outer Approximation of Minkowski Sums of Matrix Ellipsoids for Data-Driven Control
papers.summary: Matrix ellipsoids provide a standard framework for representing bounded uncertainties in data-driven control. Since noise models for sequential observations are naturally represented as the Minkowski sum of multiple matrix ellipsoids, applying existing robust control methods, which typically assume a single ellipsoidal set, requires a tight outer approximation. While techniques based on linear matrix inequalities (LMI) are applicable, their computational cost grows quadratically with the data length, limiting their scalability. This paper investigates the optimal outer approximation problem under two criteria: the sum of squared semi-axes and the volume. We propose an LMI-free approach by introducing a parameterized family of bounding matrix ellipsoids. Specifically, we derive an exact analytical solution for the first criterion and develop an efficient majorization-minimization (MM) algorithm for the second. The proposed MM algorithm employs a first-order approximation of the log-determinant function to provide closed-form update rules, ensuring monotonic convergence to the set of stationary points. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our method offers significantly higher computational efficiency and scalability than standard interior-point solvers.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的方法，用于计算矩阵椭球Minkowski和的最优外近似，解决了数据驱动控制中噪声模型的计算瓶颈。
ai.motivation: 数据驱动控制中，序列观测噪声通常表示为多个矩阵椭球的Minkowski和，而现有鲁棒控制方法假设单一椭球集，需要紧致外近似。基于LMI的方法计算成本随数据长度二次增长，可扩展性差。
ai.method: 引入参数化边界矩阵椭球族，针对两个优化准则：半轴平方和与体积。对第一准则给出精确解析解；对第二准则开发高效MM算法，利用对数行列式函数的一阶近似实现闭式更新规则。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，该方法比标准内点法求解器具有显著更高的计算效率和可扩展性，能单调收敛至驻点集。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理高维数据驱动控制中的不确定性聚合问题提供了LMI-free的高效计算框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将体积最小化问题转化为可分离的代理函数优化，通过对数行列式的线性化实现高效迭代。
idea_spark.risk: 对非凸问题可能收敛至局部驻点而非全局最优；解析解仅适用于特定准则。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将几何近似问题转化为可微优化，并利用函数线性化降低计算复杂度，适用于实时控制应用。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a scalable method for optimal outer approximation of Minkowski sums of matrix ellipsoids, addressing computational bottlenecks in data-driven control noise modeling.
en.motivation: In data-driven control, noise models for sequential observations are naturally represented as Minkowski sums of multiple matrix ellipsoids, while existing robust control methods typically assume a single ellipsoidal set, requiring tight outer approximation. LMI-based techniques suffer from quadratic computational growth with data length, limiting scalability.
en.method: Introduces a parameterized family of bounding matrix ellipsoids. For two criteria—sum of squared semi-axes and volume—provides an exact analytical solution for the first and develops an efficient MM algorithm for the second, using first-order approximation of the log-determinant function to enable closed-form updates.
en.result: Numerical experiments demonstrate significantly higher computational efficiency and scalability compared to standard interior-point solvers, with monotonic convergence to stationary points.
en.help_to_user: Provides an LMI-free computational framework for handling uncertainty aggregation in high-dimensional data-driven control problems.

idea_spark.idea: Transform volume minimization into separable surrogate function optimization via linearization of the log-determinant for efficient iteration.
idea_spark.risk: May converge to local stationary points rather than global optima for non-convex problems; analytical solutions are limited to specific criteria.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires reformulating geometric approximation as differentiable optimization with function linearization to reduce computational complexity, suitable for real-time control applications.

papers.title: The Logical Expressiveness of Topological Neural Networks
papers.summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are the standard for learning on graphs, yet they have limited expressive power, often expressed in terms of the Weisfeiler-Leman (WL) hierarchy or within the framework of first-order logic. In this context, topological neural networks (TNNs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative for graph representation learning. By incorporating higher-order relational structures into message-passing schemes, TNNs offer higher representational power than traditional GNNs. However, a fundamental question remains open: what is the logical expressiveness of TNNs? Answering this allows us to characterize precisely which binary classifiers TNNs can represent. In this paper, we address this question by analyzing isomorphism tests derived from the underlying mechanisms of general TNNs. We introduce and investigate the power of higher-order variants of WL-based tests for combinatorial complexes, called $k$-CCWL test. In addition, we introduce the topological counting logic (TC$_k$), an extension of standard counting logic featuring a novel pairwise counting quantifier $ \exists^{N}(x_i,x_j)\, \varphi(x_i,x_j), $ which explicitly quantifies pairs $(x_i, x_j)$ satisfying property $\varphi$. We rigorously prove the exact equivalence: $ \text{k-CCWL} \equiv \text{TC}_{k{+}2} \equiv \text{Topological }(k{+}2)\text{-pebble game}.$ These results establish a logical expressiveness theory for TNNs.

ai.tldr: 本文通过引入k-CCWL测试和拓扑计数逻辑TC_k，建立了拓扑神经网络逻辑表达能力的严格理论框架，证明了其与高阶WL测试的等价性。
ai.motivation: 图神经网络表达能力有限，拓扑神经网络作为新兴替代方案虽能捕捉高阶关系结构，但其逻辑表达能力尚未被严格刻画。
ai.method: 分析拓扑神经网络底层机制导出的同构测试，引入针对组合复形的高阶WL测试变体k-CCWL，并设计具有成对计数量词的拓扑计数逻辑TC_k。
ai.result: 严格证明了k-CCWL测试、TC_{k+2}逻辑和拓扑(k+2)-pebble游戏的精确等价关系，为拓扑神经网络建立了逻辑表达能力理论。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解拓扑神经网络能表达哪些二元分类器提供了理论基础，将拓扑深度学习的表达能力与形式逻辑和组合测试联系起来。

idea_spark.idea: 设计具有特定逻辑表达能力约束的神经网络架构，实现可解释的关系推理
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果到实际架构和任务的转化可能存在效率或可扩展性挑战
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将形式逻辑工具系统化地用于分析和设计具有严格表达能力保证的深度学习模型

en.tldr: This paper establishes a rigorous theoretical framework for the logical expressiveness of topological neural networks by introducing the k-CCWL test and topological counting logic TC_k, proving their equivalence to higher-order WL tests.
en.motivation: Graph neural networks have limited expressive power, and while topological neural networks emerge as promising alternatives capturing higher-order relational structures, their logical expressiveness remains uncharacterized.
en.method: Analyze isomorphism tests derived from TNN mechanisms, introduce higher-order WL test variants for combinatorial complexes (k-CCWL), and design topological counting logic TC_k with a novel pairwise counting quantifier.
en.result: Rigorously prove the exact equivalence: k-CCWL ≡ TC_{k+2} ≡ Topological (k+2)-pebble game, establishing a logical expressiveness theory for TNNs.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for understanding which binary classifiers TNNs can represent, linking topological deep learning expressiveness to formal logic and combinatorial tests.

idea_spark.idea: Design neural architectures with specific logical expressiveness constraints for interpretable relational reasoning
idea_spark.risk: Translation from theoretical results to practical architectures and tasks may face efficiency or scalability challenges
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires systematic use of formal logic tools to analyze and design deep learning models with guaranteed expressive power

papers.title: The mean curvature type hypersurfaces with prescribed gradient image
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider the existence of mean curvature type hypersurfaces with prescribed gradient image. Let $Ω$ and $\tildeΩ$ be uniformly convex bounded domains in $\mathbb{R}^n$ with smooth boundary. We show that there exists unique convex solutions for the second boundary value problem of mean curvature type equations.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了具有指定梯度像的平均曲率型超曲面的存在性。在光滑边界的均匀凸有界域上，证明了平均曲率型方程第二边值问题凸解的存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 探索平均曲率型方程在给定梯度映射约束下的几何解的存在性与唯一性，这是几何偏微分方程中的一个基本问题。
ai.method: 考虑ℝⁿ中两个具有光滑边界的均匀凸有界域Ω和Ω̃，研究平均曲率型方程的第二边值问题，通过几何分析与PDE理论证明解的存在性。
ai.result: 证明了在所述条件下，平均曲率型方程的第二边值问题存在唯一的凸解。
ai.help_to_user: 为几何偏微分方程中具有指定梯度约束的曲率问题提供了严格的存在唯一性理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 探索非均匀凸域或更一般边界条件下的解的存在性，或考虑离散近似与数值验证。
idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖于域的凸性与光滑性假设，放松条件可能导致技术困难或反例。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可能启发图像处理中基于曲率的形变模型或计算机图形学中的曲面生成问题。

en.tldr: This paper establishes the existence of mean curvature type hypersurfaces with prescribed gradient image. For uniformly convex bounded domains with smooth boundary, unique convex solutions to the second boundary value problem of mean curvature type equations are proven.
en.motivation: To investigate the existence and uniqueness of geometric solutions for mean curvature type equations under prescribed gradient map constraints, a fundamental problem in geometric PDEs.
en.method: Considering two uniformly convex bounded domains Ω and Ω̃ in ℝⁿ with smooth boundary, the second boundary value problem for mean curvature type equations is studied using geometric analysis and PDE theory.
en.result: It is shown that under the given conditions, there exists a unique convex solution to the second boundary value problem.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous theoretical framework for existence and uniqueness of curvature problems with gradient constraints in geometric partial differential equations.

idea_spark.idea: Explore solution existence under non-uniformly convex domains or more general boundary conditions, or consider discrete approximations and numerical validation.
idea_spark.risk: The method heavily relies on convexity and smoothness assumptions; relaxing conditions may introduce technical difficulties or counterexamples.
idea_spark.inspiration: This framework may inspire curvature-based deformation models in image processing or surface generation in computer graphics.

papers.title: Simple approximations of some statistical functions
papers.summary: Possibilities are considered to simplify the computation of several statistical functions used to test statistical hypotheses when processing observations: the inverse normal distribution, the Student's t-distribution, and the criterion for rejecting outliers. For these three cases, simple approximation expressions are proposed for the quantiles of these statistical distributions, which are accurate enough for most practical applications.

ai.tldr: 为逆正态分布、t分布和异常值剔除准则的统计分位数提出了简单近似表达式，适用于大多数实际应用。
ai.motivation: 简化假设检验中常用统计函数的计算过程。
ai.method: 为三种统计分布的分位数设计简单近似表达式。
ai.result: 提出的近似表达式在大多数实际应用中具有足够精度。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要快速计算统计分位数的研究人员提供实用的近似工具。

idea_spark.idea: 开发更复杂的统计函数（如F分布、卡方分布）的简单近似。
idea_spark.risk: 近似精度可能不适用于极端尾部概率或高精度要求的场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在计算资源受限环境下实现统计推断的简化算法。

en.tldr: Proposes simple approximation expressions for quantiles of inverse normal distribution, Student's t-distribution, and outlier rejection criterion, accurate enough for most practical applications.
en.motivation: To simplify the computation of statistical functions used in hypothesis testing.
en.method: Develops simple approximation expressions for quantiles of three statistical distributions.
en.result: The proposed approximations provide sufficient accuracy for most practical applications.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical approximation tools for researchers needing quick statistical quantile calculations.

idea_spark.idea: Develop simple approximations for more complex statistical functions (e.g., F-distribution, chi-square distribution).
idea_spark.risk: Approximation accuracy may be insufficient for extreme tail probabilities or high-precision requirements.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires simplified algorithms for statistical inference in computationally constrained environments.

papers.title: Gibbs Equivalence and SRB Measures for Axiom A Diffeomorphisms: Transfer Operators, Structural Stability, and Physical Measures
papers.summary: We develop the Ruelle transfer operator theory for Axiom A diffeomorphisms and construct Sinai-Ruelle-Bowen measures, carrying the symbolic spectral results of Part I over to smooth dynamics through the Markov partition coding established in Part III. This paper contains four Main Theorems. The first proves structural stability of Axiom A diffeomorphisms satisfying the strong transversality condition, with an explicit Hölder exponent for the conjugating homeomorphism computed in terms of the hyperbolicity data, refining the classical results of Robbin and Robinson. The second establishes quasi-compactness of the transfer operator on Hölder spaces, with a quantitative spectral gap bound; as consequences we obtain exponential decay of correlations with explicit rate, the central limit theorem for Hölder observables via the Nagaev-Guivarc'h spectral perturbation method, real-analyticity of the pressure in the potential direction, and meromorphic continuation of the Ruelle dynamical zeta function. The third constructs SRB measures on mixing basic sets as the unique equilibrium states for the geometric potential given by minus the logarithm of the unstable Jacobian, proves absolute continuity of the unstable foliation, and derives an explicit product-formula for the conditional densities along unstable manifolds. The fourth establishes the Pesin entropy formula identifying the Kolmogorov-Sinai entropy of the SRB measure with the sum of its positive Lyapunov exponents. The Gibbs Equivalence Theorem, assembling the symbolic, variational, spectral, and geometric characterizations of the equilibrium state on a mixing basic set into a single quantitative statement, follows from these four Main Theorems together with the imported results of Parts I and III. This paper constitutes Part IV of a six-part series on the thermodynamic formalism for hyperbolic dynamical systems.

ai.tldr: 本文为Axiom A微分同胚建立了Ruelle转移算子理论，构造了Sinai-Ruelle-Bowen测度，并证明了四个主要定理：结构稳定性、转移算子的拟紧性、SRB测度的构造与性质、以及Pesin熵公式。
ai.motivation: 将符号动力学的谱结果通过Markov分割编码转移到光滑动力学中，建立Axiom A系统的定量热力学形式体系。
ai.method: 利用Markov分割编码，将符号系统的谱结果（第一部分）与几何构造（第三部分）结合，在Hölder空间上分析Ruelle转移算子，证明拟紧性和谱间隙。
ai.result: 证明了结构稳定性（含显式Hölder指数）、转移算子的拟紧性与谱间隙、SRB测度作为几何势的平衡态、不稳定叶层的绝对连续性、以及Pesin熵公式。
ai.help_to_user: 为双曲动力系统提供了完整的定量热力学形式体系，将符号、变分、谱和几何特征统一于Gibbs等价定理。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号系统的谱分析通过Markov分割“拉回”到光滑系统，实现符号与几何动力学的桥梁。
idea_spark.risk: 方法严重依赖Axiom A和强横截条件，对部分双曲系统可能需调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 热力学形式体系中不同特征（变分、谱、几何）的等价性框架，可尝试推广到非均匀双曲或随机系统。

en.tldr: This paper develops Ruelle transfer operator theory for Axiom A diffeomorphisms, constructs Sinai-Ruelle-Bowen measures, and proves four main theorems: structural stability, quasi-compactness of the transfer operator, construction and properties of SRB measures, and the Pesin entropy formula.
en.motivation: To transfer symbolic spectral results to smooth dynamics via Markov partition coding, establishing a quantitative thermodynamic formalism for Axiom A systems.
en.method: Using Markov partition coding to combine symbolic spectral results (Part I) with geometric constructions (Part III), analyzing the Ruelle transfer operator on Hölder spaces to prove quasi-compactness and spectral gap.
en.result: Proved structural stability (with explicit Hölder exponent), quasi-compactness and spectral gap of the transfer operator, SRB measures as equilibrium states for the geometric potential, absolute continuity of unstable foliation, and the Pesin entropy formula.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete quantitative thermodynamic formalism for hyperbolic dynamical systems, unifying symbolic, variational, spectral, and geometric characterizations in the Gibbs Equivalence Theorem.

idea_spark.idea: ‘Pull back’ spectral analysis from symbolic systems to smooth systems via Markov partitions, building a bridge between symbolic and geometric dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: The approach heavily relies on Axiom A and strong transversality conditions; adjustments may be needed for partially hyperbolic systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The equivalence framework among different characterizations (variational, spectral, geometric) in thermodynamic formalism could be extended to non-uniformly hyperbolic or random systems.

papers.title: Painlevé Asymptotics of the Focusing Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation with a Finite-Genus Algebro-Geometric Background
papers.summary: We investigate the Cauchy problem for the focusing nonlinear Schrödinger (NLS) equation \begin{equation}   iq_t(x,t)+q_{xx}(x,t)+2|q(x,t)|^2q(x,t)=0,\quad x\in\mathbb{R},\quad t\ge0,\nonumber \end{equation} subject to initial data $ q(x,0)$ satisfying the asymptotic boundary conditions \begin{equation}\label{eq:boundary} q(x,0) \sim q^{alg}(x,0) \quad \text{as} \quad x \to \pm\infty,\nonumber \end{equation} where $q^{alg}(x,t)$ denote finite-genus algebro-geometric quasi-periodic solutions of the focusing NLS equation. Employing the Riemann--Hilbert (RH) approach combined with the Deift--Zhou nonlinear steepest descent method, we analyze the long-time asymptotic behavior of solutions to this Cauchy problem. Our analysis distinguishes between two cases based on the genus $n$ of the underlying hyperelliptic Riemann surface:   (i) Odd genus backgrounds: When the background solutions $q^{alg}(x,0)$ correspond to hyperelliptic curves of odd genus $n = 2s+1$ $(s \in \mathbb{N}_0)$, we identify distinct asymptotic regions in the $(x,t)$-plane characterized by the variable $ξ= x/t$, within which the leading-order asymptotics is expressed in terms of the second Painlevé transcendent.   (ii)Even genus backgrounds: When the background solutions $q^{alg}(x,0)$ correspond to hyperelliptic curves of even genus $n = 2s$ $(s \in \mathbb{N})$, the asymptotic behavior in regions selected by $ξ$ is described in terms of parabolic cylinder functions.   Specifically, we derive the leading-order asymptotics and establish explicit error bounds for the solution $q(x,t)$ as $t \to +\infty$, uniformly for $x \in \mathbb{R}$.

ai.tldr: 研究具有有限亏格代数几何背景的聚焦非线性薛定谔方程柯西问题的长时间渐近行为，区分奇偶亏格背景，分别得到Painlevé II超越函数和抛物柱函数的渐近表达式。
ai.motivation: 具有代数几何拟周期背景的聚焦NLS方程在数学物理中具有基础重要性，其长时间渐近行为尚未完全理解，特别是不同亏格背景下的渐近形式差异。
ai.method: 采用Riemann–Hilbert方法结合Deift–Zhou非线性最速下降法，基于变量ξ=x/t划分渐近区域，针对奇偶亏格超椭圆黎曼曲面分别分析。
ai.result: 奇亏格背景的渐近主导项由第二类Painlevé超越函数描述；偶亏格背景由抛物柱函数描述；建立了均匀误差估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为具有代数几何背景的可积系统渐近分析提供了严格框架，展示了亏格奇偶性如何决定渐近形式。

idea_spark.idea: 将奇偶亏格分类与渐近形式关联，建立代数几何结构与渐近分析之间的对应关系。
idea_spark.risk: 方法高度依赖代数几何构造，对更一般的非代数几何背景可能不适用；误差估计的严格证明技术性强。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索更高维可积系统或带扰动的代数几何背景的渐近行为；考虑不同边界条件下的渐近形式变化。

en.tldr: Investigates long-time asymptotics for the focusing NLS equation with finite-genus algebro-geometric background, distinguishing odd/even genus cases to obtain Painlevé II and parabolic cylinder asymptotics respectively.
en.motivation: The focusing NLS equation with algebro-geometric quasi-periodic backgrounds is fundamental in mathematical physics, yet its long-time asymptotic behavior, particularly the distinction based on genus parity, remains incompletely understood.
en.method: Employs the Riemann–Hilbert approach combined with the Deift–Zhou nonlinear steepest descent method, analyzing asymptotic regions defined by ξ=x/t for odd/even genus hyperelliptic Riemann surfaces.
en.result: Leading-order asymptotics described by the second Painlevé transcendent for odd genus backgrounds and by parabolic cylinder functions for even genus backgrounds, with uniform error bounds established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous framework for asymptotic analysis of integrable systems with algebro-geometric backgrounds, demonstrating how genus parity determines asymptotic forms.

idea_spark.idea: Correlate genus parity with asymptotic forms, establishing correspondence between algebraic geometry structure and asymptotic analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Methods heavily rely on algebro-geometric constructions, potentially inapplicable to more general non-algebraic backgrounds; rigorous error estimation is technically demanding.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore asymptotics for higher-dimensional integrable systems or perturbed algebro-geometric backgrounds; consider asymptotic form variations under different boundary conditions.

papers.title: Shock wavefronts for parabolic equations with sign-changing diffusivity
papers.summary: We consider a reaction-diffusion equation in a one-dimensional space, where the diffusion coefficient changes sign from positive to negative and back to positive. The reaction term is bistable, with its interior zero located in the region where the diffusivity is negative. The model does not admit continuous wavefronts, i.e., continuous traveling waves that connect the steady states $0$ and $1$. We prove the existence of a family of shock wavefronts, that is, wavefronts with profiles exhibiting a jump discontinuity. We investigate the properties of these profiles and their propagation speeds. Finally, we apply the results to a recently proposed model describing the movement of a population composed of both isolated and grouped individuals.

ai.tldr: 研究一维反应扩散方程，其扩散系数符号变化（正-负-正），反应项为双稳态。模型不存在连续行波，但证明存在一族具有跳跃间断性的激波波前，并分析了其性质和传播速度。
ai.motivation: 扩散系数符号变化的反应扩散方程无法产生连续行波，需要探索是否存在其他类型的波传播解，如具有间断性的激波波前。
ai.method: 在一维空间中，考虑扩散系数符号变化（正-负-正）且反应项为双稳态的方程。证明不存在连续行波，转而构造并分析具有跳跃间断性的激波波前解族。
ai.result: 证明了激波波前解族的存在性，研究了其剖面性质和传播速度，并将结果应用于描述孤立与群集个体混合种群运动的模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为扩散系数符号变化的非标准反应扩散方程提供了激波波前解的理论框架，扩展了波传播解的类型。

idea_spark.idea: 探索扩散系数在空间不同区域符号变化如何影响生物种群前沿的传播模式与稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果高度依赖于特定的扩散系数符号变化模式和反应项结构，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 间断性波前可能对应于现实系统中状态的急剧转变，如生物入侵前沿或相变界面。

en.tldr: Studies a 1D reaction-diffusion equation with sign-changing diffusivity (positive-negative-positive) and a bistable reaction term. The model admits no continuous traveling waves, but proves the existence of a family of shock wavefronts with jump discontinuities, analyzing their properties and propagation speeds.
en.motivation: Reaction-diffusion equations with sign-changing diffusivity do not support continuous traveling waves, necessitating exploration of alternative wave-like solutions such as shock wavefronts with discontinuities.
en.method: Considers an equation in one-dimensional space with diffusivity changing sign (positive-negative-positive) and a bistable reaction term. Proves non-existence of continuous traveling waves and instead constructs and analyzes a family of shock wavefront solutions with jump discontinuities.
en.result: Establishes existence of a family of shock wavefronts, investigates their profile properties and propagation speeds, and applies the results to a recently proposed model for movement of a population comprising both isolated and grouped individuals.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for shock wavefront solutions in non-standard reaction-diffusion equations with sign-changing diffusivity, extending the types of wave propagation solutions.

idea_spark.idea: Explore how diffusivity changing sign across spatial regions influences propagation patterns and stability of biological population fronts.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results are highly dependent on the specific pattern of sign changes in diffusivity and reaction term structure; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Discontinuous wavefronts may correspond to sharp transitions in real systems, such as biological invasion fronts or phase transition interfaces.

papers.title: It's all in your head -- fine-tuning arguments do not require aleatoric uncertainty
papers.summary: Prompted by misconceptions in the recent literature, we review the justifications for naturalness arguments and Occam's razor found in Bayesian statistics. We discuss the automatic Occam's razor that emerges in Bayesian formalism, bringing together points of view from diverse fields, including statistics, social sciences, physics and machine learning. In pedagogical calculations, we demonstrate that this automatic razor disfavors unnatural models in which predictions must be fine-tuned to agree with observation.

ai.tldr: 本文澄清了近期文献中对自然性论证和奥卡姆剃刀的误解，回顾了贝叶斯统计中的相关依据，并通过教学计算展示了贝叶斯形式主义中自动出现的奥卡姆剃刀如何惩罚需要精细调参才能与观测相符的非自然模型。
ai.motivation: 针对近期文献中存在的误解，需要澄清自然性论证和奥卡姆剃刀在贝叶斯统计中的正当性基础。
ai.method: 回顾贝叶斯统计中的理论基础，结合统计学、社会科学、物理学和机器学习等多个领域的观点，通过教学计算进行演示。
ai.result: 贝叶斯形式主义中自动产生的奥卡姆剃刀会惩罚那些预测必须经过精细调参才能与观测一致的非自然模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解贝叶斯框架下的模型选择原理提供了清晰的理论解释，特别是关于自然性论证的统计基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将贝叶斯模型证据作为衡量模型自然性的量化工具，避免对精细调参模型的过度偏好。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于贝叶斯先验的选择，不同先验可能导致不同的模型比较结果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在复杂模型设计中考虑自然性约束，避免过度依赖参数调优来拟合数据。

en.tldr: This paper clarifies misconceptions in recent literature regarding naturalness arguments and Occam's razor, reviews their justifications in Bayesian statistics, and demonstrates through pedagogical calculations that the automatic razor emerging in Bayesian formalism disfavors unnatural models requiring fine-tuning to match observations.
en.motivation: To address misconceptions in recent literature and clarify the justifications for naturalness arguments and Occam's razor within Bayesian statistics.
en.method: Review theoretical foundations in Bayesian statistics, integrate perspectives from statistics, social sciences, physics, and machine learning, and illustrate through pedagogical calculations.
en.result: The automatic Occam's razor that emerges in Bayesian formalism penalizes unnatural models whose predictions must be fine-tuned to agree with observations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a clear theoretical explanation of model selection principles in Bayesian frameworks, particularly regarding the statistical basis of naturalness arguments.

idea_spark.idea: Use Bayesian model evidence as a quantitative tool to assess model naturalness, avoiding excessive preference for finely-tuned models.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on the choice of Bayesian priors; different priors may lead to different model comparison outcomes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires consideration of naturalness constraints in complex model design, avoiding over-reliance on parameter tuning for data fitting.

papers.title: Thermal Anomaly Detection using Physics Aware Neuromorphic Networks: Comparison between Raw and L1C Sentinel-2 Data
papers.summary: Damage caused by bushfires and volcanic eruptions escalates rapidly when detection is delayed, making fast and reliable early warning capabilities essential. Recent Earth Observation (EO) approaches have shown that thermal anomaly detection can be performed directly on decompressed Level-0 (L0) sensor data, avoiding computationally expensive preprocessing chains. However, direct exploitation of raw data remains challenging due to domain shift, sensor drift, radiometric inconsistencies, and the scarcity of labelled training samples. To address these challenges, this work proposes a Physics-Aware Neuromorphic Network (PANN) framework for onboard thermal anomaly detection. The proposed lightweight architecture, inspired by physical neural network principles and neuromorphic computing paradigms, is evaluated using two Sentinel-2 datasets: decompressed L0 with additional metadata (i.e. raw) and Level-1C (L1C). The PANN achieves a Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) of $0.809$ on raw measurements, compared to $0.875$ when using ground-processed L1C products. The mean processing latency per L0 granule is $2.44 \pm 0.09~\mathrm{s}$, which is below the Sentinel-2 acquisition time of $3.6~\mathrm{s}$, demonstrating the feasibility of real-time, onboard processing. Furthermore, the projected execution time for the corresponding neuromorphic hardware instantiation is substantially lower at $0.1290 \pm 0.0002~\mathrm{s}$. Memory usage, including all necessary programs and packages, remains within realistic onboard constraints, with requirements of $0.673 \pm 0.007~\mathrm{Gb}$ for the software PANN and $0.393 \pm 0.004~\mathrm{Gb}$ for the estimated hardware realisation. Overall, these results indicate that PANN offers a promising pathway toward low-latency and resource-efficient onboard EO processing for thermal event detection.

ai.tldr: 本研究提出了一种物理感知神经形态网络（PANN）框架，用于星载热异常检测，在原始L0和预处理L1C Sentinel-2数据上进行了评估，实现了低延迟、资源高效的实时处理。
ai.motivation: 山火和火山喷发造成的损害在检测延迟时会迅速升级，因此需要快速可靠的早期预警能力。直接利用原始传感器数据可避免计算昂贵的预处理，但面临域偏移、传感器漂移和标记样本稀缺等挑战。
ai.method: 提出一个受物理神经网络原理和神经形态计算范式启发的轻量级PANN架构，在Sentinel-2的原始L0（带元数据）和地面处理L1C产品两个数据集上进行评估。
ai.result: PANN在原始测量数据上达到马修斯相关系数（MCC）0.809，在L1C数据上达到0.875。每个L0数据块的平均处理延迟为2.44±0.09秒，低于Sentinel-2的3.6秒采集时间，内存使用在现实星载约束内。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种用于星载实时热异常检测的轻量级、物理感知的神经形态网络解决方案，展示了直接处理原始卫星数据的可行性。

idea_spark.idea: 将物理原理（如辐射一致性约束）嵌入神经形态网络架构，以增强模型在原始、未校准数据上的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型性能在原始数据上仍略低于预处理数据，且依赖于特定传感器元数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将类似框架应用于其他星载或无人机载的实时异常检测场景，如洪水监测或冰架破裂。
