en.tldr: ExplainS2A is an explainable spectral-spatial duality model for fast transformation of Sentinel-2 images to AVIRIS-level hyperspectral images.
en.motivation: Multispectral images from mainstream optical satellites have limited material identifiability compared to HSIs, and spectral super-resolution is constrained by the multi-resolution nature of sensors, often producing spatially blurry results.
en.method: Proposes a spectral-spatial duality theory, reformulating spectral super-resolution as a spatial super-resolution problem. The model consists of a deep unfolding network and an explainable fusion network, unifying spectral recovery and spatial fusion.
en.result: Can process a million-scale Sentinel-2 image in less than one second, yielding high-fidelity HSI, upgrading blind source separation results, and demonstrating cross-region and cross-season generalization.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and explainable tool for generating hyperspectral images to facilitate remote material identification, applicable to various sensor pairs.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage inherent HR bands in the acquired MSI to spatially guide the reconstruction procedure, overcoming blurriness caused by LR bands.
idea_spark.risk: Depends on sensor band configuration; requires the presence of HR bands suitable for spatial guidance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulating a complex problem as an equivalent problem with established solutions is a key algorithmic design strategy.

papers.title: Multi-Domain Learning with Global Expert Mapping
papers.summary: Human perception generalizes well across different domains, but most vision models struggle beyond their training data. This gap motivates multi-dataset learning, where a single model is trained on diverse datasets to improve robustness under domain shifts. However, unified training remains challenging due to inconsistencies in data distributions and label semantics. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models provide a scalable solution by routing inputs to specialized subnetworks (experts). Yet, existing MoEs often fail to specialize effectively, as their load-balancing mechanisms enforce uniform input distribution across experts. This fairness conflicts with domain-aware routing, causing experts to learn redundant representations, and reducing performance especially on rare or out-of-distribution domains. We propose GEM (Global Expert Mapping), a planner-compiler framework that replaces the learned router with a global scheduler. Our planner, based on linear programming relaxation, computes a fractional assignment of datasets to experts, while the compiler applies hierarchical rounding to convert this soft plan into a deterministic, capacity-aware mapping. Unlike prior MoEs, GEM avoids balancing loss, resolves the conflict between fairness and specialization, and produces interpretable routing. Experiments show that GEM-DINO achieves state-of-the-art performance on the UODB benchmark, with notable gains on underrepresented datasets and solves task interference in few-shot adaptation scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出GEM框架，通过全局调度器替代学习型路由器，解决MoE模型中负载均衡与领域专业化之间的冲突，提升多数据集学习性能。
ai.motivation: 人类感知能很好泛化到不同领域，但大多数视觉模型难以超越其训练数据。多数据集学习旨在提升模型在领域偏移下的鲁棒性，但数据分布和标签语义的不一致性带来挑战。现有MoE模型因负载均衡机制强制专家均匀处理输入，导致专家学习冗余表示，尤其在稀有或分布外领域上性能下降。
ai.method: GEM采用规划器-编译器框架。规划器基于线性规划松弛，计算数据集到专家的分数分配；编译器应用分层舍入，将软计划转换为确定性的、容量感知的映射。该框架避免了平衡损失，解决了公平性与专业化之间的冲突。
ai.result: GEM-DINO在UODB基准测试中达到最先进性能，在代表性不足的数据集上获得显著提升，并解决了少样本适应场景中的任务干扰问题。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要构建跨领域鲁棒视觉模型的研究者提供了一个可解释的、避免负载均衡冲突的专家路由框架。

idea_spark.idea: 用离线计算的全局分配替代在线学习的路由器，将负载平衡约束从训练目标中解耦。
idea_spark.risk: 规划器依赖于对数据集特征的先验分析，可能对动态或流式数据适应性不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将负载均衡视为一个资源分配优化问题，而非训练约束，为模块化网络设计提供了新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 用离线计算的全局分配替代在线学习的路由器，将负载平衡约束从训练目标中解耦。
idea_spark.risk: 规划器依赖于对数据集特征的先验分析，可能对动态或流式数据适应性不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将负载均衡视为一个资源分配优化问题，而非训练约束，为模块化网络设计提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes GEM, a planner-compiler framework that replaces learned routers with a global scheduler to resolve the conflict between load balancing and domain specialization in MoE models, improving multi-dataset learning performance.
en.motivation: Human perception generalizes well across domains, but most vision models struggle beyond their training data. Multi-dataset learning aims to improve robustness under domain shifts, but inconsistencies in data distributions and label semantics pose challenges. Existing MoE models enforce uniform input distribution across experts via load-balancing mechanisms, causing experts to learn redundant representations and reducing performance, especially on rare or out-of-distribution domains.
en.method: GEM employs a planner-compiler framework. The planner, based on linear programming relaxation, computes a fractional assignment of datasets to experts. The compiler applies hierarchical rounding to convert this soft plan into a deterministic, capacity-aware mapping. This framework avoids balancing loss and resolves the fairness-vs-specialization conflict.
en.result: GEM-DINO achieves state-of-the-art performance on the UODB benchmark, with notable gains on underrepresented datasets and solves task interference in few-shot adaptation scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable expert routing framework that avoids load-balancing conflicts for researchers building cross-domain robust vision models.

idea_spark.idea: Replace online learned routers with offline-computed global assignments, decoupling load-balancing constraints from training objectives.
idea_spark.risk: The planner relies on prior analysis of dataset characteristics, which may not adapt well to dynamic or streaming data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating load balancing as a resource allocation optimization problem rather than a training constraint offers a new perspective for modular network design.

papers.title: Silicon Aware Neural Networks
papers.summary: Recent work in the machine learning literature has demonstrated that deep learning can train neural networks made of discrete logic gate functions to perform simple image classification tasks at very high speeds on CPU, GPU and FPGA platforms. By virtue of being formed by discrete logic gates, these Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (DLGNs) lend themselves naturally to implementation in custom silicon - in this work we present a method to map DLGNs in a one-to-one fashion to a digital CMOS standard cell library by converting the trained model to a gate-level netlist. We also propose a novel loss function whereby the DLGN can optimize the area, and indirectly power consumption, of the resulting circuit by minimizing the expected area per neuron based on the area of the standard cells in the target standard cell library. Finally, we also show for the first time an implementation of a DLGN as a silicon circuit in simulation, performing layout of a DLGN in the SkyWater 130nm process as a custom hard macro using a Cadence standard cell library and performing post-layout power analysis. We find that our custom macro can perform classification on MNIST with 97% accuracy 41.8 million times a second at a power consumption of 83.88 mW.

ai.tldr: 提出一种将可微分逻辑门网络（DLGN）一对一映射到数字CMOS标准单元库的方法，通过新型损失函数优化电路面积与功耗，并在130nm工艺中实现硅级仿真验证。
ai.motivation: 现有基于离散逻辑门的神经网络可在CPU/GPU/FPGA上高速运行，但缺乏直接面向定制硅片实现的系统化方法。
ai.method: 将训练后的DLGN转换为门级网表，提出基于标准单元面积期望的损失函数优化电路面积，使用Cadence库在SkyWater 130nm工艺进行布局与后仿真。
ai.result: 实现的定制宏电路在MNIST分类任务中达到97%准确率，每秒处理4180万次分类，功耗83.88mW。
ai.help_to_user: 为机器学习硬件化提供了从算法到硅片电路的完整设计流程，特别适用于低功耗边缘计算场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将神经网络训练与物理设计库直接耦合，实现算法-硬件协同优化。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定工艺的标准单元库，跨工艺迁移需重新建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索多目标优化（面积/功耗/速度权衡）或面向新兴器件（存算一体）的映射方案。

idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定工艺的标准单元库，跨工艺迁移需重新建模。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索多目标优化（面积/功耗/速度权衡）或面向新兴器件（存算一体）的映射方案。

en.tldr: Proposes a one-to-one mapping method for Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (DLGNs) to digital CMOS standard cell libraries, introduces a loss function for area/power optimization, and demonstrates silicon-level simulation in 130nm process.
en.motivation: Existing discrete logic gate-based neural networks achieve high speed on CPUs/GPUs/FPGAs but lack systematic methods for direct custom silicon implementation.
en.method: Convert trained DLGNs to gate-level netlists, propose a loss function minimizing expected area per neuron based on standard cell libraries, and perform layout/post-layout analysis using Cadence tools in SkyWater 130nm process.
en.result: The custom macro achieves 97% accuracy on MNIST at 41.8 million classifications per second with 83.88 mW power consumption.
en.help_to_user: Provides an end-to-end design flow from algorithm to silicon for machine learning hardware, particularly suitable for low-power edge computing.

idea_spark.idea: Couple neural network training directly with physical design libraries for algorithm-hardware co-optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Method depends on specific process standard cell libraries; cross-process migration requires re-modeling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore multi-objective optimization (area/power/speed trade-offs) or mapping schemes for emerging devices (e.g., in-memory computing).

papers.title: Attend what matters: Leveraging vision foundational models for breast cancer classification using mammograms
papers.summary: Vision Transformers $(\texttt{ViT})$ have become the architecture of choice for many computer vision tasks, yet their performance in computer-aided diagnostics remains limited. Focusing on breast cancer detection from mammograms, we identify two main causes for this shortfall. First, medical images are high-resolution with small abnormalities, leading to an excessive number of tokens and making it difficult for the softmax-based attention to localize and attend to relevant regions. Second, medical image classification is inherently fine-grained, with low inter-class and high intra-class variability, where standard cross-entropy training is insufficient. To overcome these challenges, we propose a framework with three key components: (1) Region of interest $(\texttt{RoI})$ based token reduction using an object detection model to guide attention; (2) contrastive learning between selected $\texttt{RoI}$ to enhance fine-grained discrimination through hard-negative based training; and (3) a $\texttt{DINOv2}$ pretrained $\texttt{ViT}$ that captures localization-aware, fine-grained features instead of global $\texttt{CLIP}$ representations. Experiments on public mammography datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over existing baselines, establishing its effectiveness and potential clinical utility for large-scale breast cancer screening. Our code is available for reproducibility here: https://aih-iitd.github.io/publications/attend-what-matters

ai.tldr: 针对乳腺钼靶X光片分类，提出一个结合ROI引导的token缩减、对比学习和DINOv2预训练ViT的框架，解决了ViT在医学图像中因高分辨率和小病灶导致的注意力分散问题。
ai.motivation: Vision Transformers在计算机辅助诊断中表现受限，主要因为医学图像分辨率高、病灶小导致token过多，以及医学图像分类固有的细粒度特性使标准交叉熵训练不足。
ai.method: 1) 使用目标检测模型进行基于ROI的token缩减以引导注意力；2) 通过基于难负样本的对比学习增强细粒度判别能力；3) 采用DINOv2预训练的ViT替代CLIP，以捕获局部感知的细粒度特征。
ai.result: 在公共乳腺钼靶数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有基线，证明了其在大规模乳腺癌筛查中的有效性和潜在临床实用性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理高分辨率医学图像中的小目标分类问题提供了可复现的框架，特别适用于需要细粒度判别的医疗影像分析任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将目标检测的定位能力与Transformer的全局建模结合，通过显式引导注意力到关键区域来提升小目标分类性能。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖目标检测模型的准确性，若ROI提取失败可能影响后续分类；对比学习对负样本质量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将定位感知的预训练策略（如DINOv2）与任务特定的注意力引导相结合，以平衡全局上下文和局部细节。

idea_spark.idea: 将目标检测的定位能力与Transformer的全局建模结合，通过显式引导注意力到关键区域来提升小目标分类性能。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖目标检测模型的准确性，若ROI提取失败可能影响后续分类；对比学习对负样本质量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将定位感知的预训练策略（如DINOv2）与任务特定的注意力引导相结合，以平衡全局上下文和局部细节。

en.tldr: Proposes a framework for mammogram classification combining ROI-guided token reduction, contrastive learning, and DINOv2-pretrained ViT to address ViT's attention dispersion in medical images due to high resolution and small abnormalities.
en.motivation: Vision Transformers underperform in computer-aided diagnostics because medical images are high-resolution with small abnormalities (leading to excessive tokens) and medical classification is fine-grained with low inter-class/high intra-class variability.
en.method: 1) ROI-based token reduction using an object detection model to guide attention; 2) contrastive learning between selected ROIs with hard-negative training for fine-grained discrimination; 3) DINOv2-pretrained ViT to capture localization-aware fine-grained features instead of global CLIP representations.
en.result: Experiments on public mammography datasets show superior performance over existing baselines, demonstrating effectiveness and potential clinical utility for large-scale breast cancer screening.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reproducible framework for small-target classification in high-resolution medical images, particularly suitable for fine-grained medical image analysis tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine object detection's localization capability with Transformer's global modeling by explicitly guiding attention to critical regions to improve small-target classification performance.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on object detection model accuracy; failed ROI extraction may degrade classification. Contrastive learning is sensitive to negative sample quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining localization-aware pretraining (e.g., DINOv2) with task-specific attention guidance to balance global context and local details.

papers.title: GRASPrune: Global Gating for Budgeted Structured Pruning of Large Language Models
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are expensive to serve because model parameters, attention computation, and KV caches impose substantial memory and latency costs. We present GRASPrune, a structured pruning framework applied after pretraining that jointly prunes FFN channels and KV head groups under a single global budget. Instead of learning importance scores without constraints and applying the budget only after training, GRASPrune learns lightweight gate scores with a projected straight-through estimator that enforces a hard mask satisfying the budget at every step while keeping the backbone weights frozen. After the mask is fixed, we calibrate scaling factors on the retained units to mitigate scale mismatch caused by pruning, and fold these factors into the pruned weights to obtain a smaller dense checkpoint with no extra parameters at inference. On LLaMA-2-7B, GRASPrune removes 50% of parameters and achieves 12.18 perplexity on WikiText-2 while maintaining competitive average zero-shot accuracy on five benchmarks, using four epochs on 512 unlabeled calibration sequences on a single NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU without any full model fine-tuning.

ai.tldr: GRASPrune是一种后预训练结构化剪枝框架，通过全局门控机制联合剪枝FFN通道和KV头组，在满足预算约束的同时保持模型性能。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型推理时参数、注意力计算和KV缓存带来高昂的内存和延迟成本，需要高效的压缩方法。
ai.method: 使用投影直通估计器学习轻量级门控分数，强制每一步都满足硬掩码预算约束，保持主干权重冻结；剪枝后校准保留单元的缩放因子并折叠到权重中，获得无需推理额外参数的小型密集检查点。
ai.result: 在LLaMA-2-7B上剪除50%参数，WikiText-2困惑度达12.18，在五个基准测试上保持竞争力的平均零样本准确率，仅使用512条未标注校准序列在单A100 GPU上训练四个epoch，无需全模型微调。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种预算约束下的结构化剪枝方案，可在有限计算资源下实现LLM的高效压缩部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将缩放因子折叠到剪枝后权重中，消除推理时额外参数开销。
idea_spark.risk: 剪枝可能影响模型在特定任务上的泛化能力，需谨慎选择校准数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 硬预算约束的端到端学习框架可推广到多模态模型或动态计算分配场景。

en.tldr: GRASPrune is a post-pretraining structured pruning framework that jointly prunes FFN channels and KV head groups via global gating under a budget constraint while maintaining model performance.
en.motivation: Large language models incur high memory and latency costs during inference due to parameters, attention computation, and KV caches, necessitating efficient compression methods.
en.method: Uses a projected straight-through estimator to learn lightweight gate scores, enforcing a hard mask satisfying the budget at every step while keeping backbone weights frozen; after pruning, calibrates scaling factors on retained units and folds them into weights to obtain a smaller dense checkpoint with no extra inference parameters.
en.result: Removes 50% of parameters from LLaMA-2-7B, achieves 12.18 perplexity on WikiText-2 while maintaining competitive average zero-shot accuracy on five benchmarks, using only 512 unlabeled calibration sequences trained for four epochs on a single A100 GPU without full model fine-tuning.
en.help_to_user: Provides a budget-constrained structured pruning solution for efficient LLM compression and deployment with limited computational resources.

idea_spark.idea: Folding scaling factors into pruned weights eliminates additional parameter overhead during inference.
idea_spark.risk: Pruning may affect model generalization on specific tasks; calibration data selection requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: End-to-end learning framework with hard budget constraints could be extended to multimodal models or dynamic computation allocation scenarios.

papers.title: GOLD-BEV: GrOund and aeriaL Data for Dense Semantic BEV Mapping of Dynamic Scenes
papers.summary: Understanding road scenes in a geometrically consistent, scene-centric representation is crucial for planning and mapping. We present GOLD-BEV, a framework that learns dense bird's-eye-view (BEV) semantic environment maps-including dynamic agents-from ego-centric sensors, using time-synchronized aerial imagery as supervision only during training. BEV-aligned aerial crops provide an intuitive target space, enabling dense semantic annotation with minimal manual effort and avoiding the ambiguity of ego-only BEV labeling. Crucially, strict aerial-ground synchronization allows overhead observations to supervise moving traffic participants and mitigates the temporal inconsistencies inherent to non-synchronized overhead sources. To obtain scalable dense targets, we generate BEV pseudo-labels using domain-adapted aerial teachers, and jointly train BEV segmentation with optional pseudo-aerial BEV reconstruction for interpretability. Finally, we extend beyond aerial coverage by learning to synthesize pseudo-aerial BEV images from ego sensors, which support lightweight human annotation and uncertainty-aware pseudo-labeling on unlabeled drives.

ai.tldr: GOLD-BEV是一个从车载传感器学习密集鸟瞰图语义环境地图的框架，利用时间同步的航拍图像作为训练监督，可生成动态场景的密集语义地图。
ai.motivation: 从几何一致、以场景为中心的表示中理解道路场景对于规划和地图绘制至关重要。传统仅使用车载传感器的BEV标注存在模糊性和时间不一致问题。
ai.method: 使用时间同步的航拍图像作为训练监督，通过BEV对齐的航拍裁剪提供密集语义标注目标。采用领域适应的航拍教师模型生成BEV伪标签，并联合训练BEV分割与可选的伪航拍BEV重建。还学习从车载传感器合成伪航拍BEV图像。
ai.result: 该方法能够从车载传感器学习密集的BEV语义环境地图，包括动态交通参与者，避免了非同步航拍源的时间不一致问题，并支持在无标注驾驶数据上进行轻量级人工标注和不确定性感知的伪标注。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶领域的研究者提供了从车载传感器学习密集BEV语义地图的新框架，特别是解决了动态场景标注和时间同步的挑战。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将时间同步的航拍监督思路应用于其他多模态感知任务？如使用无人机视频监督地面机器人感知。
idea_spark.risk: 严重依赖航拍数据的质量和同步精度；合成伪航拍BEV的图像质量可能限制下游任务性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 多模态数据的时间同步是关键监督信号；合成数据可以扩展有限标注数据的覆盖范围。

en.tldr: GOLD-BEV is a framework that learns dense bird's-eye-view semantic environment maps from ego-centric sensors, using time-synchronized aerial imagery as training supervision to generate dense semantic maps of dynamic scenes.
en.motivation: Understanding road scenes in a geometrically consistent, scene-centric representation is crucial for planning and mapping. Traditional ego-only BEV labeling suffers from ambiguity and temporal inconsistencies.
en.method: Uses time-synchronized aerial imagery as training supervision, providing dense semantic annotation targets through BEV-aligned aerial crops. Employs domain-adapted aerial teacher models to generate BEV pseudo-labels and jointly trains BEV segmentation with optional pseudo-aerial BEV reconstruction. Also learns to synthesize pseudo-aerial BEV images from ego sensors.
en.result: The method learns dense BEV semantic environment maps from ego-centric sensors, including dynamic traffic participants, mitigates temporal inconsistencies inherent to non-synchronized overhead sources, and supports lightweight human annotation and uncertainty-aware pseudo-labeling on unlabeled drives.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers in autonomous driving with a new framework for learning dense BEV semantic maps from ego-centric sensors, particularly addressing challenges in dynamic scene annotation and temporal synchronization.

idea_spark.idea: Could the time-synchronized aerial supervision approach be applied to other multimodal perception tasks? Such as using drone videos to supervise ground robot perception.
idea_spark.risk: Heavy reliance on aerial data quality and synchronization accuracy; synthesized pseudo-aerial BEV image quality may limit downstream task performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Temporal synchronization of multimodal data is a key supervisory signal; synthetic data can extend the coverage of limited annotated data.

papers.title: Air-Know: Arbiter-Calibrated Knowledge-Internalizing Robust Network for Composed Image Retrieval
papers.summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) has attracted significant attention due to its flexible multimodal query method, yet its development is severely constrained by the Noisy Triplet Correspondence (NTC) problem. Most existing robust learning methods rely on the "small loss hypothesis", but the unique semantic ambiguity in NTC, such as "partial matching", invalidates this assumption, leading to unreliable noise identification. This entraps the model in a self dependent vicious cycle where the learner is intertwined with the arbiter, ultimately causing catastrophic "representation pollution". To address this critical challenge, we propose a novel "Expert-Proxy-Diversion" decoupling paradigm, named Air-Know (ArbIteR calibrated Knowledge iNternalizing rObust netWork). Air-Know incorporates three core modules: (1) External Prior Arbitration (EPA), which utilizes Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) as an offline expert to construct a high precision anchor dataset; (2) Expert Knowledge Internalization (EKI), which efficiently guides a lightweight proxy "arbiter" to internalize the expert's discriminative logic; (3) Dual Stream Reconciliation (DSR), which leverages the EKI's matching confidence to divert the training data, achieving a clean alignment stream and a representation feedback reconciliation stream. Extensive experiments on multiple CIR benchmark datasets demonstrate that Air-Know significantly outperforms existing SOTA methods under the NTC setting, while also showing strong competitiveness in traditional CIR.

ai.tldr: Air-Know提出一种专家-代理-分流解耦范式，通过外部先验仲裁、专家知识内化和双流协调，解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题，显著提升检索性能。
ai.motivation: 组合图像检索因灵活的跨模态查询受到关注，但其发展受噪声三元组对应问题严重制约。现有鲁棒学习方法依赖的“小损失假设”在NTC的语义模糊场景下失效，导致模型陷入表示污染的恶性循环。
ai.method: 提出Air-Know框架，包含三个核心模块：1) 外部先验仲裁：利用多模态大语言模型作为离线专家构建高精度锚点数据集；2) 专家知识内化：引导轻量级代理仲裁器内化专家的判别逻辑；3) 双流协调：利用匹配置信度分流训练数据，实现干净对齐流和表示反馈协调流。
ai.result: 在多个CIR基准数据集上的实验表明，Air-Know在NTC设置下显著优于现有SOTA方法，同时在传统CIR任务中也表现出强大竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理组合图像检索中的噪声标注问题提供了可解释的专家知识内化与数据分流框架，提升了模型在语义模糊场景下的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用离线大模型作为“锚点专家”指导轻量代理学习，再通过置信度分流实现训练过程的自清洁。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖外部大模型的标注质量与计算开销；双流协调可能引入训练复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将噪声处理从“识别-修正”提升为“知识内化-结构分流”，为弱监督多模态学习提供了新视角。

zh.tldr: Air-Know提出一种专家-代理-分流解耦范式，通过外部先验仲裁、专家知识内化和双流协调，解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题，显著提升检索性能。

zh.method: 提出Air-Know框架，包含三个核心模块：1) 外部先验仲裁：利用多模态大语言模型作为离线专家构建高精度锚点数据集；2) 专家知识内化：引导轻量级代理仲裁器内化专家的判别逻辑；3) 双流协调：利用匹配置信度分流训练数据，实现干净对齐流和表示反馈协调流。
zh.result: 在多个CIR基准数据集上的实验表明，Air-Know在NTC设置下显著优于现有SOTA方法，同时在传统CIR任务中也表现出强大竞争力。
zh.help_to_user: 为处理组合图像检索中的噪声标注问题提供了可解释的专家知识内化与数据分流框架，提升了模型在语义模糊场景下的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用离线大模型作为“锚点专家”指导轻量代理学习，再通过置信度分流实现训练过程的自清洁。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖外部大模型的标注质量与计算开销；双流协调可能引入训练复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将噪声处理从“识别-修正”提升为“知识内化-结构分流”，为弱监督多模态学习提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Air-Know proposes an Expert-Proxy-Diversion decoupling paradigm to address the Noisy Triplet Correspondence problem in Composed Image Retrieval, significantly improving retrieval performance through external prior arbitration, expert knowledge internalization, and dual-stream reconciliation.
en.motivation: Composed Image Retrieval is constrained by the Noisy Triplet Correspondence problem. Existing robust learning methods relying on the 'small loss hypothesis' fail under NTC's semantic ambiguity, trapping models in a self-dependent cycle of representation pollution.
en.method: The Air-Know framework includes three core modules: 1) External Prior Arbitration: uses MLLMs as offline experts to construct high-precision anchor datasets; 2) Expert Knowledge Internalization: guides a lightweight proxy arbiter to internalize expert discriminative logic; 3) Dual Stream Reconciliation: diverts training data using matching confidence to create clean alignment and representation feedback streams.
en.result: Extensive experiments on multiple CIR benchmarks show Air-Know significantly outperforms SOTA methods under NTC settings while maintaining strong competitiveness in traditional CIR.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable framework for handling noisy annotations in composed image retrieval, enhancing model robustness in semantically ambiguous scenarios through expert knowledge internalization and data diversion.

idea_spark.idea: Use offline large models as 'anchor experts' to guide lightweight proxy learning, then achieve self-cleaning training through confidence-based data diversion.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on external large model annotation quality and computational overhead; dual-stream reconciliation may increase training complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Elevates noise handling from 'identification-correction' to 'knowledge internalization-structural diversion', offering a new perspective for weakly supervised multimodal learning.

papers.title: IonMorphNet: Generalizable Learning of Ion Image Morphologies for Peak Picking in Mass Spectrometry Imaging
papers.summary: Peak picking is a fundamental preprocessing step in Mass Spectrometry Imaging (MSI), where each sample is represented by hundreds to thousands of ion images. Existing approaches require careful dataset-specific hyperparameter tuning, and often fail to generalize across acquisition protocols. We introduce IonMorphNet, a spatial-structure-aware representation model for ion images that enables fully data-driven peak picking without any task-specific supervision. We curate 53 publicly available MSI datasets and define six structural classes capturing representative spatial patterns in ion images to train standard image backbones for structural pattern classification. Once trained, IonMorphNet can assess ion images and perform peak picking without additional hyperparameter tuning. Using a ConvNeXt V2-Tiny backbone, our approach improves peak picking performance by +7 % mSCF1 compared to state-of-the-art methods across multiple datasets. Beyond peak picking, we demonstrate that spatially informed channel reduction enables a 3D CNN for patch-based tumor classification in MSI. This approach matches or exceeds pixel-wise spectral classifiers by up to +7.3 % Balanced Accuracy on three tumor classification tasks, indicating meaningful ion image selection. The source code and model weights are available at https://github.com/CeMOS-IS/IonMorphNet.

ai.tldr: IonMorphNet是一种用于质谱成像中离子图像形态学习的通用表示模型，无需任务特定监督即可实现数据驱动的峰提取。
ai.motivation: 现有质谱成像峰提取方法需要针对不同数据集进行繁琐的超参数调优，且难以跨采集协议泛化。
ai.method: 收集53个公开质谱成像数据集，定义六种离子图像空间结构类别，使用ConvNeXt V2-Tiny骨干网络训练结构模式分类模型。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上峰提取性能比现有方法提升7% mSCF1；在肿瘤分类任务中通过空间感知通道缩减实现3D CNN，平衡准确率最高提升7.3%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供无需超参数调优的通用峰提取方案，并展示空间结构表示在医学图像分析中的迁移价值。

idea_spark.idea: 将离子图像按形态学特征分类，构建通用表示模型替代人工特征工程。
idea_spark.risk: 结构类别定义可能无法覆盖所有生物组织样本的形态变异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 无监督结构学习为多通道成像数据的特征选择提供新思路。

zh.tldr: IonMorphNet是一种用于质谱成像中离子图像形态学习的通用表示模型，无需任务特定监督即可实现数据驱动的峰提取。
zh.motivation: 现有质谱成像峰提取方法需要针对不同数据集进行繁琐的超参数调优，且难以跨采集协议泛化。

zh.result: 在多个数据集上峰提取性能比现有方法提升7% mSCF1；在肿瘤分类任务中通过空间感知通道缩减实现3D CNN，平衡准确率最高提升7.3%。

idea_spark.risk: 结构类别定义可能无法覆盖所有生物组织样本的形态变异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 无监督结构学习为多通道成像数据的特征选择提供新思路。

en.tldr: IonMorphNet is a generalizable representation model for learning ion image morphologies, enabling fully data-driven peak picking in mass spectrometry imaging without task-specific supervision.
en.motivation: Existing peak picking methods in MSI require dataset-specific hyperparameter tuning and often fail to generalize across acquisition protocols.
en.method: Curated 53 public MSI datasets, defined six structural classes of spatial patterns, and trained standard image backbones (ConvNeXt V2-Tiny) for structural pattern classification.
en.result: Improved peak picking by +7% mSCF1 over state-of-the-art methods; spatially informed channel reduction enabled 3D CNN for tumor classification, matching or exceeding spectral classifiers by up to +7.3% Balanced Accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a hyperparameter-free peak picking solution and demonstrates transferability of spatial-structure-aware representations for medical image analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Categorize ion images by morphological features to build general representation models replacing manual feature engineering.
idea_spark.risk: Defined structural classes may not cover all morphological variations in biological tissue samples.
idea_spark.inspiration: Unsupervised structure learning offers new approaches for feature selection in multi-channel imaging data.

papers.title: Reasoning Structure Matters for Safety Alignment of Reasoning Models
papers.summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks but often generate harmful responses to malicious user queries. This paper investigates the underlying cause of these safety risks and shows that the issue lies in the reasoning structure itself. Based on this insight, we claim that effective safety alignment can be achieved by altering the reasoning structure. We propose AltTrain, a simple yet effective post training method that explicitly alters the reasoning structure of LRMs. AltTrain is both practical and generalizable, requiring no complex reinforcement learning (RL) training or reward design, only supervised finetuning (SFT) with a lightweight 1K training examples. Experiments across LRM backbones and model sizes demonstrate strong safety alignment, along with robust generalization across reasoning, QA, summarization, and multilingual setting.

ai.tldr: 本文发现大型推理模型的安全风险源于其推理结构本身，并提出一种通过改变推理结构实现安全对齐的后训练方法AltTrain。
ai.motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂推理任务上表现优异，但面对恶意查询时容易生成有害回复，其根本原因在于推理结构。
ai.method: 提出AltTrain方法，仅需1K轻量级监督微调样本，无需复杂强化学习或奖励设计，通过显式改变模型的推理结构实现安全对齐。
ai.result: 在不同骨干模型和规模上均展现出强大的安全对齐能力，并在推理、问答、摘要和多语言场景中具有稳健的泛化性。
ai.help_to_user: 为提升AI模型的安全性提供了一种简单、通用且高效的结构化解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将安全对齐问题重新定义为推理结构的优化问题，而非单纯的内容过滤。
idea_spark.risk: 过度改变推理结构可能损害模型原有的核心推理能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可启发其他领域（如代码生成、医疗诊断）通过结构调整来约束模型行为边界。

zh.result: 在不同骨干模型和规模上均展现出强大的安全对齐能力，并在推理、问答、摘要和多语言场景中具有稳健的泛化性。
zh.help_to_user: 为提升AI模型的安全性提供了一种简单、通用且高效的结构化解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将安全对齐问题重新定义为推理结构的优化问题，而非单纯的内容过滤。
idea_spark.risk: 过度改变推理结构可能损害模型原有的核心推理能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可启发其他领域（如代码生成、医疗诊断）通过结构调整来约束模型行为边界。

en.tldr: This paper identifies that safety risks in large reasoning models stem from their reasoning structure and proposes AltTrain, a post-training method that achieves safety alignment by altering this structure.
en.motivation: Large reasoning models excel at complex tasks but often generate harmful responses to malicious queries, with the root cause lying in the reasoning structure itself.
en.method: Proposes AltTrain, a method requiring only 1K lightweight supervised fine-tuning examples without complex RL or reward design, explicitly altering the model's reasoning structure for safety alignment.
en.result: Demonstrates strong safety alignment across various backbones and model sizes, with robust generalization to reasoning, QA, summarization, and multilingual settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simple, generalizable, and efficient structural solution for enhancing AI model safety.

idea_spark.idea: Reframe safety alignment as an optimization of reasoning structure rather than pure content filtering.
idea_spark.risk: Excessive alteration of reasoning structure may impair the model's core reasoning capabilities.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach could inspire other domains (e.g., code generation, medical diagnosis) to constrain model behavior through structural adjustments.

papers.title: SAGE: Signal-Amplified Guided Embeddings for LLM-based Vulnerability Detection
papers.summary: Software vulnerabilities are a primary threat to modern infrastructure. While static analysis and Graph Neural Networks have long served as the foundation for vulnerability detection, the emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has introduced a transformative paradigm driven by superior semantic reasoning and cross-environment generalization. However, in the context of LLM-based vulnerability detection, we identify a fundamental bottleneck in these models termed \textbf{Signal Submersion}: a state where features related to vulnerability are activated internally but numerically overwhelmed by dominant functional semantics. To address this, we propose \textbf{SAGE} (\textbf{S}ignal-\textbf{A}mplified \textbf{G}uided \textbf{E}mbeddings), a framework that shifts from passive signal submersion to active signal recovery. SAGE integrates task-conditional Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) to isolate and amplify these faint vulnerability signals. Extensive evaluations on BigVul, PrimeVul, and PreciseBugs demonstrate that SAGE achieves state-of-the-art performance. Notably, SAGE mitigates Signal Submersion by increasing the internal Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) by 12.7$\times$ via sparse manifold projection. This mechanistic intervention enables a 7B model to achieve up to 318\% Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) gains on unseen distributions and a 319\% gain on classic datasets. By maintaining robust performance across 13 programming languages and outperforming 34B baselines, SAGE establishes a more efficient and scalable path to software security than simple parameter scaling.

ai.tldr: SAGE框架通过任务条件稀疏自编码器主动放大LLM内部微弱的漏洞信号，解决信号淹没问题，显著提升跨语言漏洞检测性能。
ai.motivation: 基于大语言模型的漏洞检测存在信号淹没问题，即漏洞相关特征在模型内部被主导的功能语义数值压制，导致检测瓶颈。
ai.method: 提出SAGE框架，集成任务条件稀疏自编码器，通过稀疏流形投影隔离和放大微弱的漏洞信号，将内部信噪比提升12.7倍。
ai.result: 在BigVul等数据集上达到SOTA，7B模型在未见分布上MCC提升318%，在经典数据集上提升319%，支持13种编程语言且性能超越34B基线。
ai.help_to_user: 为基于LLM的软件安全分析提供了一种高效可扩展的信号增强方法，无需单纯依赖参数规模扩展。

idea_spark.idea: 利用任务条件稀疏自编码器主动干预LLM内部表示，实现特定语义信号的定向放大。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏化可能损失部分上下文信息；任务条件设计可能过拟合特定漏洞模式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发从模型内部信号动力学角度诊断和改进LLM的专业任务性能，而非仅依赖外部提示或微调。

zh.tldr: SAGE框架通过任务条件稀疏自编码器主动放大LLM内部微弱的漏洞信号，解决信号淹没问题，显著提升跨语言漏洞检测性能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用任务条件稀疏自编码器主动干预LLM内部表示，实现特定语义信号的定向放大。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏化可能损失部分上下文信息；任务条件设计可能过拟合特定漏洞模式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发从模型内部信号动力学角度诊断和改进LLM的专业任务性能，而非仅依赖外部提示或微调。

en.tldr: The SAGE framework actively amplifies faint vulnerability signals in LLMs via task-conditional sparse autoencoders, mitigating Signal Submersion and significantly improving cross-language vulnerability detection performance.
en.motivation: LLM-based vulnerability detection suffers from Signal Submersion, where vulnerability-related features are activated but numerically overwhelmed by dominant functional semantics, creating a fundamental bottleneck.
en.method: Proposes the SAGE framework integrating task-conditional Sparse Autoencoders to isolate and amplify faint vulnerability signals via sparse manifold projection, increasing internal SNR by 12.7×.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art on BigVul, PrimeVul, and PreciseBugs. A 7B model attains up to 318% MCC gain on unseen distributions and 319% on classic datasets, outperforming 34B baselines across 13 programming languages.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and scalable signal-amplification approach for LLM-based software security analysis, moving beyond simple parameter scaling.

idea_spark.idea: Use task-conditional sparse autoencoders to actively intervene in LLM internal representations for targeted amplification of specific semantic signals.
idea_spark.risk: Sparsification may lose some contextual information; task-conditioning may overfit to specific vulnerability patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires diagnosing and improving LLM performance on specialized tasks from the perspective of internal signal dynamics, beyond mere prompting or fine-tuning.

papers.title: The Flat Critical Branch Between Nariai and Bertotti-Robinson Geometries as a Solution of Cosmological Einstein-Maxwell Theory
papers.summary: We analyze a class of product geometries of the form $\mathbb{R}^{1,1}\times Σ_2$ supported by electric, magnetic, or dyonic flux in the Einstein-Maxwell-$Λ$ theory. These spacetimes belong to a unified family of direct products $(dS_2,\mathbb{R}^{1,1},AdS_2)\times Σ_2$ distinguished solely by the sign of the Lorentzian curvature of the two-dimensional factor. We focus on the critical configuration for which the Lorentzian curvature vanishes. At this balance point between the cosmological curvature and the Maxwell stress, the longitudinal geometry becomes exactly flat while the transverse sphere radius is fixed algebraically by the conserved flux. We refer to this geometry as the critical Maxwell flux string: a homogeneous flux-supported geometry curved only in the transverse directions and invariant along a two-dimensional null worldvolume. It represents the algebraic midpoint interpolating between the Nariai $(dS_2\times S^2)$ and Bertotti-Robinson $(AdS_2\times S^2)$ spacetimes. A qualitative structural change occurs precisely at this midpoint. The spacetime is Petrov type-D with constant scalar curvature invariants, placing it in the degenerate Kundt/CSI class. Because the curvature structure reduces any polynomial rank-two tensor to a linear combination of the metric and the Maxwell stress tensor, the same configuration solves a broad class of algebraic higher-curvature gravity theories. In this sense, the critical flux string and its aligned deformations constitute almost universal solutions.

ai.tldr: 本文在爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦-Λ理论中分析了一类由电、磁或双荷通量支持的乘积几何 ℝ¹,¹×Σ₂，重点关注洛伦兹曲率为零的临界构型，即平坦临界通量弦。
ai.motivation: 研究爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦理论中通量支持的乘积几何，特别是介于Nariai和Bertotti-Robinson时空之间的临界平衡点，以理解其几何结构与普适性。
ai.method: 分析形式为ℝ¹,¹×Σ₂的乘积几何，其中二维因子具有德西特、平坦或反德西特曲率。聚焦于洛伦兹曲率消失的临界点，此时纵向几何完全平坦，横向球面半径由守恒通量代数固定。
ai.result: 发现临界通量弦是Petrov D型、具有常标量曲率不变量的时空，属于退化的Kundt/CSI类。由于其曲率结构将任何二阶多项式张量简化为度规和麦克斯韦应力张量的线性组合，该构型能求解一大类代数高阶曲率引力理论。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为理解爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦理论中通量支持的精确解提供了一个统一框架，揭示了临界平坦分支的几何特性及其在高阶引力理论中的普适性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索该临界通量弦在膜世界模型或全息对偶中的可能应用。
idea_spark.risk: 理论构造高度理想化，需验证其物理可实现性与稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过曲率符号分类统一描述相关几何家族的方法，可用于其他引力或规范理论解的分类学。

idea_spark.inspiration: 通过曲率符号分类统一描述相关几何家族的方法，可用于其他引力或规范理论解的分类学。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes a class of product geometries ℝ¹,¹×Σ₂ supported by electric, magnetic, or dyonic flux in Einstein-Maxwell-Λ theory, focusing on the critical configuration with vanishing Lorentzian curvature, termed the flat critical flux string.
en.motivation: To investigate flux-supported product geometries in Einstein-Maxwell theory, particularly the critical balance point between Nariai and Bertotti-Robinson spacetimes, to understand their geometric structure and universality.
en.method: Analyze product geometries of the form ℝ¹,¹×Σ₂, where the two-dimensional factor has de Sitter, flat, or anti-de Sitter curvature. Focus on the critical point where the Lorentzian curvature vanishes, rendering the longitudinal geometry exactly flat while the transverse sphere radius is algebraically fixed by the conserved flux.
en.result: The critical flux string is a Petrov type-D spacetime with constant scalar curvature invariants, belonging to the degenerate Kundt/CSI class. Due to its curvature structure reducing any rank-two polynomial tensor to a linear combination of the metric and the Maxwell stress tensor, this configuration solves a broad class of algebraic higher-curvature gravity theories.
en.help_to_user: This work provides a unified framework for understanding flux-supported exact solutions in Einstein-Maxwell theory, revealing the geometric properties of the critical flat branch and its universality in higher-curvature gravity.

idea_spark.idea: Explore potential applications of this critical flux string in brane-world models or holographic duality.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical construction is highly idealized; its physical realizability and stability require verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The method of unifying related geometric families via curvature sign classification can be used for taxonomy of solutions in other gravitational or gauge theories.

papers.title: Active Inference-Enabled Agentic Closed-Loop ISAC with Long-Horizon Planning
papers.summary: Wireless agentic systems enable agents to autonomously perceive, reason, and act. However, existing works neglect the tight coupling between sensing and control in closed-loop integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) systems. In this paper, we propose an active inference (AIF)-driven wireless agentic system for closed-loop ISAC, which jointly optimizes control and sensing resource allocation via backward--forward message passing on a factor graph. The AIF agent maintains a generative model as a digital twin by integrating a localization model for uncertainty-aware state inference and a localization channel knowledge map (CKM) for approximating observation quality during planning. Simulation results demonstrate that the AIF-enabled agent adaptively allocates sensing resources based on spatially varying channel conditions, achieving superior balance among tracking accuracy, control effort, and sensing resource consumption over baseline strategies.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动推理的无线智能体系统，用于闭环集成感知与通信，通过因子图上的消息传递联合优化控制与感知资源分配。
ai.motivation: 现有工作忽略了闭环ISAC系统中感知与控制之间的紧密耦合关系。
ai.method: 构建主动推理智能体，维护包含定位模型和信道知识图的生成模型作为数字孪生，在因子图上通过前后向消息传递进行联合优化。
ai.result: 仿真表明，该智能体能根据空间变化的信道条件自适应分配感知资源，在跟踪精度、控制努力和感知资源消耗之间实现优于基线策略的平衡。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要实现感知与控制联合优化的闭环无线自主系统提供了一种基于主动推理的框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将信道知识图集成到数字孪生中，用于规划期间的观测质量近似。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于精确的定位模型和信道知识图构建，实际环境中的模型失配可能影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可扩展至其他需要长期规划与资源动态分配的自主系统场景。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an active inference-driven wireless agentic system for closed-loop ISAC, jointly optimizing control and sensing resource allocation via message passing on a factor graph.
en.motivation: Existing works neglect the tight coupling between sensing and control in closed-loop integrated sensing and communication systems.
en.method: An AIF agent maintains a generative model as a digital twin, integrating a localization model and a localization channel knowledge map, and performs joint optimization via backward-forward message passing on a factor graph.
en.result: Simulations show the AIF-enabled agent adaptively allocates sensing resources based on spatially varying channel conditions, achieving superior balance among tracking accuracy, control effort, and sensing resource consumption over baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides an active inference-based framework for closed-loop wireless autonomous systems requiring joint sensing and control optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Integrating a channel knowledge map into the digital twin for approximating observation quality during planning.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate localization models and CKM construction; model mismatch in real environments may degrade performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach could be extended to other autonomous system scenarios requiring long-horizon planning and dynamic resource allocation.

papers.title: Syntax as a Rosetta Stone: Universal Dependencies for In-Context Coptic Translation
papers.summary: Low-resource machine translation requires methods that differ from those used for high-resource languages. This paper proposes a novel in-context learning approach to support low-resource machine translation of the Coptic language to English, with syntactic augmentation from Universal Dependencies parses of input sentences. Building on existing work using bilingual dictionaries to support inference for vocabulary items, we add several representations of syntactic analyses to our inputs , specifically exploring the inclusion of raw parser outputs, verbalizations of parses in plain English, and targeted instructions of difficult constructions identified in sub-trees and how they can be translated. Our results show that while syntactic information alone is not as useful as dictionary-based glosses, combining retrieved dictionary items with syntactic information achieves significant gains across model sizes, achieving new state-of-the-art translation results for Coptic.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种结合通用依存句法分析和双语词典的上下文学习方法，用于提升科普特语到英语的低资源机器翻译性能。
ai.motivation: 低资源语言的机器翻译需要不同于高资源语言的方法。科普特语作为低资源语言，缺乏大规模平行语料，传统方法效果有限。
ai.method: 在上下文学习中，除了使用双语词典提供词汇释义外，还引入了输入句子的通用依存句法分析信息。具体探索了三种句法表示形式：原始解析器输出、用通俗英语描述的句法结构、以及对翻译困难的子结构进行针对性指令。
ai.result: 实验表明，单独的句法信息不如词典释义有效，但将检索到的词典条目与句法信息结合后，在不同规模的模型上都取得了显著提升，实现了科普特语翻译的最新最优结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为低资源语言翻译提供了一种可借鉴的框架：将结构化语言知识（如句法）与词汇知识（如词典）相结合，通过上下文学习增强模型的理解和生成能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索句法信息的多种自然语言表示形式（如原始输出、通俗描述、针对性指令），研究其对模型理解的不同影响。
idea_spark.risk: 句法解析器在低资源语言上的性能可能受限；不同句法表示形式的生成成本与收益需要权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考如何将不同类型的语言学知识（词汇、句法、语义）更有效地编码为模型可理解的提示，以弥补数据稀缺性。

zh.result: 实验表明，单独的句法信息不如词典释义有效，但将检索到的词典条目与句法信息结合后，在不同规模的模型上都取得了显著提升，实现了科普特语翻译的最新最优结果。
zh.help_to_user: 为低资源语言翻译提供了一种可借鉴的框架：将结构化语言知识（如句法）与词汇知识（如词典）相结合，通过上下文学习增强模型的理解和生成能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索句法信息的多种自然语言表示形式（如原始输出、通俗描述、针对性指令），研究其对模型理解的不同影响。
idea_spark.risk: 句法解析器在低资源语言上的性能可能受限；不同句法表示形式的生成成本与收益需要权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考如何将不同类型的语言学知识（词汇、句法、语义）更有效地编码为模型可理解的提示，以弥补数据稀缺性。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an in-context learning approach that combines Universal Dependencies syntactic parsing with bilingual dictionaries to improve low-resource machine translation from Coptic to English.
en.motivation: Machine translation for low-resource languages requires methods distinct from those used for high-resource languages. Coptic, as a low-resource language, lacks large-scale parallel corpora, limiting the effectiveness of traditional approaches.
en.method: In addition to using bilingual dictionaries to provide lexical glosses, the in-context learning framework incorporates Universal Dependencies parses of input sentences. Three forms of syntactic representation are explored: raw parser outputs, verbalizations of parses in plain English, and targeted instructions for difficult-to-translate constructions identified in sub-trees.
en.result: Results show that syntactic information alone is less useful than dictionary-based glosses, but combining retrieved dictionary items with syntactic information yields significant gains across model sizes, achieving new state-of-the-art translation results for Coptic.
en.help_to_user: Provides a replicable framework for low-resource language translation: integrating structured linguistic knowledge (e.g., syntax) with lexical knowledge (e.g., dictionaries) to enhance model comprehension and generation via in-context learning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore multiple natural language representations of syntactic information (e.g., raw outputs, plain-language descriptions, targeted instructions) and study their differential impacts on model understanding.
idea_spark.risk: Syntactic parser performance may be limited for low-resource languages; the cost-benefit trade-off of generating different syntactic representations needs consideration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking about how to more effectively encode different types of linguistic knowledge (lexical, syntactic, semantic) as model-understandable prompts to compensate for data scarcity.

papers.title: Fuzzy Geometries with an Internal Space
papers.summary: The product of a non-commutative matrix spectral triple with a simple two-dimensional internal space is considered. This is interpreted as a non-commutative spacetime that contains one charged Dirac fermion and its antiparticle. The inner fluctuations of a vacuum Dirac operator are calculated, using the standard technique of Connes' one-forms. This results in the non-commutative analogue of a gauge field, as expected, and also fluctuations of the spacetime geometry. In addition, the fluctuations include a derivative operator that depends on the particle charge. The integral over the fermions in the model is calculated, leading to some novel induced bosonic terms.

ai.tldr: 通过将非交换矩阵谱三元组与二维内空间相乘，构建了一个包含带电狄拉克费米子及其反粒子的非交换时空模型。计算了真空狄拉克算符的内涨落，得到了规范场和时空几何涨落的非交换类比，以及依赖于粒子电荷的导数算符。费米子积分导出了新的诱导玻色项。
ai.motivation: 探索非交换几何框架下时空与内部对称性的统一描述，理解几何涨落与规范场的共同起源。
ai.method: 使用Connes的一形式标准技术，计算非交换矩阵谱三元组与二维内空间乘积模型中真空狄拉克算符的内涨落。
ai.result: 得到了非交换规范场、时空几何涨落以及依赖于电荷的导数算符。费米子路径积分产生了新颖的诱导玻色相互作用项。
ai.help_to_user: 为非交换几何与粒子物理模型的结合提供了具体计算范例，展示了如何从谱三元组导出规范场和几何涨落。

idea_spark.idea: 在更复杂的内部代数或高维谱三元组中重复此计算，探索是否会出现标准模型规范群或引力修正项。
idea_spark.risk: 模型目前较为简单，仅包含一个费米子对，推广到多代费米子或真实粒子谱可能引入复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可能为从纯几何/代数数据推导出粒子物理的相互作用提供一条途径，启发对“几何产生物理”的深入研究。

idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可能为从纯几何/代数数据推导出粒子物理的相互作用提供一条途径，启发对“几何产生物理”的深入研究。

en.tldr: A non-commutative spacetime containing one charged Dirac fermion and its antiparticle is constructed by taking the product of a non-commutative matrix spectral triple with a simple two-dimensional internal space. Inner fluctuations of the vacuum Dirac operator are calculated using Connes' one-forms, yielding the non-commutative analogues of a gauge field and spacetime geometry fluctuations, plus a charge-dependent derivative operator. The fermion integral leads to novel induced bosonic terms.
en.motivation: To explore a unified description of spacetime and internal symmetries within the framework of non-commutative geometry, understanding the common origin of geometric fluctuations and gauge fields.
en.method: The standard technique of Connes' one-forms is used to compute the inner fluctuations of the vacuum Dirac operator in a model given by the product of a non-commutative matrix spectral triple with a two-dimensional internal space.
en.result: Obtained the non-commutative analogue of a gauge field, fluctuations of the spacetime geometry, and a charge-dependent derivative operator. The fermion path integral generates novel induced bosonic interaction terms.
en.help_to_user: Provides a concrete computational example of combining non-commutative geometry with particle physics models, demonstrating how gauge fields and geometric fluctuations can emerge from a spectral triple.

idea_spark.idea: Repeat this calculation with more complex internal algebras or higher-dimensional spectral triples to explore if the Standard Model gauge group or gravitational corrections can emerge.
idea_spark.risk: The model is currently simple, containing only one fermion doublet. Generalization to multiple fermion generations or realistic particle spectra may introduce significant complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach may provide a pathway to derive particle physics interactions from purely geometric/algebraic data, inspiring deeper investigation into 'geometry generating physics'.

papers.title: UniT: Toward a Unified Physical Language for Human-to-Humanoid Policy Learning and World Modeling
papers.summary: Scaling humanoid foundation models is bottlenecked by the scarcity of robotic data. While massive egocentric human data offers a scalable alternative, bridging the cross-embodiment chasm remains a fundamental challenge due to kinematic mismatches. We introduce UniT (Unified Latent Action Tokenizer via Visual Anchoring), a framework that establishes a unified physical language for human-to-humanoid transfer. Grounded in the philosophy that heterogeneous kinematics share universal visual consequences, UniT employs a tri-branch cross-reconstruction mechanism: actions predict vision to anchor kinematics to physical outcomes, while vision reconstructs actions to filter out irrelevant visual confounders. Concurrently, a fusion branch synergies these purified modalities into a shared discrete latent space of embodiment-agnostic physical intents. We validate UniT across two paradigms: 1) Policy Learning (VLA-UniT): By predicting these unified tokens, it effectively leverages diverse human data to achieve state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization on both humanoid simulation benchmark and real-world deployments, notably demonstrating zero-shot task transfer. 2) World Modeling (WM-UniT): By aligning cross-embodiment dynamics via unified tokens as conditions, it realizes direct human-to-humanoid action transfer. This alignment ensures that human data seamlessly translates into enhanced action controllability for humanoid video generation. Ultimately, by inducing a highly aligned cross-embodiment representation (empirically verified by t-SNE visualizations revealing the convergence of human and humanoid features into a shared manifold), UniT offers a scalable path to distill vast human knowledge into general-purpose humanoid capabilities.

ai.tldr: UniT框架通过视觉锚定建立统一物理语言，实现人类到人形机器人的策略学习和世界建模，解决跨具身数据稀缺问题。
ai.motivation: 人形机器人基础模型扩展受限于机器人数据稀缺，而大量人类自我中心数据因运动学不匹配难以直接利用。
ai.method: 采用三分支交叉重建机制：动作预测视觉以锚定运动学结果，视觉重建动作以过滤无关干扰，融合分支将净化模态编码到共享离散潜在空间。
ai.result: 在策略学习上实现最先进的数据效率和OOD泛化（包括零样本任务迁移）；在世界建模上实现直接的人类到人形机器人动作迁移。
ai.help_to_user: 为跨具身机器人学习提供了可扩展的表示框架，能利用丰富人类数据提升人形机器人能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用人类视频数据训练人形机器人策略生成模型。
idea_spark.risk: 真实世界动态复杂性可能超出视觉锚定的泛化范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类日常动作视频中自动提取可执行机器人技能库。

idea_spark.risk: 真实世界动态复杂性可能超出视觉锚定的泛化范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类日常动作视频中自动提取可执行机器人技能库。

en.tldr: The UniT framework establishes a unified physical language via visual anchoring to enable human-to-humanoid policy learning and world modeling, addressing cross-embodiment data scarcity.
en.motivation: Scaling humanoid foundation models is bottlenecked by robotic data scarcity, while massive human egocentric data remains underutilized due to kinematic mismatches.
en.method: Employs a tri-branch cross-reconstruction mechanism: actions predict vision to anchor kinematics, vision reconstructs actions to filter confounders, and a fusion branch encodes purified modalities into a shared discrete latent space.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art data efficiency and OOD generalization in policy learning (including zero-shot transfer), and enables direct human-to-humanoid action transfer in world modeling.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable representation framework for cross-embodiment robot learning that can leverage abundant human data to enhance humanoid capabilities.

idea_spark.idea: Train humanoid policy generation models using human video data.
idea_spark.risk: Real-world dynamics complexity may exceed the generalization scope of visual anchoring.
idea_spark.inspiration: Automatically extract executable robot skill libraries from human daily activity videos.

papers.title: ST-Prune: Training-Free Spatio-Temporal Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models in Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have become central to autonomous driving systems, yet their deployment is severely bottlenecked by the massive computational overhead of multi-view camera and multi-frame video input. Existing token pruning methods, primarily designed for single-image inputs, treat each frame or view in isolation and thus fail to exploit the inherent spatio-temporal redundancies in driving scenarios. To bridge this gap, we propose ST-Prune, a training-free, plug-and-play framework comprising two complementary modules: Motion-aware Temporal Pruning (MTP) and Ring-view Spatial Pruning (RSP). MTP addresses temporal redundancy by encoding motion volatility and temporal recency as soft constraints within the diversity selection objective, prioritizing dynamic trajectories and current-frame content over static historical background. RSP further resolves spatial redundancy by exploiting the ring-view camera geometry to penalize bilateral cross-view similarity, eliminating duplicate projections and residual background that temporal pruning alone cannot suppress. These two modules together constitute a complete spatio-temporal pruning process, preserving key scene information under strict compression. Validated across four benchmarks spanning perception, prediction, and planning, ST-Prune establishes new state-of-the-art for training-free token pruning. Notably, even at 90\% token reduction, ST-Prune achieves near-lossless performance with certain metrics surpassing the full-model baseline, while maintaining inference speeds comparable to existing pruning approaches.

ai.tldr: ST-Prune是一种无需训练、即插即用的时空令牌剪枝框架，用于自动驾驶中的视觉语言模型，通过运动感知时间剪枝和环视空间剪枝模块，在保持性能的同时大幅减少计算开销。
ai.motivation: 视觉语言模型在自动驾驶系统中计算开销巨大，现有令牌剪枝方法多为单图像设计，无法利用驾驶场景中固有的时空冗余。
ai.method: 提出两个互补模块：运动感知时间剪枝（MTP）通过编码运动波动性和时间临近性作为软约束，优先保留动态轨迹和当前帧内容；环视空间剪枝（RSP）利用环视相机几何惩罚双边跨视图相似性，消除重复投影和残留背景。
ai.result: 在四个涵盖感知、预测和规划的基准测试中，ST-Prune在无需训练的令牌剪枝方法中达到新的最优性能，即使在90%令牌削减下仍能实现近乎无损的性能，某些指标甚至超过完整模型基线，推理速度与现有剪枝方法相当。
ai.help_to_user: 为部署计算密集型视觉语言模型到自动驾驶系统提供了一种高效、无需重新训练的剪枝解决方案，显著降低计算负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将驾驶场景的时空特性（运动波动、时间临近性、环视几何）编码为剪枝的软约束，实现更智能的令牌保留。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于特定的环视相机几何和运动模式，可能在其他非结构化或单视图场景中泛化能力受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将领域先验知识（如传感器布局、时空模式）融入模型压缩过程，实现更高效的推理优化。

en.tldr: ST-Prune is a training-free, plug-and-play spatio-temporal token pruning framework for vision-language models in autonomous driving, combining motion-aware temporal pruning and ring-view spatial pruning to significantly reduce computational overhead while maintaining performance.
en.motivation: Vision-language models incur massive computational overhead in autonomous driving systems, and existing token pruning methods, designed for single images, fail to exploit inherent spatio-temporal redundancies in driving scenarios.
en.method: Proposes two complementary modules: Motion-aware Temporal Pruning (MTP) encodes motion volatility and temporal recency as soft constraints to prioritize dynamic trajectories and current-frame content; Ring-view Spatial Pruning (RSP) exploits ring-view camera geometry to penalize bilateral cross-view similarity, eliminating duplicate projections and residual background.

At 90% token reduction, it achieves near-lossless performance with certain metrics surpassing the full-model baseline, while maintaining inference speeds comparable to existing pruning approaches.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, training-free pruning solution for deploying compute-intensive vision-language models in autonomous driving systems, significantly reducing computational burden.

idea_spark.idea: Encode spatio-temporal characteristics of driving scenes (motion volatility, temporal recency, ring-view geometry) as soft constraints for pruning to achieve smarter token retention.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on specific ring-view camera geometry and motion patterns, which may limit generalization to other unstructured or single-view scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires incorporating domain prior knowledge (e.g., sensor layout, spatio-temporal patterns) into model compression processes for more efficient inference optimization.

papers.title: Maximum Solow--Polasky Diversity Subset Selection Is NP-hard Even in the Euclidean Plane
papers.summary: We prove that, for every fixed $θ_0>0$, selecting a subset of prescribed cardinality that maximizes the Solow--Polasky diversity indicator is NP-hard for finite point sets in $\mathbb{R}^2$ with the Euclidean metric, and therefore also for finite point sets in $\mathbb{R}^d$ for every fixed dimension $d \ge 2$. This strictly strengthens our earlier NP-hardness result for general metric spaces by showing that hardness persists under the severe geometric restriction to the Euclidean plane. At the same time, the Euclidean proof technique is different from the conceptually easier earlier argument for arbitrary metric spaces, and that general metric-space construction does not directly translate to the Euclidean setting. In the earlier proof one can use an exact construction tailored to arbitrary metrics, essentially exploiting a two-distance structure. In contrast, such an exact realization is unavailable in fixed-dimensional Euclidean space, so the present reduction requires a genuinely geometric argument. Our Euclidean proof is based on two distance thresholds, which allow us to separate yes-instances from no-instances by robust inequalities rather than by the exact construction used in the general metric setting. The main technical ingredient is a bounded-box comparison lemma for the nonlinear objective $\mathbf{1}^{\top}Z^{-1}\mathbf{1}$, where $Z_{ij}=e^{-θ_0 d(x_i,x_j)}$. This lemma controls the effect of perturbations in the pairwise distances well enough to transfer the gap created by the reduction. The reduction is from \emph{Geometric Unit-Disk Independent Set}. We present the main argument in geometric form for finite subsets of $\mathbb{R}^2$, with an appendix supplying the bit-complexity details needed for polynomial-time reducibility.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了即使在二维欧几里得平面上，最大化Solow–Polasky多样性指标的固定规模子集选择问题也是NP难的。
ai.motivation: 先前研究已证明在一般度量空间中该问题是NP难的，但尚不清楚在具有严格几何约束的欧几里得平面中是否依然困难。
ai.method: 通过从几何单位圆盘独立集问题进行归约，利用两个距离阈值和关于非线性目标函数的有界盒比较引理，在欧几里得平面中构造证明。
ai.result: 对于任意固定θ₀>0，在二维欧几里得点集上最大化Solow–Polasky多样性是NP难的，从而推广到任意固定维度d≥2。
ai.help_to_user: 为欧几里得空间中的多样性最大化问题提供了计算复杂性的严格下界，表明即使几何结构简单，精确求解依然困难。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何独立集问题的结构嵌入到多样性指标的距离矩阵中，通过精心设置的距离关系编码约束条件。
idea_spark.risk: 证明依赖于特定的距离阈值设置和参数选择，可能难以推广到其他多样性指标或度量空间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 类似方法可用于分析其他基于距离的几何优化问题的计算复杂性，特别是在固定维度欧几里得空间中。

zh.result: 对于任意固定θ₀>0，在二维欧几里得点集上最大化Solow–Polasky多样性是NP难的，从而推广到任意固定维度d≥2。
zh.help_to_user: 为欧几里得空间中的多样性最大化问题提供了计算复杂性的严格下界，表明即使几何结构简单，精确求解依然困难。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何独立集问题的结构嵌入到多样性指标的距离矩阵中，通过精心设置的距离关系编码约束条件。
idea_spark.risk: 证明依赖于特定的距离阈值设置和参数选择，可能难以推广到其他多样性指标或度量空间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 类似方法可用于分析其他基于距离的几何优化问题的计算复杂性，特别是在固定维度欧几里得空间中。

en.tldr: We prove that maximizing the Solow–Polasky diversity indicator for fixed-size subsets is NP-hard even for finite point sets in the Euclidean plane.
en.motivation: While NP-hardness was known for general metric spaces, it remained open whether hardness persists under the severe geometric restriction to the Euclidean plane.
en.method: Reduction from Geometric Unit-Disk Independent Set using two distance thresholds and a bounded-box comparison lemma for the nonlinear objective, with a genuinely geometric argument.
en.result: For every fixed θ₀>0, the problem is NP-hard in ℝ² with Euclidean metric, and thus in ℝᵈ for every fixed d ≥ 2.
en.help_to_user: Provides a strong computational lower bound for diversity maximization in Euclidean spaces, showing exact optimization remains hard even with simple geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Embed the structure of geometric independent set into the distance matrix of the diversity indicator by carefully engineered distance relationships.
idea_spark.risk: Proof relies on specific distance threshold settings and parameter choices, possibly difficult to generalize to other diversity measures or metric spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Similar approaches could analyze computational complexity of other distance-based geometric optimization problems in fixed-dimensional Euclidean spaces.

papers.title: Deep sprite-based image models: An analysis
papers.summary: While foundation models drive steady progress in image segmentation and diffusion algorithms compose always more realistic images, the seemingly simple problem of identifying recurrent patterns in a collection of images remains very much open. In this paper, we focus on sprite-based image decomposition models, which have shown some promise for clustering and image decomposition and are appealing because of their high interpretability. These models come in different flavors, need to be tailored to specific datasets, and struggle to scale to images with many objects. We dive into the details of their design, identify their core components, and perform an extensive analysis on clustering benchmarks. We leverage this analysis to propose a deep sprite-based image decomposition method that performs on par with state-of-the-art unsupervised class-aware image segmentation methods on the standard CLEVR benchmark, scales linearly with the number of objects, identifies explicitly object categories, and fully models images in an easily interpretable way.

ai.tldr: 本文深入分析基于精灵的图像分解模型，提出一种深度方法，在CLEVR基准上达到与最先进无监督类感知分割方法相当的性能，并具有线性扩展性和高可解释性。
ai.motivation: 尽管基础模型在图像分割和扩散算法上不断进步，但从图像集合中识别重复模式这一看似简单的问题仍未解决。基于精灵的分解模型因其高可解释性而具有潜力，但存在定制需求高、难以扩展到多对象图像等问题。
ai.method: 深入分析现有精灵分解模型的设计细节，识别其核心组件，并在聚类基准上进行广泛评估。基于此分析，提出一种深度精灵分解方法。
ai.result: 在标准CLEVR基准上，该方法与最先进的无监督类感知图像分割方法性能相当，能线性扩展对象数量，明确识别对象类别，并以易于解释的方式完整建模图像。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可扩展、可解释的图像分解框架，适用于需要识别图像中重复模式、进行无监督聚类或分解的应用场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将精灵分解与深度表示学习结合，构建端到端的可解释分解管道。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于特定数据集的结构（如CLEVR的合成性质），在复杂真实图像上的泛化能力需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索将显式对象表示（精灵）与隐式神经表示结合，以平衡可解释性与表征能力。

en.tldr: This paper analyzes sprite-based image decomposition models and proposes a deep method that performs on par with state-of-the-art unsupervised class-aware segmentation on the CLEVR benchmark, with linear scalability and high interpretability.
en.motivation: While foundation models advance image segmentation and diffusion algorithms, identifying recurrent patterns in image collections remains open. Sprite-based decomposition models are promising due to high interpretability but require dataset-specific tailoring and struggle to scale to images with many objects.
en.method: Analyze the design details of existing sprite-based models, identify core components, and perform extensive evaluation on clustering benchmarks. Propose a deep sprite-based decomposition method based on this analysis.
en.result: The method matches state-of-the-art unsupervised class-aware image segmentation on the standard CLEVR benchmark, scales linearly with the number of objects, explicitly identifies object categories, and fully models images in an interpretable way.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable, interpretable image decomposition framework suitable for applications requiring identification of recurrent patterns, unsupervised clustering, or decomposition.

idea_spark.idea: Combine sprite decomposition with deep representation learning to build an end-to-end interpretable decomposition pipeline.
idea_spark.risk: The method may rely on specific dataset structures (e.g., CLEVR's synthetic nature); generalization to complex real-world images needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore combining explicit object representations (sprites) with implicit neural representations to balance interpretability and representational power.

papers.title: Asymptotic Metrological Scaling and Concentration in Chaotic Floquet Dynamics
papers.summary: We study quantum sensing with Floquet chaotic dynamics generated by Haar random unitary gates. The metrological resources consist of three ingredients: A given initial state, a set number of Haar random unitary gates and the sensing gates. There are two natural ways of organizing the resources: the first one is the "control" protocol, where the random unitary gates act as random controls and intertwine with the deterministic sensing gates and the second one is the "state-preparation" protocol, where random unitary gates play the role of preparing the metrological useful states. In each protocol, we consider both global Haar random unitary gates and a set of local two-site Haar random unitary gates that forms a Floquet random quantum circuit (RQC) respectively. We find linear, shot-noise scaling of the metrological precision, quantified by the quantum Fisher information (QFI), in the asymptotic limit when the Hilbert space dimension becomes large, and quantum advantages beyond linear scaling in the non-asymptotic regimes. We also bound the fluctuation of the QFI using concentration inequalities. Our analytical findings are corroborated by numerical simulations. Finally, along the way of analyzing the precision limit, we prove an empirical conjecture of RQC: In the asymptotic limit of large local Hilbert space dimension, the Floquet operator of a Floquet RQC essentially behaves like a global unitary operator.

ai.tldr: 研究基于Floquet混沌动力学的量子传感，使用Haar随机酉门生成动力学。分析了两种资源组织协议，在渐近极限下获得线性（散粒噪声）标度的计量精度，并在非渐近区域观察到量子优势。同时用集中不等式约束了量子Fisher信息的涨落。
ai.motivation: 探索混沌Floquet动力学在量子传感中的计量潜力，特别是随机酉门作为控制或态制备资源时的性能极限。
ai.method: 采用两种协议：'控制'协议（随机酉门与确定性传感门交错）和'态制备'协议（随机酉门用于制备计量有用态）。分别考虑全局Haar随机酉门和构成Floquet随机量子电路的局部两比特Haar随机酉门。通过解析推导和数值模拟分析量子Fisher信息的标度行为。
ai.result: 在希尔伯特空间维数大的渐近极限下，计量精度呈现线性（散粒噪声）标度；在非渐近区域存在超越线性标度的量子优势。使用集中不等式约束了量子Fisher信息的涨落。同时证明了一个关于Floquet随机量子电路的猜想：在大局部希尔伯特空间维数极限下，其Floquet算符本质上类似于全局酉算符。
ai.help_to_user: 为基于混沌动力学的量子传感方案提供了系统的计量标度分析和涨落控制方法，揭示了随机量子电路在计量中的渐近行为。

idea_spark.idea: 将混沌Floquet动力学与随机量子电路结合，构建新型量子传感协议，并严格分析其计量极限。
idea_spark.risk: 实验实现需要高保真度的随机酉门操作，且非渐近区域的量子优势可能对噪声敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将随机性、混沌动力学与量子计量结合的新思路，可用于设计抗噪或资源高效的传感协议。

en.tldr: Studies quantum sensing with Floquet chaotic dynamics generated by Haar random unitary gates. Analyzes two resource organization protocols, obtaining linear (shot-noise) scaling of metrological precision in the asymptotic limit and observing quantum advantages beyond linear scaling in non-asymptotic regimes. Bounds fluctuations of quantum Fisher information using concentration inequalities.
en.motivation: To explore the metrological potential of chaotic Floquet dynamics in quantum sensing, particularly the performance limits when random unitary gates serve as control or state preparation resources.
en.method: Two protocols: 'control' protocol (random unitary gates interleaved with deterministic sensing gates) and 'state-preparation' protocol (random unitary gates prepare metrologically useful states). Considers both global Haar random unitary gates and local two-site Haar random unitary gates forming a Floquet random quantum circuit. Analyzes scaling behavior of quantum Fisher information via analytical derivation and numerical simulation.
en.result: In the asymptotic limit of large Hilbert space dimension, metrological precision shows linear (shot-noise) scaling; quantum advantages beyond linear scaling exist in non-asymptotic regimes. Fluctuations of quantum Fisher information are bounded using concentration inequalities. Proves a conjecture about Floquet random quantum circuits: in the limit of large local Hilbert space dimension, its Floquet operator essentially behaves like a global unitary operator.
en.help_to_user: Provides systematic metrological scaling analysis and fluctuation control methods for quantum sensing schemes based on chaotic dynamics, revealing asymptotic behavior of random quantum circuits in metrology.

idea_spark.idea: Combine chaotic Floquet dynamics with random quantum circuits to construct novel quantum sensing protocols and rigorously analyze their metrological limits.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental realization requires high-fidelity random unitary gate operations, and quantum advantages in non-asymptotic regimes may be noise-sensitive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires new approaches integrating randomness, chaotic dynamics, and quantum metrology, potentially leading to noise-resilient or resource-efficient sensing protocols.

papers.title: TransSplat: Unbalanced Semantic Transport for Language-Driven 3DGS Editing
papers.summary: Language-driven 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) editing provides a more convenient approach for modifying complex scenes in VR/AR. Standard pipelines typically adopt a two-stage strategy: first editing multiple 2D views, and then optimizing the 3D representation to match these edited observations. Existing methods mainly improve view consistency through multi-view feature fusion, attention filtering, or iterative recalibration. However, they fail to explicitly address a more fundamental issue: the semantic correspondence between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians. To tackle this problem, we propose TransSplat, which formulates language-driven 3DGS editing as a multi-view unbalanced semantic transport problem. Specifically, our method establishes correspondences between visible Gaussians and view-specific editing prototypes, thereby explicitly characterizing the semantic relationship between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians. It further recovers a cross-view shared canonical 3D edit field to guide unified 3D appearance updates. In addition, we use transport residuals to suppress erroneous edits in non-target regions, mitigating edit leakage and improving local control precision. Qualitative and quantitative results show that, compared with existing 3D editing methods centered on enhancing view consistency, TransSplat achieves superior performance in local editing accuracy and structural consistency.

ai.tldr: TransSplat将语言驱动的3D高斯泼溅编辑建模为多视角不平衡语义传输问题，通过建立2D编辑原型与3D高斯之间的显式语义对应，提升局部编辑精度与结构一致性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法通过多视角特征融合等方式提升视角一致性，但未能显式解决编辑后的2D证据与3D高斯之间的语义对应这一根本问题。
ai.method: 建立可见高斯与视角特定编辑原型之间的对应关系，显式刻画2D编辑证据与3D高斯的语义关系；恢复跨视角共享的规范3D编辑场以指导统一的外观更新；利用传输残差抑制非目标区域的错误编辑。
ai.result: 在局部编辑精度和结构一致性方面优于现有以增强视角一致性为中心的3D编辑方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为VR/AR中复杂场景的语言驱动编辑提供了一种更精确、泄漏更少的解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将编辑问题形式化为原型与3D元素间的语义传输，并通过残差控制错误传播。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于2D编辑原型的质量，在复杂语义场景中可能面临原型提取的挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将最优传输等理论工具用于解决3D生成编辑中的语义对齐问题。

en.tldr: TransSplat formulates language-driven 3D Gaussian Splatting editing as a multi-view unbalanced semantic transport problem, establishing explicit semantic correspondence between 2D editing prototypes and 3D Gaussians to improve local editing accuracy and structural consistency.
en.motivation: Existing methods improve view consistency through multi-view feature fusion but fail to explicitly address the fundamental issue of semantic correspondence between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians.
en.method: Establishes correspondences between visible Gaussians and view-specific editing prototypes; recovers a cross-view shared canonical 3D edit field to guide unified appearance updates; uses transport residuals to suppress erroneous edits in non-target regions.
en.result: Achieves superior performance in local editing accuracy and structural consistency compared to existing 3D editing methods focused on enhancing view consistency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more precise and less leaky solution for language-driven editing of complex scenes in VR/AR.

idea_spark.idea: Formulating editing as semantic transport between prototypes and 3D elements, with residual control for error propagation.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the quality of 2D editing prototypes, which may be challenging in complex semantic scenes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of optimal transport and similar theoretical tools for solving semantic alignment in 3D generation and editing.

papers.title: AdaGScale: Viewpoint-Adaptive Gaussian Scaling in 3D Gaussian Splatting to Reduce Gaussian-Tile Pairs
papers.summary: Reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs is one of the most promising approaches to improve 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS) rendering speed on GPUs. However, the importance difference existing among Gaussian-tile pairs has never been considered in the previous works. In this paper, we propose AdaGScale, a novel viewpoint-adaptive Gaussian scaling technique for reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs. AdaGScale is based on the observation that the peripheral tiles located far from Gaussian center contribute negligibly to pixel color accumulation. This suggests an opportunity for reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs based on color contribution. AdaGScale efficiently estimates the color contribution in the peripheral region of each Gaussian during a preprocessing stage and adaptively scales its size based on the peripheral score. As a result, Gaussians with lower importance intersect with fewer tiles during the intersection test, which improves rendering speed while maintaining image quality. The adjusted size is used only for tile intersection test, and the original size is retained during color accumulation to preserve visual fidelity. Experimental results show that AdaGScale achieves a geometric mean speedup of 13.8x over original 3D-GS on a GPU, with only about 0.5 dB degradation in PSNR on city-scale scenes.

ai.tldr: AdaGScale是一种用于3D高斯泼溅渲染的视点自适应高斯缩放技术，通过减少高斯-瓦片对数量来提升GPU渲染速度，同时保持图像质量。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在减少高斯-瓦片对时未考虑不同对的重要性差异，导致计算冗余。
ai.method: 在预处理阶段估计每个高斯外围区域的颜色贡献度，根据外围评分自适应缩放高斯尺寸（仅用于瓦片相交测试），原始尺寸保留用于颜色累积。
ai.result: 在城市尺度场景上，相比原始3D-GS实现几何平均13.8倍加速，PSNR仅下降约0.5 dB。
ai.help_to_user: 为实时3D渲染系统提供高效的高斯泼溅优化方案，平衡速度与质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将空间重要性映射为几何缩放因子，分离测试与渲染的几何表示。
idea_spark.risk: 动态缩放可能引入边界情况下的视觉瑕疵，需严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对渲染管线中不同阶段采用差异化几何表示的优化思路。

idea_spark.risk: 动态缩放可能引入边界情况下的视觉瑕疵，需严格验证。
