en.tldr: AdaGScale is a viewpoint-adaptive Gaussian scaling technique for 3D Gaussian Splatting that reduces Gaussian-tile pairs to improve GPU rendering speed while maintaining image quality.
en.motivation: Previous approaches to reducing Gaussian-tile pairs ignore importance differences among pairs, leading to computational redundancy.
en.method: Estimates color contribution in each Gaussian's peripheral region during preprocessing, adaptively scales Gaussian size based on peripheral score (used only for tile intersection tests), and retains original size for color accumulation.
en.result: Achieves geometric mean speedup of 13.8x over original 3D-GS on GPU with only ~0.5 dB PSNR degradation on city-scale scenes.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient Gaussian splatting optimization solution for real-time 3D rendering systems, balancing speed and quality.

idea_spark.idea: Map spatial importance to geometric scaling factors, decoupling geometric representations for testing vs. rendering.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic scaling may introduce visual artifacts in edge cases, requiring rigorous validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires optimization approaches using differentiated geometric representations across rendering pipeline stages.

papers.title: A Controlled Benchmark of Visual State-Space Backbones with Domain-Shift and Boundary Analysis for Remote-Sensing Segmentation
papers.summary: Visual state-space models (SSMs) are increasingly promoted as efficient alternatives to Vision Transformers, yet their practical advantages remain unclear under fair comparison because existing studies rarely isolate encoder effects from decoder and training choices. We present a strictly controlled benchmark of representative visual SSM families, including VMamba, MambaVision, and Spatial-Mamba, for remote-sensing semantic segmentation, in which only the encoder varies across experiments. Evaluated on LoveDA and ISPRS Potsdam under a unified 4-stage feature interface and a fixed lightweight decoder, the benchmark reveals three main findings, intra-family scaling yields only modest gains, cross-domain generalization is strongly asymmetric, and boundary delineation is the dominant failure mode under distribution shift. Although visual SSMs achieve favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-offs relative to the controlled CNN and Transformer baselines considered here, the results suggest that future improvements are more likely to come from robustness-oriented design and boundary-aware decoding than from encoder scaling alone. By isolating encoder behavior under a unified and reproducible protocol, this study establishes a practical reference benchmark for the design and evaluation of future Mamba-based segmentation backbones

ai.tldr: 本研究对视觉状态空间模型（SSMs）在遥感语义分割任务中进行了严格控制的基准测试，仅改变编码器，发现其缩放收益有限、跨域泛化不对称且边界分割是主要失败模式。
ai.motivation: 现有研究很少将编码器效果与解码器和训练选择分离，导致视觉SSMs作为Vision Transformers高效替代品的实际优势不明确。
ai.method: 在LoveDA和ISPRS Potsdam数据集上，使用统一的4阶段特征接口和固定轻量解码器，对VMamba、MambaVision和Spatial-Mamba等代表性视觉SSM家族进行编码器变体实验。
ai.result: 视觉SSMs在准确性与效率权衡上优于对照的CNN和Transformer基线，但家族内缩放收益有限，跨域泛化呈现强不对称性，边界描绘是分布偏移下的主要失败模式。
ai.help_to_user: 为未来基于Mamba的分割骨干网络的设计与评估提供了可复现的参考基准，表明改进应更关注鲁棒性设计和边界感知解码，而非仅编码器缩放。

idea_spark.idea: 开发针对边界分割失败的专用解码模块或损失函数。
idea_spark.risk: 结论可能受限于特定数据集和轻量解码器配置。
idea_spark.inspiration: 架构改进应从单纯缩放转向针对特定失败模式（如边界分割）的鲁棒性设计。

idea_spark.risk: Conclusions may be limited by the specific datasets and lightweight decoder configuration used.
idea_spark.inspiration: Architectural improvements should shift from pure scaling to robustness-oriented design targeting specific failure modes like boundary delineation.

papers.title: Application of the Allan Variance to Time Series Analysis in Astrometry and Geodesy: A Review
papers.summary: The Allan variance (AVAR) was introduced 50 years ago as a statistical tool for assessing of the frequency standards deviations. For the past decades, AVAR has increasingly being used in geodesy and astrometry to assess the noise characteristics in geodetic and astrometric time series. A specific feature of astrometric and geodetic measurements, as compared with the clock measurements, is that they are generally associated with uncertainties; thus, an appropriate weighting should be applied during data analysis. Besides, some physically connected scalar time series naturally form series of multi-dimensional vectors. For example, three station coordinates time series $X$, $Y$, and $Z$ can be combined to analyze 3D station position variations. The classical AVAR is not intended for processing unevenly weighted and/or multi-dimensional data. Therefore, AVAR modifications, namely weighted AVAR (WAVAR), multi-dimensional AVAR (MAVAR), and weighted multi-dimensional AVAR (WMAVAR), were introduced to overcome these deficiencies. In this paper, a brief review is given of the experience of using AVAR and its modifications in processing astro-geodetic time series.

ai.tldr: 本文回顾了Allan方差及其改进版本（加权、多维）在天文大地测量时间序列分析中的应用，以处理带权重和多维数据的噪声特性评估。
ai.motivation: 经典Allan方差设计用于评估频率标准的稳定性，但无法直接处理天文大地测量中常见的带权重和多维时间序列数据。
ai.method: 介绍了加权Allan方差（WAVAR）、多维Allan方差（MAVAR）和加权多维Allan方差（WMAVAR）等改进方法，以适应带不确定度的观测数据和矢量形式的时间序列。
ai.result: 综述了Allan方差及其改进版本在过去几十年中处理天文大地测量时间序列的经验，展示了其在噪声特性分析中的适用性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理带权重或多维时间序列的噪声分析提供了专门的统计工具综述。

idea_spark.idea: 开发适用于非均匀采样或具有复杂相关结构的时间序列的广义Allan方差框架。
idea_spark.risk: 改进方法可能增加计算复杂度，且对特定噪声模型的假设可能不适用于所有数据类型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时钟稳定性分析工具成功适配到大地测量学，启发了跨领域统计方法的迁移与定制化创新。

en.tldr: This paper reviews the application of the Allan variance and its modifications (weighted, multi-dimensional) for analyzing noise characteristics in astro-geodetic time series, addressing weighted and multi-dimensional data.
en.motivation: The classical Allan variance, designed for frequency standard stability assessment, cannot directly handle weighted and multi-dimensional time series common in astrometry and geodesy.
en.method: Introduces modified versions: Weighted Allan Variance (WAVAR), Multi-dimensional Allan Variance (MAVAR), and Weighted Multi-dimensional Allan Variance (WMAVAR) to accommodate data with uncertainties and vector-form series.
en.result: Summarizes decades of experience using Allan variance and its modifications for processing astro-geodetic time series, demonstrating their utility for noise characterization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a review of specialized statistical tools for noise analysis of weighted or multi-dimensional time series.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a generalized Allan variance framework for non-uniformly sampled time series or those with complex correlation structures.
idea_spark.risk: Modifications may increase computational complexity, and assumptions about specific noise models may not hold for all data types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Successful adaptation of clock stability analysis tools to geodesy inspires cross-domain migration and customization of statistical methods.

papers.title: BEAT: Tokenizing and Generating Symbolic Music by Uniform Temporal Steps
papers.summary: Tokenizing music to fit the general framework of language models is a compelling challenge, especially considering the diverse symbolic structures in which music can be represented (e.g., sequences, grids, and graphs). To date, most approaches tokenize symbolic music as sequences of musical events, such as onsets, pitches, time shifts, or compound note events. This strategy is intuitive and has proven effective in Transformer-based models, but it treats the regularity of musical time implicitly: individual tokens may span different durations, resulting in non-uniform time progression. In this paper, we instead consider whether an alternative tokenization is possible, where a uniform-length musical step (e.g., a beat) serves as the basic unit. Specifically, we encode all events within a single time step at the same pitch as one token, and group tokens explicitly by time step, which resembles a sparse encoding of a piano-roll representation. We evaluate the proposed tokenization on music continuation and accompaniment generation tasks, comparing it with mainstream event-based methods. Results show improved musical quality and structural coherence, while additional analyses confirm higher efficiency and more effective capture of long-range patterns with the proposed tokenization.

ai.tldr: BEAT提出了一种基于均匀时间步长的符号音乐分词方法，将每个节拍内的音符事件编码为单个令牌，相比传统事件序列分词在音乐质量和结构连贯性上表现更优。
ai.motivation: 现有符号音乐分词方法多将音乐事件（如音符起始、音高、时移）作为序列令牌处理，导致时间进展不均匀，难以显式捕捉音乐时间的规律性。
ai.method: 以均匀时间步长（如节拍）为基本单位，将同一时间步内相同音高的所有事件编码为一个令牌，并按时间步分组，形成类似钢琴卷帘的稀疏编码表示。
ai.result: 在音乐续写和伴奏生成任务上，该方法相比主流事件序列方法提升了音乐质量和结构连贯性，分析表明其具有更高效率并能更有效捕捉长程模式。
ai.help_to_user: 为符号音乐生成提供了一种时间规整的分词方案，可提升基于语言模型的音乐生成系统的音乐结构一致性和生成效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将非均匀时间序列数据重新组织为规整的时间步单元，并在每个单元内进行事件聚合编码。
idea_spark.risk: 对于高度不规则或自由节奏的时序数据，固定时间步长可能导致信息损失或失真。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从音乐节拍的物理规律出发，将时间维度作为首要结构化约束，而非事后建模。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从音乐节拍的物理规律出发，将时间维度作为首要结构化约束，而非事后建模。

en.tldr: BEAT proposes a symbolic music tokenization method based on uniform temporal steps, encoding note events within each beat as single tokens, demonstrating superior musical quality and structural coherence compared to traditional event-sequence tokenization.
en.motivation: Existing symbolic music tokenization methods typically treat musical events (e.g., onsets, pitches, time shifts) as sequence tokens, resulting in non-uniform time progression and implicit treatment of musical temporal regularity.
en.method: Using uniform temporal steps (e.g., beats) as basic units, encode all events at the same pitch within a single time step as one token, grouping tokens explicitly by time step to form a sparse piano-roll-like representation.
en.result: On music continuation and accompaniment generation tasks, the method improves musical quality and structural coherence compared to mainstream event-based approaches, with analyses confirming higher efficiency and more effective long-range pattern capture.
en.help_to_user: Provides a temporally regularized tokenization scheme for symbolic music generation, enhancing the structural consistency and generation efficiency of language model-based music systems.

idea_spark.idea: Reorganize non-uniform time-series data into regular temporal step units and perform event aggregation encoding within each unit.
idea_spark.risk: For highly irregular or free-rhythm sequential data, fixed time steps may cause information loss or distortion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the physical regularity of musical beats, treat the time dimension as a primary structural constraint rather than modeling it post hoc.

papers.title: Uplink Signal Detection For Large-Scale MIMO-ISAC Systems
papers.summary: Next-generation wireless communication systems are unifying large-scale multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) and integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) to enhance sensing and communication performance. In this paper, the signal detection problem for MIMO-ISAC systems is modeled as a mixed-integer least squares (MILS) problem. To solve it efficiently, we propose a projection-based neighborhood search-aided alternating direction method of multipliers (P-NS-ADMM) detection scheme. By theoretical analysis, we demonstrate that P-NS-ADMM achieves the same received diversity order as maximum likelihood (ML) detection. For further complexity reduction, an iteration-based NS-ADMM (I-NS-ADMM) is proposed to remove the complex projection operation. Complexity analysis shows its complexity advantage compared with P-NS-ADMM. Moreover, to better estimate the sensing signals for I-NS-ADMM, a flexible mechanism of ADMM iterations is given. Finally, simulations demonstrate the proposed NS-aided ADMM detection schemes have significant performance advantages in terms of both BER and NMSE.

ai.tldr: 本文针对大规模MIMO-ISAC系统的上行信号检测问题，提出了一种基于投影的邻域搜索辅助ADMM检测方案，在保证与最大似然检测相同分集阶数的同时降低了复杂度。
ai.motivation: 下一代无线通信系统将大规模MIMO与ISAC融合以提升感知与通信性能，但其信号检测问题建模为混合整数最小二乘问题，求解复杂。
ai.method: 提出P-NS-ADMM检测方案，通过理论分析证明其分集阶数与ML检测相同；为进一步降低复杂度，提出I-NS-ADMM方案去除复杂投影操作，并引入灵活的ADMM迭代机制以更好估计感知信号。
ai.result: 仿真表明，所提出的NS辅助ADMM检测方案在误码率和归一化均方误差方面均具有显著性能优势。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模MIMO-ISAC系统提供了一种高效、高性能的信号检测算法框架。

idea_spark.idea: 在ADMM迭代中嵌入局部搜索以提升离散变量优化的精度。
idea_spark.risk: 算法参数（如邻域大小、迭代机制）需针对具体系统配置调整，可能影响泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将传统优化算法与启发式搜索结合，以平衡复杂度和性能，适用于联合通信感知的混合信号处理。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a projection-based neighborhood search-aided ADMM detection scheme for uplink signal detection in large-scale MIMO-ISAC systems, achieving the same diversity order as ML detection with reduced complexity.
en.motivation: Next-generation wireless systems unify large-scale MIMO and ISAC to enhance performance, but the signal detection problem is modeled as a mixed-integer least squares problem, which is computationally challenging.
en.method: Propose P-NS-ADMM detection scheme and prove its diversity order matches ML detection; further propose I-NS-ADMM to remove complex projection operations, and introduce a flexible ADMM iteration mechanism for better sensing signal estimation.
en.result: Simulations show the proposed NS-aided ADMM detection schemes offer significant advantages in both BER and NMSE performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, high-performance signal detection algorithm framework for large-scale MIMO-ISAC systems.

idea_spark.idea: Embed local search within ADMM iterations to improve accuracy for discrete variable optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Algorithm parameters (e.g., neighborhood size, iteration mechanism) need tuning for specific system configurations, potentially affecting generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining traditional optimization algorithms with heuristic search to balance complexity and performance, applicable to hybrid signal processing in joint communication and sensing.

keywords_raw: alternating direction method of multipliers admm

papers.title: RAFT-MSF++: Temporal Geometry-Motion Feature Fusion for Self-Supervised Monocular Scene Flow
papers.summary: Monocular scene flow estimation aims to recover dense 3D motion from image sequences, yet most existing methods are limited to two-frame inputs, restricting temporal modeling and robustness to occlusions. We propose RAFT-MSF++, a self-supervised multi-frame framework that recurrently fuses temporal features to jointly estimate depth and scene flow. Central to our approach is the Geometry-Motion Feature (GMF), which compactly encodes coupled motion and geometry cues and is iteratively updated for effective temporal reasoning. To ensure the robustness of this temporal fusion against occlusions, we incorporate relative positional attention to inject spatial priors and an occlusion regularization module to propagate reliable motion from visible regions. These components enable the GMF to effectively propagate information even in ambiguous areas. Extensive experiments show that RAFT-MSF++ achieves 24.14% SF-all on the KITTI Scene Flow benchmark, with a 30.99% improvement over the baseline and better robustness in occluded regions. The code is available at https://github.com/sunzunyi/RAFT-MSF-PlusPlus.

ai.tldr: RAFT-MSF++：一种自监督多帧单目场景流估计框架，通过融合时序几何-运动特征，联合估计深度和场景流，在遮挡区域表现出更强的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有单目场景流方法大多局限于两帧输入，限制了时序建模能力以及对遮挡的鲁棒性。
ai.method: 提出几何-运动特征（GMF）紧凑编码运动与几何线索，并通过迭代更新进行时序推理；引入相对位置注意力注入空间先验，以及遮挡正则化模块从可见区域传播可靠运动。
ai.result: 在KITTI场景流基准测试中达到24.14% SF-all，比基线提升30.99%，在遮挡区域鲁棒性更好。
ai.help_to_user: 为从图像序列中估计密集3D运动提供了更鲁棒的多帧自监督解决方案，尤其改善了遮挡场景下的性能。

zh.tldr: RAFT-MSF++：一种自监督多帧单目场景流估计框架，通过融合时序几何-运动特征，联合估计深度和场景流，在遮挡区域表现出更强的鲁棒性。

zh.method: 提出几何-运动特征（GMF）紧凑编码运动与几何线索，并通过迭代更新进行时序推理；引入相对位置注意力注入空间先验，以及遮挡正则化模块从可见区域传播可靠运动。

en.tldr: RAFT-MSF++: a self-supervised multi-frame monocular scene flow estimation framework that fuses temporal geometry-motion features to jointly estimate depth and scene flow, demonstrating improved robustness in occluded regions.
en.motivation: Most existing monocular scene flow methods are limited to two-frame inputs, restricting temporal modeling and robustness to occlusions.
en.method: Proposes a Geometry-Motion Feature (GMF) that compactly encodes coupled motion and geometry cues, iteratively updated for temporal reasoning; incorporates relative positional attention to inject spatial priors and an occlusion regularization module to propagate reliable motion from visible regions.
en.result: Achieves 24.14% SF-all on the KITTI Scene Flow benchmark, a 30.99% improvement over the baseline, with better robustness in occluded regions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more robust multi-frame self-supervised solution for estimating dense 3D motion from image sequences, particularly improving performance in occluded scenes.

idea_spark.idea: Using a compact geometry-motion feature as the core carrier for temporal information propagation, combined with attention mechanisms and occlusion handling for robust multi-frame fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the quality of self-supervised signals; may fail in regions with extreme motion or lack of texture.
idea_spark.inspiration: The design and protection mechanisms (e.g., against occlusion) for feature fusion in temporal modeling can be transferred to other video understanding or motion estimation tasks.

papers.title: BALTIC: A Benchmark and Cross-Domain Strategy for 3D Reconstruction Across Air and Underwater Domains Under Varying Illumination
papers.summary: Robust 3D reconstruction across varying environmental conditions remains a critical challenge for robotic perception, particularly when transitioning between air and water. To address this, we introduce BALTIC, a controlled benchmark designed to systematically evaluate modern 3D reconstruction methods under variations in medium and lighting. The benchmark comprises 13 datasets spanning two media (air and water) and three lighting conditions (ambient, artificial, and mixed), with additional variations in motion type, scanning pattern, and initialization trajectory, resulting in a diverse set of sequences. Our experimental setup features a custom water tank equipped with a monocular camera and an HTC Vive tracker, enabling accurate ground-truth pose estimation. We further investigate cross-domain reconstruction by augmenting underwater image sequences with a small number of in-air views captured under similar lighting conditions. We evaluate Structure-from-Motion reconstruction using COLMAP in terms of both trajectory accuracy and scene geometry, and use these reconstructions as input to Neural Radiance Fields and 3D Gaussian Splatting methods. The resulting models are assessed against ground-truth trajectories and in-air references, while rendered outputs are compared using perceptual and photometric metrics. Additionally, we perform a color restoration analysis to evaluate radiometric consistency across domains. Our results show that under controlled, texture-consistent conditions, Gaussian Splatting with simple preprocessing (e.g., white balance correction) can achieve performance comparable to specialized underwater methods, although its robustness decreases in more complex and heterogeneous real-world environments

ai.tldr: BALTIC是一个用于评估跨空气和水域、不同光照条件下3D重建方法的基准，实验表明经过简单预处理的3D高斯泼溅在受控条件下能达到与专用水下方法相当的性能。
ai.motivation: 机器人在空气和水域等不同环境介质中切换时，实现鲁棒的3D重建仍是一个关键挑战，需要系统性的评估基准。
ai.method: 构建包含13个数据集（涵盖两种介质、三种光照条件）的受控基准，使用定制水箱、单目相机和HTC Vive追踪器获取真实位姿，通过少量相似光照下的空中视图增强水下序列，评估SfM、NeRF和3D高斯泼溅等方法。
ai.result: 在纹理一致的受控条件下，经过白平衡等简单预处理的3D高斯泼溅能达到与专用水下方法相当的性能，但在更复杂、异构的真实环境中鲁棒性下降。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个系统评估跨介质3D重建方法的基准，并验证了简单预处理结合先进渲染方法在特定条件下的有效性。

idea_spark.idea: 将类似基准构建思路扩展到其他环境介质（如烟雾、沙尘）或更极端的光照变化场景。
idea_spark.risk: 受控实验环境与真实复杂环境的性能差距可能较大，基准的泛化性需要进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过系统性的基准设计，可以更公平地比较不同方法的跨域适应能力，并为实际应用中的预处理策略提供指导。

en.tldr: BALTIC is a benchmark for evaluating 3D reconstruction methods across air and water domains under varying illumination. Experiments show that 3D Gaussian Splatting with simple preprocessing achieves performance comparable to specialized underwater methods in controlled conditions.
en.motivation: Robust 3D reconstruction across varying environmental media (e.g., air and water) remains a critical challenge for robotic perception, requiring systematic evaluation benchmarks.
en.method: Constructs a controlled benchmark with 13 datasets spanning two media and three lighting conditions, uses a custom water tank with monocular camera and HTC Vive tracker for ground-truth poses, augments underwater sequences with a small number of in-air views under similar lighting, and evaluates SfM, NeRF, and 3D Gaussian Splatting methods.
en.result: Under controlled, texture-consistent conditions, 3D Gaussian Splatting with simple preprocessing (e.g., white balance correction) achieves performance comparable to specialized underwater methods, though its robustness decreases in more complex, heterogeneous real-world environments.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic benchmark for evaluating cross-domain 3D reconstruction methods and validates the effectiveness of simple preprocessing combined with advanced rendering techniques under specific conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Extend similar benchmark construction approaches to other environmental media (e.g., smoke, dust) or more extreme lighting variation scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Performance gap between controlled experimental environments and complex real-world settings may be significant; benchmark generalization requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Systematic benchmark design enables fairer comparison of cross-domain adaptation capabilities and provides guidance for preprocessing strategies in practical applications.

papers.title: CreatiParser: Generative Image Parsing of Raster Graphic Designs into Editable Layers
papers.summary: Graphic design images consist of multiple editable layers, such as text, background, and decorative elements, while most generative models produce rasterized outputs without explicit layer structures, limiting downstream editing. Existing graphic design parsing methods typically rely on multi-stage pipelines combining layout prediction, matting, and inpainting, which suffer from error accumulation and limited controllability. We propose a hybrid generative framework for raster-to-layer graphic design parsing that decomposes a design image into editable text, background, and sticker layers. Text regions are parsed using a vision-language model into a text rendering protocol, enabling faithful reconstruction and flexible re-editing, while background and sticker layers are generated using a multi-branch diffusion architecture with RGBA support. We further introduce ParserReward and integrate it with Group Relative Policy Optimization to align generation quality with human design preferences. Extensive experiments on two challenging datasets, \emph{i.e.,} the Parser-40K and Crello datasets, demonstrate superior performance over existing methods, \emph{eg.,} achieving an overall average improvement of 23.7\% across all metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出CreatiParser，一种将栅格化设计图像解析为可编辑文本、背景和贴纸图层的混合生成框架。
ai.motivation: 大多数生成模型输出栅格化图像，缺乏显式图层结构，限制了后续编辑。现有解析方法依赖多阶段流程，存在误差累积和可控性差的问题。
ai.method: 使用视觉语言模型将文本区域解析为文本渲染协议；采用支持RGBA的多分支扩散架构生成背景和贴纸图层；引入ParserReward并结合Group Relative Policy Optimization以对齐人类设计偏好。
ai.result: 在Parser-40K和Crello数据集上的实验表明，其性能优于现有方法，所有指标平均提升23.7%。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计师和内容创作者提供了一种将成品设计图自动分解为可独立编辑图层的高效工具，极大提升了设计稿的复用和修改效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将设计解析视为一个条件生成问题，为不同图层类型定制专用生成分支。
idea_spark.risk: 对复杂、重叠或高度风格化的设计元素的解析精度可能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将强化学习中的对齐策略用于优化生成内容与领域特定偏好（如设计美学）的匹配度。

en.tldr: Proposes CreatiParser, a hybrid generative framework that parses raster graphic design images into editable text, background, and sticker layers.
en.motivation: Most generative models produce rasterized outputs without explicit layer structures, limiting downstream editing. Existing parsing methods rely on multi-stage pipelines suffering from error accumulation and limited controllability.
en.method: Parses text regions into a text rendering protocol using a vision-language model; generates background and sticker layers using a multi-branch diffusion architecture with RGBA support; introduces ParserReward integrated with Group Relative Policy Optimization to align generation with human design preferences.
en.result: Extensive experiments on the Parser-40K and Crello datasets demonstrate superior performance over existing methods, achieving an average improvement of 23.7% across all metrics.
en.help_to_user: Provides designers and content creators with an efficient tool to automatically decompose finished design images into independently editable layers, greatly improving the efficiency of design reuse and modification.

idea_spark.idea: Treats design parsing as a conditional generation problem, with dedicated generation branches for different layer types.
idea_spark.risk: Parsing accuracy may be insufficient for complex, overlapping, or highly stylized design elements.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of alignment strategies from reinforcement learning to optimize the match between generated content and domain-specific preferences (e.g., design aesthetics).

papers.title: A Data-embedded Solution Paradigm for Nonconvex Probable Event Constrained Optimization
papers.summary: This paper introduces a new modeling framework for optimization under uncertainty, called Probable Event Constrained Optimization (PECO). Unlike conventional chance-constrained formulations, which only limit the probability of constraint violation, PECO also explicitly requires feasibility for all events whose probability exceeds a prescribed threshold. This guarantees that solutions remain valid across all high-probability realizations of uncertainty. To solve PECO, we proposed a data-embedded program (DEP) which directly incorporates historical measurements of the uncertain parameters to obtain a deterministic approximation for PECO. While existing solution methods for optimization problems under uncertainty rely heavily on convexity or linearity assumptions, the proposed data-embedded solution paradigm provides a unique opportunity for solving nonlinear and nonconvex PECOs. The effectiveness of this approach depends on properly estimating the number of elements in the family of solution-determining data sets. As we enter the era of big data, this information can be properly estimated by leveraging the power of machine learning.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的不确定性优化建模框架——概率事件约束优化（PECO），它要求解对所有超过概率阈值的不确定性事件都可行，并提出了数据嵌入程序（DEP）作为求解方法。
ai.motivation: 传统机会约束仅限制约束违反概率，无法保证解在所有高概率不确定性实现下的可行性。PECO框架旨在填补这一空白，为非线性非凸问题提供更鲁棒的解决方案。
ai.method: 提出数据嵌入程序（DEP），直接纳入不确定参数的历史测量数据，获得PECO的确定性近似。该方法不依赖凸性或线性假设，并通过机器学习估计解确定数据集的数量。
ai.result: 为非线性非凸PECO问题提供了新的求解范式，利用大数据和机器学习能力，实现了对高概率不确定性事件的全面可行性保证。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有复杂不确定性的非凸优化问题提供了新的建模和求解思路，特别适用于需要高概率鲁棒性的工程与科学应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将历史数据直接嵌入优化模型，替代传统概率分布假设，结合机器学习估计关键参数。
idea_spark.risk: 对数据质量和数量依赖较强，小样本场景下估计可能不准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将数据驱动方法与传统优化理论结合，利用大数据提升复杂不确定性问题的求解能力。

idea_spark.risk: 对数据质量和数量依赖较强，小样本场景下估计可能不准。

en.tldr: This paper introduces Probable Event Constrained Optimization (PECO), a new framework for optimization under uncertainty that requires feasibility for all events exceeding a probability threshold, and proposes a Data-Embedded Program (DEP) as a solution method.
en.motivation: Conventional chance constraints only limit constraint violation probability without guaranteeing solution feasibility across all high-probability uncertainty realizations. PECO addresses this gap to provide more robust solutions for nonlinear nonconvex problems.
en.method: Proposes a Data-Embedded Program (DEP) that directly incorporates historical measurements of uncertain parameters to obtain a deterministic approximation of PECO. The method avoids convexity/linearity assumptions and uses machine learning to estimate the number of solution-determining data sets.
en.result: Provides a new solution paradigm for nonlinear nonconvex PECO problems, leveraging big data and machine learning to ensure comprehensive feasibility guarantees for high-probability uncertainty events.
en.help_to_user: Offers new modeling and solution approaches for nonconvex optimization problems with complex uncertainty, particularly useful for engineering and scientific applications requiring high-probability robustness.

idea_spark.idea: Embed historical data directly into optimization models instead of relying on traditional probability distribution assumptions, combined with machine learning for key parameter estimation.
idea_spark.risk: Heavy dependence on data quality and quantity; estimation may be inaccurate in small-sample scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the integration of data-driven methods with traditional optimization theory, leveraging big data to enhance solution capabilities for complex uncertainty problems.

papers.title: CrossPan: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Cross-Sequence Pancreas MRI Segmentation and Generalization
papers.summary: Automatic pancreas segmentation is fundamental to abdominal MRI analysis, yet deep learning models trained on one MRI sequence often fail catastrophically when applied to another-a challenge that has received little systematic investigation. We introduce CrossPan, a multi-institutional benchmark comprising 1,386 3D scans across three routinely acquired sequences (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and Out-of-Phase) from eight centers. Our experiments reveal three key findings. First, cross-sequence domain shifts are far more severe than cross-center variability: models achieving Dice scores above 0.85 in-domain collapse to near-zero (<0.02) when transferred across sequences. Second, state-of-the-art domain generalization methods provide negligible benefit under these physics-driven contrast inversions, whereas foundation models like MedSAM2 maintain moderate zero-shot performance through contrast-invariant shape priors. Third, semi-supervised learning offers gains only under stable intensity distributions and becomes unstable on sequences with high intra-organ variability. These results establish cross-sequence generalization-not model architecture or center diversity-as the primary barrier to clinically deployable pancreas MRI segmentation. Dataset and code are available at https://crosspan.netlify.app/.

ai.tldr: CrossPan是一个用于评估胰腺MRI跨序列分割与泛化能力的综合基准，揭示了跨序列域偏移是临床部署的主要障碍。
ai.motivation: 自动胰腺分割是腹部MRI分析的基础，但针对单一MRI序列训练的深度学习模型在应用于其他序列时性能会严重下降，这一问题缺乏系统性研究。
ai.method: 引入CrossPan基准数据集，包含来自8个中心的1386个3D扫描，涵盖T1加权、T2加权和反相位三种常规序列。评估了模型在跨序列场景下的性能，包括域泛化方法、基础模型和半监督学习。
ai.result: 发现跨序列域偏移远大于跨中心差异，导致模型性能从0.85 Dice分数骤降至接近零；现有域泛化方法效果甚微，而MedSAM2等基础模型通过对比度不变的形状先验保持中等零样本性能；半监督学习仅在强度分布稳定时有效。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究医学图像分割的跨序列泛化问题提供了标准化的数据集和评估基准，明确了该领域的主要挑战。

idea_spark.idea: 利用对比度不变的形状先验（如基础模型）来缓解物理驱动的图像对比度反转问题。
idea_spark.risk: 研究结论高度依赖于特定器官（胰腺）和模态（MRI），在其他解剖结构或成像方式上的普适性有待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 对于临床部署，模型对成像物理参数变化的鲁棒性可能比模型架构创新或数据中心的多样性更为关键。

zh.motivation: 自动胰腺分割是腹部MRI分析的基础，但针对单一MRI序列训练的深度学习模型在应用于其他序列时性能会严重下降，这一问题缺乏系统性研究。
zh.method: 引入CrossPan基准数据集，包含来自8个中心的1386个3D扫描，涵盖T1加权、T2加权和反相位三种常规序列。评估了模型在跨序列场景下的性能，包括域泛化方法、基础模型和半监督学习。
zh.result: 发现跨序列域偏移远大于跨中心差异，导致模型性能从0.85 Dice分数骤降至接近零；现有域泛化方法效果甚微，而MedSAM2等基础模型通过对比度不变的形状先验保持中等零样本性能；半监督学习仅在强度分布稳定时有效。
zh.help_to_user: 为研究医学图像分割的跨序列泛化问题提供了标准化的数据集和评估基准，明确了该领域的主要挑战。

idea_spark.idea: 利用对比度不变的形状先验（如基础模型）来缓解物理驱动的图像对比度反转问题。
idea_spark.risk: 研究结论高度依赖于特定器官（胰腺）和模态（MRI），在其他解剖结构或成像方式上的普适性有待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 对于临床部署，模型对成像物理参数变化的鲁棒性可能比模型架构创新或数据中心的多样性更为关键。

en.tldr: CrossPan is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating cross-sequence pancreas MRI segmentation and generalization, revealing cross-sequence domain shift as the primary barrier to clinical deployment.
en.motivation: Automatic pancreas segmentation is fundamental to abdominal MRI analysis, yet models trained on one MRI sequence often fail catastrophically on another—a challenge that has received little systematic investigation.
en.method: Introduces the CrossPan benchmark comprising 1,386 3D scans across three routinely acquired MRI sequences (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, Out-of-Phase) from eight centers. Evaluates model performance in cross-sequence scenarios, including domain generalization methods, foundation models, and semi-supervised learning.
en.result: Finds cross-sequence domain shifts are far more severe than cross-center variability, causing model performance to collapse from >0.85 Dice to near-zero; state-of-the-art domain generalization methods provide negligible benefit, while foundation models like MedSAM2 maintain moderate zero-shot performance via contrast-invariant shape priors; semi-supervised learning helps only under stable intensity distributions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a standardized dataset and evaluation benchmark for studying cross-sequence generalization in medical image segmentation, clarifying the field's primary challenges.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage contrast-invariant shape priors (e.g., from foundation models) to mitigate physics-driven contrast inversions.
idea_spark.risk: Findings are highly specific to the organ (pancreas) and modality (MRI); generalizability to other anatomies or imaging modalities remains unverified.
idea_spark.inspiration: For clinical deployment, robustness to variations in imaging physics parameters may be more critical than model architecture innovations or multi-center data diversity.

papers.title: Attention-based Multi-modal Deep Learning Model of Spatio-temporal Crop Yield Prediction with Satellite, Soil and Climate Data
papers.summary: Crop yield prediction is one of the most important challenge, which is crucial to world food security and policy-making decisions. The conventional forecasting techniques are limited in their accuracy with reference to the fact that they utilize static data sources that do not reflect the dynamic and intricate relationships that exist between the variables of the environment over time [5,13]. This paper presents Attention-Based Multi-Modal Deep Learning Framework (ABMMDLF), which is suggested to be used in high-accuracy spatio-temporal crop yield prediction.   The model we use combines multi-year satellite imagery, high-resolution time-series of meteorological data and initial soil properties as opposed to the traditional models which use only one of the aforementioned factors [12, 21]. The main architecture involves the use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to extract spatial features and a Temporal Attention Mechanism to adaptively weight important phenological periods targeted by the algorithm to change over time and condition on spatial features of images and video sequences. As can be experimentally seen, the proposed research work provides an R^2 score of 0.89, which is far better than the baseline models do.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力的多模态深度学习框架（ABMMDLF），用于整合卫星影像、气象时序数据和土壤属性，实现高精度的时空作物产量预测。
ai.motivation: 传统作物产量预测方法依赖静态数据，难以捕捉环境变量间复杂的动态时空关系，精度有限。
ai.method: 使用CNN提取卫星影像的空间特征，结合时序注意力机制自适应加权关键物候期，融合多模态数据（卫星、气象、土壤）进行建模。
ai.result: 实验表明，所提模型的R²分数达到0.89，显著优于基线模型。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一个融合多源遥感与环境数据的深度学习预测框架，可提升农业产量预估的准确性与动态适应性。

idea_spark.idea: 将时序注意力机制与CNN空间特征提取结合，用于动态加权不同生长阶段的环境影响。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖高质量的多源数据对齐与标注，在数据缺失区域可能表现下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可扩展至其他时空动态预测问题，如自然灾害评估、城市交通流量预测等。

zh.help_to_user: 提供了一个融合多源遥感与环境数据的深度学习预测框架，可提升农业产量预估的准确性与动态适应性。

idea_spark.idea: 将时序注意力机制与CNN空间特征提取结合，用于动态加权不同生长阶段的环境影响。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖高质量的多源数据对齐与标注，在数据缺失区域可能表现下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可扩展至其他时空动态预测问题，如自然灾害评估、城市交通流量预测等。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an Attention-Based Multi-Modal Deep Learning Framework (ABMMDLF) that integrates satellite imagery, meteorological time-series, and soil properties for high-accuracy spatio-temporal crop yield prediction.
en.motivation: Conventional yield forecasting techniques rely on static data sources and fail to capture the dynamic, intricate spatio-temporal relationships among environmental variables.
en.method: Uses CNNs to extract spatial features from satellite imagery and a temporal attention mechanism to adaptively weight important phenological periods, fusing multi-modal data (satellite, climate, soil).
en.result: Experiments show the proposed model achieves an R² score of 0.89, significantly outperforming baseline models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a deep learning framework that fuses multi-source remote sensing and environmental data to improve the accuracy and dynamic adaptability of agricultural yield estimation.

idea_spark.idea: Combining temporal attention with CNN spatial feature extraction to dynamically weight environmental impacts across different growth stages.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on high-quality, aligned multi-source data and may underperform in regions with data gaps or poor annotation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The framework can be extended to other spatio-temporal dynamic prediction tasks, such as natural disaster assessment or urban traffic flow forecasting.

papers.title: The bosonic Hubbard model on a three dimensional flat band lattice
papers.summary: The lowest eigenstates of the hopping matrix on the line graph of a cubic lattice with periodic boundary conditions are highly degenerate, they form a lowest flat band. Further, these states are localized. If one considers a repulsive bosonic Hubbard model on this lattice it is possible to construct exact multi-particle ground states simply by putting particles in the localized single particle ground states such that they avoid each other. This can be done up to a certain critical particle number $N_c$. We prove that at this particle number the ground state entropy is subextensive $\propto N_c^{2/3}$. For lower densities the entropy is extensive. We further show that the problem is related to the number of 4-cycle decompositions of the cubic lattice with periodic boundary conditions.

ai.tldr: 在三维立方晶格线图上，研究具有排斥相互作用的玻色哈伯德模型。利用局域化的平带单粒子基态，构造了多粒子精确基态，并证明了在临界粒子数处熵呈亚广延增长。
ai.motivation: 探索在具有高度简并局域化平带的晶格上，玻色哈伯德模型的精确基态性质及其与熵标度行为的关系。
ai.method: 在具有周期性边界条件的三维立方晶格的线图上，分析跳跃矩阵的最低本征态（形成局域化平带）。通过将粒子置于互不重叠的局域化单粒子基态中，构造多粒子精确基态，直至临界粒子数。使用组合数学方法（4-环分解）分析熵标度。
ai.result: 在临界粒子数 N_c 以下，基态熵是广延的；在 N_c 处，熵变为亚广延的，比例于 N_c^{2/3}。该问题等价于立方晶格上4-环分解的计数问题。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为理解平带系统中强关联玻色子的基态和熵行为提供了精确解范例，将量子多体问题与图论组合问题联系起来。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局域化平带轨道间的空间排斥来构造多体精确态，并通过覆盖问题的计数来刻画熵标度。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法严重依赖于特定的晶格几何（线图）和平带局域化性质，可能难以推广至一般相互作用或无序系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考：其他高简并平带系统（如Kagome、Lie晶格）是否也存在类似的精确可解临界填充和熵标度律？能否用类似的组合数学工具描述其基态简并？

zh.motivation: 探索在具有高度简并局域化平带的晶格上，玻色哈伯德模型的精确基态性质及其与熵标度行为的关系。

en.tldr: Studies the repulsive bosonic Hubbard model on the line graph of a 3D cubic lattice. Constructs exact multi-particle ground states using localized flat-band single-particle states and proves subextensive entropy scaling at a critical particle number.
en.motivation: To investigate the exact ground state properties and entropy scaling of the bosonic Hubbard model on a lattice with highly degenerate localized flat bands.
en.method: Analyzes the lowest eigenstates of the hopping matrix on the line graph of a cubic lattice with periodic boundaries (forming a localized flat band). Constructs exact multi-particle ground states by placing particles in non-overlapping localized single-particle states up to a critical particle number. Uses combinatorial methods (4-cycle decompositions) to analyze entropy scaling.
en.result: Ground state entropy is extensive below a critical particle number N_c and becomes subextensive at N_c, scaling as N_c^{2/3}. The problem is equivalent to counting 4-cycle decompositions of the cubic lattice.
en.help_to_user: This work provides an exact solvable example for understanding ground states and entropy behavior of strongly correlated bosons in flat-band systems, linking quantum many-body problems to graph-theoretic combinatorial problems.

idea_spark.idea: Construct many-body exact states using spatial exclusion between localized flat-band orbitals and characterize entropy scaling via counting of covering problems.
idea_spark.risk: The approach heavily relies on specific lattice geometry (line graph) and flat-band localization, making generalization to generic interactions or disordered systems challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires questions: Do other highly degenerate flat-band systems (e.g., Kagome, Lieb lattices) exhibit similar exactly solvable critical fillings and entropy scaling laws? Can similar combinatorial tools describe their ground state degeneracy?

papers.title: Gauge-invariant off-shell formulations for 3D massive higher-spin supermultiplets
papers.summary: Making use of the known off-shell formulations for massless higher-spin ${\cal N}=1$ supermultiplets in four dimensions, gauge-invariant off-shell actions for massive higher-spin ${\cal N}=2$ supermultiplets in three dimensions (3D) are derived by Kaluza-Klein reduction in superspace. To illustrate the formalism, we also construct, for the first time, massive gauge-invariant 3D ${\cal N}=2$ supersymmetric counterparts of the linearised actions for the old and new minimal supergravity theories. Our off-shell ${\cal N}=2$ supermultiplets carry a non-zero central charge, and are formulated in 3D ${\cal N}=2$ central charge superspace. The models can be reduced to 3D ${\cal N}=1$ superspace, by integrating out two Grassmann variables, and then consistent reality conditions on the superfields can be imposed. As a result, only two supercharges remain unbroken.

ai.tldr: 利用四维无质量高自旋超多重态的已知离壳公式，通过超空间中的Kaluza-Klein约化，导出了三维有质量高自旋N=2超多重态的规范不变离壳作用量。
ai.motivation: 为三维有质量高自旋超多重态构建规范不变的离壳公式，并首次构造新旧最小超引力理论的对应超对称版本。
ai.method: 使用超空间中的Kaluza-Klein约化技术，从四维无质量N=1超多重态出发，推导三维有质量N=2超多重态的作用量。
ai.result: 得到了携带非零中心电荷的离壳N=2超多重态作用量，可约化为N=1超空间，仅保留两个未破缺的超荷。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了三维有质量高自旋超对称理论的具体构造方法，扩展了超引力对应模型的研究框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将四维无质量理论的离壳结构降维至三维有质量情形，并引入中心电荷超空间。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖于特定超对称表示和约化过程，推广至更一般情形可能存在技术障碍。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在低维超引力与高自旋理论交叉领域探索新的规范不变作用量构造方案。

zh.tldr: 利用四维无质量高自旋超多重态的已知离壳公式，通过超空间中的Kaluza-Klein约化，导出了三维有质量高自旋N=2超多重态的规范不变离壳作用量。
zh.motivation: 为三维有质量高自旋超多重态构建规范不变的离壳公式，并首次构造新旧最小超引力理论的对应超对称版本。

en.tldr: Using known off-shell formulations for massless higher-spin supermultiplets in four dimensions, gauge-invariant off-shell actions for massive higher-spin N=2 supermultiplets in three dimensions are derived via Kaluza-Klein reduction in superspace.
en.motivation: To construct gauge-invariant off-shell formulations for massive higher-spin supermultiplets in 3D and build supersymmetric counterparts of old and new minimal supergravity theories for the first time.
en.method: Employ Kaluza-Klein reduction in superspace, starting from four-dimensional massless N=1 supermultiplets to derive actions for three-dimensional massive N=2 supermultiplets.
en.result: Obtained off-shell N=2 supermultiplet actions carrying non-zero central charge, formulated in central charge superspace, reducible to N=1 superspace with only two unbroken supercharges.
en.help_to_user: Provides concrete construction methods for massive higher-spin supersymmetric theories in 3D, extending the framework for studying supergravity counterparts.

idea_spark.idea: Dimensional reduction of off-shell structures from 4D massless to 3D massive theories, incorporating central charge superspace.
idea_spark.risk: Models depend on specific supersymmetry representations and reduction procedures, with potential technical obstacles for generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of new gauge-invariant action constructions at the intersection of low-dimensional supergravity and higher-spin theories.

papers.title: CoInteract: Physically-Consistent Human-Object Interaction Video Synthesis via Spatially-Structured Co-Generation
papers.summary: Synthesizing human--object interaction (HOI) videos has broad practical value in e-commerce, digital advertising, and virtual marketing. However, current diffusion models, despite their photorealistic rendering capability, still frequently fail on (i) the structural stability of sensitive regions such as hands and faces and (ii) physically plausible contact (e.g., avoiding hand--object interpenetration). We present CoInteract, an end-to-end framework for HOI video synthesis conditioned on a person reference image, a product reference image, text prompts, and speech audio. CoInteract introduces two complementary designs embedded into a Diffusion Transformer (DiT) backbone. First, we propose a Human-Aware Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) that routes tokens to lightweight, region-specialized experts via spatially supervised routing, improving fine-grained structural fidelity with minimal parameter overhead. Second, we propose Spatially-Structured Co-Generation, a dual-stream training paradigm that jointly models an RGB appearance stream and an auxiliary HOI structure stream to inject interaction geometry priors. During training, the HOI stream attends to RGB tokens and its supervision regularizes shared backbone weights; at inference, the HOI branch is removed for zero-overhead RGB generation. Experimental results demonstrate that CoInteract significantly outperforms existing methods in structural stability, logical consistency, and interaction realism.

ai.tldr: CoInteract是一个用于合成物理一致的人-物交互视频的端到端框架，通过空间结构化的协同生成和人类感知的专家混合机制，显著提升了结构稳定性和交互真实性。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型在合成人-物交互视频时，经常在手部、面部等敏感区域出现结构不稳定，以及手与物体穿透等物理不合理问题，限制了在电商、数字广告等场景的应用价值。
ai.method: 在Diffusion Transformer骨干网络中嵌入两种设计：1) 人类感知的专家混合机制，通过空间监督路由将令牌分配给轻量化的区域专家，提升细粒度结构保真度；2) 空间结构化的协同生成双流训练范式，联合建模RGB外观流和辅助的HOI结构流，注入交互几何先验。推理时移除HOI分支，实现零开销的RGB生成。
ai.result: 实验表明，CoInteract在结构稳定性、逻辑一致性和交互真实性方面显著优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要生成高质量、物理合理的人-物交互视频（如产品展示、虚拟营销）的研究者或开发者提供了一个有效的解决方案，其模块化设计便于集成和改进。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练时引入显式的结构监督流来正则化共享骨干网络权重，推理时移除该分支以保持效率，这是一种“训练时辅助，推理时丢弃”的实用设计思路。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于准确的区域分割或关键点检测来指导路由和结构流监督，若这些前置步骤不准，可能影响性能。双流训练可能增加计算和调优成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理一致性约束转化为可学习的结构先验，并通过专门的网络分支进行注入，为生成模型融合领域知识提供了参考。轻量化区域专家的设计平衡了性能与参数效率。

zh.result: 实验表明，CoInteract在结构稳定性、逻辑一致性和交互真实性方面显著优于现有方法。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练时引入显式的结构监督流来正则化共享骨干网络权重，推理时移除该分支以保持效率，这是一种“训练时辅助，推理时丢弃”的实用设计思路。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于准确的区域分割或关键点检测来指导路由和结构流监督，若这些前置步骤不准，可能影响性能。双流训练可能增加计算和调优成本。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物理一致性约束转化为可学习的结构先验，并通过专门的网络分支进行注入，为生成模型融合领域知识提供了参考。轻量化区域专家的设计平衡了性能与参数效率。

en.tldr: CoInteract is an end-to-end framework for physically-consistent human-object interaction video synthesis, employing spatially-structured co-generation and a human-aware mixture-of-experts mechanism to significantly improve structural stability and interaction realism.
en.motivation: Current diffusion models often fail to maintain structural stability in sensitive regions (e.g., hands, faces) and produce physically implausible contacts (e.g., hand-object interpenetration) when synthesizing human-object interaction videos, limiting their practical value in e-commerce, digital advertising, and virtual marketing.
en.method: Two complementary designs embedded into a Diffusion Transformer backbone: 1) A Human-Aware Mixture-of-Experts that routes tokens to lightweight, region-specialized experts via spatially supervised routing, improving fine-grained structural fidelity. 2) Spatially-Structured Co-Generation, a dual-stream training paradigm jointly modeling an RGB appearance stream and an auxiliary HOI structure stream to inject interaction geometry priors. The HOI branch is removed at inference for zero-overhead RGB generation.
en.result: Experimental results demonstrate that CoInteract significantly outperforms existing methods in structural stability, logical consistency, and interaction realism.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective solution for researchers or developers needing to generate high-quality, physically plausible human-object interaction videos (e.g., product demonstration, virtual marketing). Its modular design facilitates integration and improvement.

idea_spark.idea: Introducing an explicit structure-supervision stream during training to regularize shared backbone weights, and discarding it at inference to maintain efficiency, is a practical 'auxiliary-during-training, discard-at-inference' design pattern.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on accurate region segmentation or keypoint detection to guide routing and structure stream supervision; inaccuracies in these pre-steps may affect performance. Dual-stream training may increase computational and tuning costs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transforming physical consistency constraints into learnable structural priors and injecting them via dedicated network branches provides a reference for integrating domain knowledge into generative models. The lightweight region-expert design balances performance and parameter efficiency.

papers.title: AblateCell: A Reproduce-then-Ablate Agent for Virtual Cell Repositories
papers.summary: Systematic ablations are essential to attribute performance gains in AI Virtual Cells, yet they are rarely performed because biological repositories are under-standardized and tightly coupled to domain-specific data and formats. While recent coding agents can translate ideas into implementations, they typically stop at producing code and lack a verifier that can reproduce strong baselines and rigorously test which components truly matter. We introduce AblateCell, a reproduce-then-ablate agent for virtual cell repositories that closes this verification gap. AblateCell first reproduces reported baselines end-to-end by auto-configuring environments, resolving dependency and data issues, and rerunning official evaluations while emitting verifiable artifacts. It then conducts closed-loop ablation by generating a graph of isolated repository mutations and adaptively selecting experiments under a reward that trades off performance impact and execution cost. Evaluated on three single-cell perturbation prediction repositories (CPA, GEARS, BioLORD), AblateCell achieves 88.9% (+29.9% to human expert) end-to-end workflow success and 93.3% (+53.3% to heuristic) accuracy in recovering ground-truth critical components. These results enable scalable, repository-grounded verification and attribution directly on biological codebases.

ai.tldr: AblateCell是一个用于虚拟细胞仓库的“先复现后消融”智能体，能自动复现基线并执行闭环消融实验，以验证关键组件。
ai.motivation: AI虚拟细胞研究中，系统消融对于归因性能提升至关重要，但生物仓库标准化不足且与领域数据格式紧耦合，导致此类分析很少进行。现有编码智能体仅生成代码，缺乏能复现强基线并严格测试组件重要性的验证器。
ai.method: AblateCell首先通过自动配置环境、解决依赖和数据问题、重新运行官方评估来端到端复现报告基线。随后，它生成隔离的仓库变异图，并在权衡性能影响与执行成本的奖励下自适应选择实验，进行闭环消融。
ai.result: 在三个单细胞扰动预测仓库（CPA、GEARS、BioLORD）上评估，AblateCell实现了88.9%的端到端工作流成功率（比人类专家高29.9%），并在恢复真实关键组件上达到93.3%的准确率（比启发式方法高53.3%）。
ai.help_to_user: 该工具使研究人员能够直接在生物代码库上进行可扩展的、基于仓库的验证和归因，自动化了繁琐的复现和消融流程。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个通用智能体，为任何GitHub仓库自动构建“贡献影响图”，量化每个提交或模块对最终性能的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 领域特定的数据格式和评估脚本可能使泛化变得困难；奖励函数的设计需要领域知识。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将软件工程中的持续集成/测试理念与AI驱动的实验设计相结合，为科学代码库创建自动化的“科学验证管道”。

idea_spark.idea: Develop a general-purpose agent that automatically builds a 'contribution impact graph' for any GitHub repository, quantifying the effect of each commit or module on final performance.
idea_spark.risk: Domain-specific data formats and evaluation scripts may hinder generalization; designing the reward function requires domain knowledge.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine software engineering's CI/CD philosophy with AI-driven experimental design to create an automated 'scientific verification pipeline' for scientific codebases.

papers.title: Comparison of sEMG Encoding Accuracy Across Speech Modes Using Articulatory and Phoneme Features
papers.summary: We test whether Speech Articulatory Coding (SPARC) features can linearly predict surface electromyography (sEMG) envelopes across aloud, mimed, and subvocal speech in twenty-four subjects. Using elastic-net multivariate temporal response function (mTRF) with sentence-level cross-validation, SPARC yields higher prediction accuracy than phoneme one-hot representations on nearly all electrodes and in all speech modes. Aloud and mimed speech perform comparably, and subvocal speech remains above chance, indicating detectable articulatory activity. Variance partitioning shows a substantial unique contribution from SPARC and a minimal unique contribution from phoneme features. mTRF weight patterns reveal anatomically interpretable relationships between electrode sites and articulatory movements that remain consistent across modes. This study focuses on representation/encoding analysis (not end-to-end decoding) and supports SPARC as a robust and interpretable intermediate target for sEMG-based silent-speech modeling.

ai.tldr: 本研究比较了在不同语音模式下，使用发音特征（SPARC）和音素特征预测表面肌电信号的准确性。结果表明，SPARC特征在几乎所有电极和语音模式下都优于音素特征，为基于sEMG的无声语音建模提供了鲁棒且可解释的中间目标。
ai.motivation: 探索用于表面肌电信号编码的更优特征表示，以支持无声语音接口的开发。
ai.method: 使用弹性网多元时间响应函数模型，在句子级别交叉验证下，比较SPARC发音特征和音素独热编码对sEMG包络的线性预测能力。
ai.result: SPARC特征在几乎所有电极和语音模式（出声、默读、默想）下预测精度更高；出声和默读语音表现相当，默想语音仍高于随机水平；方差分解显示SPARC贡献显著，音素特征贡献极小；mTRF权重模式揭示了电极位点与发音运动之间解剖学上可解释的关系。
ai.help_to_user: 本研究提供了发音特征在肌电信号编码中优越性的证据，为设计更有效的无声语音识别系统提供了特征选择依据。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个实时系统，利用SPARC特征从sEMG中解码发音运动意图，用于辅助通信或虚拟现实交互。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在跨被试或跨语言场景下的泛化能力尚不明确；默想语音的信号较弱，可能影响实际应用的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可结合发音运动特征与深度学习模型，探索端到端的无声语音解码，同时保持模型的可解释性。

en.tldr: This study compares the accuracy of articulatory (SPARC) versus phoneme features in predicting surface electromyography envelopes across different speech modes. Results show SPARC features outperform phoneme features on nearly all electrodes and modes, supporting SPARC as a robust and interpretable intermediate target for sEMG-based silent-speech modeling.
en.motivation: To investigate superior feature representations for encoding surface electromyography signals to support the development of silent-speech interfaces.
en.method: Using elastic-net multivariate temporal response function modeling with sentence-level cross-validation to compare the linear predictive power of SPARC articulatory features and phoneme one-hot encodings for sEMG envelopes.
en.result: SPARC features yield higher prediction accuracy than phoneme features on nearly all electrodes and across aloud, mimed, and subvocal speech modes; aloud and mimed speech perform comparably, and subvocal speech remains above chance; variance partitioning shows substantial unique contribution from SPARC and minimal unique contribution from phoneme features; mTRF weight patterns reveal anatomically interpretable electrode-articulation relationships consistent across modes.
en.help_to_user: This study provides evidence for the superiority of articulatory features in sEMG encoding, offering a feature selection basis for designing more effective silent-speech recognition systems.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a real-time system that decodes articulatory movement intent from sEMG using SPARC features for assistive communication or virtual reality interaction.
idea_spark.risk: Model generalization across subjects or languages is unclear; the weaker signal in subvocal speech may impact robustness in practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine articulatory movement features with deep learning models to explore end-to-end silent-speech decoding while maintaining interpretability.

papers.title: VOLT: Volumetric Wide-Field Microscopy via 3D-Native Probabilistic Transport
papers.summary: Three-dimensional (3D) wide-field fluorescence microscopy is a widely used modality for volumetric imaging, but suffers from characteristic out-of-focus blur. Existing reconstruction methods either struggle to operate on high-dimensional volumes or fail to provide credibility characterization of the reconstruction. In this work, we introduce Volumetric Transport (VOLT), a 3D-native probabilistic framework for wide-field fluorescence microscopy reconstruction. VOLT combines a transport-based formulation that maps degraded measurements to clean volumes via stochastic interpolants with a 3D-native anisotropic network that separates lateral and axial processing. This design operates directly in voxel space and achieves improved scalability to large volumes without relying on slice-wise approximations. We develop both stochastic (SDE) and deterministic (ODE) variants within the same framework. We validate VOLT on simulated wide-field microscopy datasets. Our results show that VOLT significantly improves reconstruction quality in both lateral and axial directions while providing voxel-wise credibility estimates.

ai.tldr: VOLT是一种用于宽场荧光显微镜三维重建的3D原生概率框架，通过随机插值映射退化测量到清晰体积，并提供体素级可信度估计。
ai.motivation: 三维宽场荧光显微镜广泛用于体积成像，但存在特征性离焦模糊。现有重建方法难以处理高维体积或无法提供重建可信度表征。
ai.method: 结合基于传输的公式（通过随机插值将退化测量映射到清晰体积）与3D原生各向异性网络（分离横向和轴向处理），直接在体素空间操作，无需切片近似。开发了随机（SDE）和确定性（ODE）变体。
ai.result: 在模拟宽场显微镜数据集上验证，VOLT显著提高了横向和轴向的重建质量，同时提供体素级可信度估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为三维宽场显微镜重建提供了可扩展的概率框架，改善重建质量并量化不确定性。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机插值与3D感知网络结合，直接处理体素数据并分离横向/轴向特征
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于模拟数据验证，真实样本性能待确认；计算复杂度可能较高
idea_spark.inspiration: 概率传输思想可扩展到其他3D成像模态；各向异性设计可用于多尺度生物结构分析

en.tldr: VOLT is a 3D-native probabilistic framework for wide-field fluorescence microscopy reconstruction that maps degraded measurements to clean volumes via stochastic interpolants and provides voxel-wise credibility estimates.

idea_spark.inspiration: Probabilistic transport approach could extend to other 3D imaging modalities; anisotropic design applicable to multi-scale biological structure analysis

papers.title: Harmoniq: Efficient Data Augmentation on a Quantum Computer Inspired by Harmonic Analysis
papers.summary: Quantum machine learning has attracted significant interest in recent years. Most existing approaches, however, are variational in nature and require extensive parameter optimization subroutines. Here, we propose a conceptually distinct quantum machine learning approach that goes beyond the variational paradigm. Harmoniq takes a novel data augmentation technique from quantum harmonic analysis and approximates it as a stochastic mixture of n-qubit circuits with (at most) quadratic depth each. A key strength of Harmoniq is its modularity: viewed as a quantum process acting on density matrices, it can readily be combined with other quantum data processing and learning subroutines. A subsequent case study demonstrates this modularity by combining Harmoniq with stochastic amplitude encoding for the input density matrix and quantum PCA on the output density matrix. This results in a promising signal denoising pipeline that works particularly well in the small sample size regime.

ai.tldr: Harmoniq是一种受调和分析启发的量子数据增强方法，它使用二次深度电路的随机混合，超越了变分范式，并可与其它量子数据处理模块结合。
ai.motivation: 现有量子机器学习方法多为变分方法，需要大量参数优化。本文提出一种概念上不同的非变分方法。
ai.method: 从量子调和分析中提取新的数据增强技术，将其近似为最多二次深度的n量子比特电路的随机混合。该方法具有模块化特性，可与其它量子数据处理子程序结合。
ai.result: 案例研究表明，将Harmoniq与随机幅度编码和量子PCA结合，可构建一个在小样本情况下表现优异的信号去噪流程。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、模块化的量子数据增强框架，特别适用于小样本量子机器学习任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将经典调和分析的数据增强原理量子化，用浅层电路的随机混合实现
idea_spark.risk: 实际量子硬件噪声可能影响随机混合的精度
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将更多经典信号处理/分析工具移植到量子计算框架中

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将更多经典信号处理/分析工具移植到量子计算框架中

en.tldr: Harmoniq is a quantum data augmentation method inspired by harmonic analysis, using stochastic mixtures of quadratic-depth circuits, moving beyond the variational paradigm and enabling modular integration with other quantum data processing routines.
en.motivation: Most existing quantum machine learning approaches are variational and require extensive parameter optimization. This work proposes a conceptually distinct non-variational approach.
en.method: Extracts a novel data augmentation technique from quantum harmonic analysis and approximates it as a stochastic mixture of n-qubit circuits with at most quadratic depth. The method is modular and can be combined with other quantum data processing subroutines.
en.result: A case study demonstrates that combining Harmoniq with stochastic amplitude encoding and quantum PCA creates a promising signal denoising pipeline that performs particularly well in the small sample size regime.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, modular quantum data augmentation framework especially suitable for small-sample quantum machine learning tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Quantum implementation of classical harmonic analysis-based data augmentation using stochastic mixtures of shallow circuits
idea_spark.risk: Quantum hardware noise may affect the precision of stochastic mixtures
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires porting more classical signal processing/analysis tools to quantum computing frameworks

papers.title: 'The Order in the Horse's Heart': A Case Study in LLM-Assisted Stylometry for the Discovery of Biblical Allusion in Modern Literary Fiction
papers.summary: We present a dual-track pipeline for detecting biblical allusions in literary fiction and apply it to the novels of Cormac McCarthy. A bottom-up embedding track uses inverse document frequency to identify rare vocabulary shared with the King James Bible, embeds occurrences in their local context for sense disambiguation, and passes candidate passage pairs through cascaded LLM review. A top-down register track asks an LLM to read McCarthy's prose undirected to any specific biblical passage for comparison, catching allusions not distinguished by word or phrase rarity. Both tracks are cross-validated by a long-context model that holds entire novels alongside the KJV in a single pass, and every finding is checked against published scholarship. Restricting attention to allusions that carry a textual echo--shared phrasing, reworked vocabulary, or transplanted cadence--and distinguishing literary allusions proper from signposted biblical references (similes naming biblical figures, characters overtly citing scripture), the pipeline surfaces 349 allusions across the corpus. Among a target set of 115 previously documented allusions retrieved through human review of the academic literature, the pipeline independently recovers 62 (54% recall), with recall varying by connection type from 30% (transformed imagery) to 80% (register collisions). We contextualise these results with respect to the value-add from LLMs as assistants to mechanical stylometric analyses, and their potential to facilitate the statistical study of intertextuality in massive literary corpora.

ai.tldr: 提出双轨管道检测文学小说中的圣经典故，应用于科马克·麦卡锡小说，结合词频统计与LLM分析，发现349处典故，在已知典故中召回率达54%。
ai.motivation: 传统文学分析依赖专家人工识别典故，难以处理大规模文本。需要自动化方法辅助发现文学中的圣经互文性。
ai.method: 自下而上轨道：通过逆文档频率识别罕见共享词汇，上下文嵌入消歧，级联LLM审查候选段落。自上而下轨道：LLM无指导阅读文本识别风格碰撞。双轨结果由长上下文模型交叉验证。
ai.result: 在麦卡锡全集中发现349处带文本回响的典故，在115处已知典故中独立召回62处（54%），召回率因连接类型从30%到80%不等。
ai.help_to_user: 为文学研究者提供自动化典故检测工具，可扩展至大规模文本分析，辅助发现隐晦的互文联系。

idea_spark.idea: 将风格碰撞检测应用于不同作者间的影响研究，或用于识别特定历史时期的语言印记。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能产生幻觉性关联，需人工验证；罕见词汇方法可能遗漏语义转换的典故。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合统计特征与生成式模型的多层次验证思路，可用于版权相似性检测或学术不端识别。

en.tldr: A dual-track pipeline detects biblical allusions in literary fiction, applied to Cormac McCarthy's novels. Combining IDF statistics with LLM analysis, it identifies 349 allusions with 54% recall on known references.
en.motivation: Traditional literary analysis relies on expert manual identification of allusions, which is infeasible for large corpora. Automated methods are needed to assist in discovering biblical intertextuality in literature.
en.method: Bottom-up track: uses inverse document frequency to identify rare shared vocabulary, embeds occurrences for sense disambiguation, and cascades LLM review. Top-down track: LLM reads prose undirected to catch stylistic collisions. Both tracks are cross-validated by a long-context model.
en.result: 349 allusions with textual echoes found across McCarthy's corpus. Independently recovered 62 of 115 previously documented allusions (54% recall), with recall varying from 30% (transformed imagery) to 80% (register collisions).
en.help_to_user: Provides literary scholars with automated allusion detection tools scalable to massive corpora, aiding discovery of subtle intertextual connections.

idea_spark.idea: Apply register collision detection to influence studies between authors, or to identify linguistic imprints of specific historical periods.
idea_spark.risk: LLMs may generate hallucinated associations requiring human verification; rare-word methods may miss semantically transformed allusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Multi-level validation combining statistical features with generative models could be adapted for copyright similarity detection or academic integrity checking.

papers.title: GraphRAG-IRL: Personalized Recommendation with Graph-Grounded Inverse Reinforcement Learning and LLM Re-ranking
papers.summary: Personalized recommendation requires models that capture sequential user preferences while remaining robust to sparse feedback and semantic ambiguity. Recent work has explored large language models (LLMs) as recommenders and re-rankers, but pure prompt-based ranking often suffers from poor calibration, sensitivity to candidate ordering, and popularity bias. These limitations make LLMs useful semantic reasoners, but unreliable as standalone ranking engines.   We present \textbf{GraphRAG-IRL}, a hybrid recommendation framework that combines graph-grounded feature construction, inverse reinforcement learning (IRL), and persona-guided LLM re-ranking. Our method constructs a heterogeneous knowledge graph over items, categories, and concepts, retrieves both individual and community preference context, and uses these signals to train a Maximum Entropy IRL model for calibrated pre-ranking. An LLM is then applied only to a short candidate list, where persona-guided prompts provide complementary semantic judgments that are fused with IRL rankings.   Experiments show that GraphRAG-IRL is a strong standalone recommender: IRL-MLP with GraphRAG improves NDCG@10 by 15.7\% on MovieLens and 16.6\% on KuaiRand over supervised baselines. The results also show that IRL and GraphRAG are superadditive, with the combined gain exceeding the sum of their individual improvements. Persona-guided LLM fusion further improves ranking quality, yielding up to 16.8\% NDCG@10 improvement over the IRL-only baseline on MovieLens ml-1m, while score fusion on KuaiRand provides consistent gains of 4--6\% across LLM providers.

ai.tldr: GraphRAG-IRL是一个混合推荐框架，结合了基于图的知识特征构建、逆强化学习和基于人物画像的LLM重排序，以解决传统LLM排序的校准问题和语义模糊性。
ai.motivation: 现有基于提示的LLM推荐器存在校准差、对候选顺序敏感和流行度偏差等问题，使其不适合作为独立的排序引擎。
ai.method: 构建物品、类别和概念的异质知识图，检索个体和群体偏好上下文，训练最大熵逆强化学习模型进行校准预排序，然后对短候选列表应用基于人物画像的LLM提示进行语义判断，并与IRL排序结果融合。
ai.result: 在MovieLens和KuaiRand数据集上，IRL-MLP与GraphRAG结合比监督基线NDCG@10分别提升15.7%和16.6%；IRL与GraphRAG具有超加性效应；基于人物画像的LLM融合在MovieLens ml-1m上比纯IRL基线进一步提升16.8% NDCG@10。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要高精度、可解释且能处理稀疏反馈的个性化推荐系统开发者提供了混合架构参考，特别是如何将图学习、强化学习和LLM语义能力有效结合。

idea_spark.idea: 将IRL作为校准的预排序器，限制LLM仅处理短列表，既利用LLM的语义推理，又避免其排序不可靠问题。
idea_spark.risk: 知识图构建质量对整体性能影响较大；不同领域的人物画像定义可能具有挑战性；计算成本可能高于纯LLM或传统方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将图结构先验知识与数据驱动的强化学习结合，为LLM提供更丰富的上下文；展示了模块化混合系统设计的优势。

en.tldr: GraphRAG-IRL is a hybrid recommendation framework combining graph-grounded feature construction, inverse reinforcement learning, and persona-guided LLM re-ranking to address calibration issues and semantic ambiguity in pure LLM-based ranking.
en.motivation: Existing prompt-based LLM recommenders suffer from poor calibration, sensitivity to candidate ordering, and popularity bias, making them unreliable as standalone ranking engines.
en.method: Construct a heterogeneous knowledge graph over items, categories, and concepts; retrieve individual and community preference context; train a Maximum Entropy IRL model for calibrated pre-ranking; apply persona-guided LLM prompts to a short candidate list for semantic judgments fused with IRL rankings.
en.result: IRL-MLP with GraphRAG improves NDCG@10 by 15.7% on MovieLens and 16.6% on KuaiRand over supervised baselines; IRL and GraphRAG show superadditive effects; persona-guided LLM fusion yields up to 16.8% NDCG@10 improvement over IRL-only baseline on MovieLens ml-1m.
en.help_to_user: Provides a hybrid architecture reference for developers building high-precision, interpretable personalized recommendation systems that handle sparse feedback, particularly on effectively combining graph learning, reinforcement learning, and LLM semantic capabilities.

idea_spark.idea: Using IRL as a calibrated pre-ranker to restrict LLM to a short list leverages LLM's semantic reasoning while avoiding its ranking unreliability.
idea_spark.risk: Performance heavily depends on knowledge graph construction quality; persona definition may be challenging across domains; computational cost may be higher than pure LLM or traditional methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining graph-structured prior knowledge with data-driven reinforcement learning to provide richer context for LLMs; demonstrates advantages of modular hybrid system design.

papers.title: The non-perturbative topological string: from resurgence to wall-crossing of DT invariants
papers.summary: We study the resurgence structure of the topological string partition function, with an emphasis on the Borel analysis of the instanton amplitudes. To this end, we introduce a differential operator that implements the pointed alien derivative when acting on the topological string partition function and its iterated alien derivatives. We show that the algebra of alien derivatives is isomorphic to the Kontsevich-Soibelman Lie algebra, thus establishing a direct link between the resurgence of the topological string and wall-crossing of generalized Donaldson-Thomas invariants. Numerically, we continue the exploration of the Borel plane of the quintic and local $\mathbb{P}^2$. For the latter, we identify Borel singularities due to bound states involving D4-branes, and match the associated Stokes constants to the appropriate Donaldson-Thomas invariants. Finally, we identify the manifestation of a D2-brane decay in the Borel plane, and match to theoretical predictions.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了拓扑弦配分函数的复现结构，通过引入微分算子实现指向外星导数，建立了外星导数代数与Kontsevich-Soibelman李代数的同构，从而将拓扑弦的复现与广义Donaldson-Thomas不变量的壁交叉直接联系起来。
ai.motivation: 探索拓扑弦配分函数的非微扰结构，特别是瞬子幅度的Borel分析，以理解其与Donaldson-Thomas不变量壁交叉的深层联系。
ai.method: 引入实现指向外星导数的微分算子，作用于拓扑弦配分函数及其迭代外星导数；对五次曲面和局部ℙ²的Borel平面进行数值探索，识别D-膜束缚态导致的Borel奇点。
ai.result: 证明了外星导数代数与Kontsevich-Soibelman李代数同构；识别了局部ℙ²中D4-膜束缚态引起的Borel奇点，并将相关Stokes常数与对应Donaldson-Thomas不变量匹配；观测到D2-膜衰变在Borel平面中的表现并与理论预测一致。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解拓扑弦理论的非微扰结构提供了新工具，建立了复现理论与Donaldson-Thomas不变量壁交叉之间的直接对应关系。

idea_spark.idea: 利用微分算子实现外星导数的具体计算，将抽象的复现结构转化为可操作的代数框架。
idea_spark.risk: 数值Borel分析对具体模型依赖较强，广义结论需更多案例验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法为研究其他弦理论或量子引力模型的非微扰效应提供了代数化途径。

idea_spark.idea: Using differential operators to concretely compute alien derivatives transforms abstract resurgence structures into an operational algebraic framework.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical Borel analysis is highly model-dependent, requiring more cases to validate generalized conclusions.
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach provides an algebraic pathway for studying non-perturbative effects in other string theories or quantum gravity models.

papers.title: DDF2Pol: A Dual-Domain Feature Fusion Network for PolSAR Image Classification
papers.summary: This paper presents DDF2Pol, a lightweight dual-domain convolutional neural network for PolSAR image classification. The proposed architecture integrates two parallel feature extraction streams, one real-valued and one complex-valued, designed to capture complementary spatial and polarimetric information from PolSAR data. To further refine the extracted features, a depth-wise convolution layer is employed for spatial enhancement, followed by a coordinate attention mechanism to focus on the most informative regions. Experimental evaluations conducted on two benchmark datasets, Flevoland and San Francisco, demonstrate that DDF2Pol achieves superior classification performance while maintaining low model complexity. Specifically, it attains an Overall Accuracy (OA) of 98.16% on the Flevoland dataset and 96.12% on the San Francisco dataset, outperforming several state-of-the-art real- and complex-valued models. With only 91,371 parameters, DDF2Pol offers a practical and efficient solution for accurate PolSAR image analysis, even when training data is limited. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/DDF2Pol

ai.tldr: DDF2Pol：一种用于PolSAR图像分类的轻量级双域特征融合网络，通过并行实值与复值流提取互补特征，在低参数量下实现高精度。
ai.motivation: PolSAR图像分类需要有效融合空间与极化信息，现有模型参数量大或特征提取不充分，需要轻量高效的解决方案。
ai.method: 提出双域并行特征提取流（实值CNN与复值CNN），结合深度卷积进行空间增强，并引入坐标注意力机制聚焦关键区域。
ai.result: 在Flevoland和San Francisco数据集上分别达到98.16%和96.12%的总体精度，仅需91,371个参数，优于现有实值/复值模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为PolSAR图像分类提供了一种参数量小、精度高的实用网络架构，特别适合训练数据有限的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将实值CNN的通用空间特征提取能力与复值CNN对极化信息的专门处理相结合，通过轻量设计实现高效分类。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于特定极化数据格式，泛化到其他模态遥感数据需调整。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在多模态数据（如光学+SAR）或信号处理中设计并行异构特征流，并通过注意力机制实现自适应特征选择。

en.tldr: DDF2Pol: a lightweight dual-domain feature fusion network for PolSAR image classification that extracts complementary features via parallel real- and complex-valued streams, achieving high accuracy with low parameter count.
en.motivation: PolSAR image classification requires effective fusion of spatial and polarimetric information; existing models are often parameter-heavy or insufficient in feature extraction, necessitating a lightweight and efficient solution.
en.method: Proposes dual parallel feature extraction streams (real-valued CNN and complex-valued CNN), employs depth-wise convolution for spatial enhancement, and incorporates a coordinate attention mechanism to focus on informative regions.
en.result: Achieves Overall Accuracy of 98.16% on Flevoland and 96.12% on San Francisco datasets with only 91,371 parameters, outperforming state-of-the-art real- and complex-valued models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical network architecture with low parameters and high accuracy for PolSAR image classification, especially suitable for scenarios with limited training data.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the general spatial feature extraction capability of real-valued CNNs with the specialized processing of polarimetric information by complex-valued CNNs, achieving efficiency through lightweight design.
idea_spark.risk: The method may rely on specific polarimetric data formats; generalization to other remote sensing modalities may require adaptation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires designing parallel heterogeneous feature streams for multimodal data (e.g., optical+SAR) or signal processing, and using attention mechanisms for adaptive feature selection.

papers.title: IR-Flow: Bridging Discriminative and Generative Image Restoration via Rectified Flow
papers.summary: In image restoration, single-step discriminative mappings often lack fine details via expectation learning, whereas generative paradigms suffer from inefficient multi-step sampling and noise-residual coupling. To address this dilemma, we propose IR-Flow, a novel image restoration method based on Rectified Flow that serves as a unified framework bridging the gap between discriminative and generative paradigms. Specifically, we first construct multilevel data distribution flows, which expand the ability of models to learn from and adapt to various levels of degradation. Subsequently, cumulative velocity fields are proposed to learn transport trajectories across varying degradation levels, guiding intermediate states toward the clean target, while a multi-step consistency constraint is presented to enforce trajectory coherence and boost few-step restoration performance. We show that directly establishing a linear transport flow between degraded and clean image domains not only enables fast inference but also improves adaptability to out-of-distribution degradations. Extensive evaluations on deraining, denoising and raindrop removal tasks demonstrate that IR-Flow achieves competitive quantitative results with only a few sampling steps, offering an efficient and flexible framework that maintains an excellent distortion-perception balance. Our code is available at https://github.com/fanzh03/IR-Flow.

ai.tldr: IR-Flow 是一种基于 Rectified Flow 的图像修复方法，通过构建多级数据分布流和累积速度场，在判别式和生成式范式之间架起桥梁，实现高效、灵活的修复。
ai.motivation: 图像修复中，单步判别式映射常缺乏细节，而生成式方法则存在多步采样效率低和噪声-残差耦合的问题。需要一种统一框架来弥合这一差距。
ai.method: 首先构建多级数据分布流以增强模型对不同退化级别的学习和适应能力；随后提出累积速度场来学习跨退化级别的传输轨迹，引导中间状态向干净目标移动；同时引入多步一致性约束以确保轨迹连贯性并提升少步修复性能。
ai.result: 在去雨、去噪和雨滴去除任务上的广泛评估表明，IR-Flow 仅需少量采样步骤即可获得有竞争力的定量结果，提供了一个高效、灵活的框架，并保持了出色的失真-感知平衡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将判别式与生成式图像修复统一起来的高效框架，适用于需要快速推理和良好泛化能力的修复任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将多级退化建模为连续流，并通过累积速度场引导修复轨迹，可启发更精细的退化过程控制。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于对退化级别的准确建模，在未知或极端退化情况下性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过构建从退化到干净的线性流来统一判别与生成范式，为设计高效生成式修复模型提供了新思路。

en.tldr: IR-Flow is an image restoration method based on Rectified Flow that bridges discriminative and generative paradigms via multilevel data distribution flows and cumulative velocity fields, enabling efficient and flexible restoration.
en.motivation: In image restoration, single-step discriminative mappings often lack fine details, while generative paradigms suffer from inefficient multi-step sampling and noise-residual coupling. A unified framework is needed to address this gap.
en.method: Construct multilevel data distribution flows to enhance model ability to learn and adapt to various degradation levels; propose cumulative velocity fields to learn transport trajectories across degradation levels, guiding intermediate states toward the clean target; introduce a multi-step consistency constraint to enforce trajectory coherence and boost few-step restoration performance.

idea_spark.idea: Modeling multilevel degradations as a continuous flow and guiding restoration trajectories via cumulative velocity fields could inspire finer control over degradation processes.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under unknown or extreme degradations, as the method relies on accurate modeling of degradation levels.
idea_spark.inspiration: Unifying discriminative and generative paradigms by constructing a linear flow from degraded to clean domains offers a new direction for designing efficient generative restoration models.

papers.title: A Tight Channel-Capacity Lower Bound for the Simultaneous Wireless Information and Power Transfer Integrated Receiver
papers.summary: Contrary to the vast majority of works on simultaneous wireless information and power transfer that provide information-theoretic limits for the separate receiver architecture, in this work we focus on the integrated receiver and provide a channel-capacity lower bound. Towards this, we provide a closed-form tight approximation for the probability transition matrix of the channel by leveraging the 4th-order Taylor expansion of the current-voltage characteristic curve of a Schottky diode used for rectification. Numerical results reveal that the consideration of the gamma distribution as an input distribution leads to a tight channel-capacity lower bound, in contrast to other input distributions, such as the Rayleigh and uniform ones. Furthermore, the results reveal that the consideration of the 4th order term in the Taylor expansion leads to a notably higher capacity with respect to the overly simplified 2nd order term-based model.

ai.tldr: 本文针对集成接收器的同时无线信息与能量传输系统，通过肖特基二极管整流特性的四阶泰勒展开，推导了紧致的信道容量下界。
ai.motivation: 现有研究多关注分离式接收架构的信息论极限，而集成接收器的信道容量分析尚不充分。
ai.method: 利用肖特基二极管电流-电压特性的四阶泰勒展开，推导信道概率转移矩阵的闭式紧近似，并比较不同输入分布（伽马、瑞利、均匀）的性能。
ai.result: 数值结果表明：伽马分布作为输入分布可获得紧致的容量下界；四阶泰勒模型比简化的二阶模型显著提升容量估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为集成接收器的SWIPT系统提供了严格的理论分析框架与容量下界计算方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将高阶泰勒展开与信息论结合，提升实际非线性硬件系统的容量分析精度。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖于特定二极管特性，实际器件偏差可能影响结果普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对实际硬件非线性进行高阶建模，以更准确评估通信-能量联合系统的理论极限。
