en.tldr: This paper derives a tight channel-capacity lower bound for integrated receivers in simultaneous wireless information and power transfer systems, using a 4th-order Taylor expansion of Schottky diode rectification characteristics.
en.motivation: Most existing works focus on information-theoretic limits for separate receiver architectures, while capacity analysis for integrated receivers remains insufficient.
en.method: Derives a closed-form tight approximation for the channel probability transition matrix via 4th-order Taylor expansion of the Schottky diode's current-voltage characteristic, comparing performance under different input distributions (gamma, Rayleigh, uniform).
en.result: Numerical results show: gamma input distribution yields a tight capacity lower bound; the 4th-order Taylor model significantly improves capacity estimation over the oversimplified 2nd-order model.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous theoretical framework and computational method for capacity lower bounds in SWIPT integrated receivers.

idea_spark.idea: Combining high-order Taylor expansion with information theory to improve capacity analysis accuracy for practical nonlinear hardware systems.
idea_spark.risk: Model depends on specific diode characteristics; practical device variations may limit generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires high-order modeling of practical hardware nonlinearities for more accurate evaluation of theoretical limits in joint communication-energy systems.

papers.title: TESO: Online Tracking of Essential Matrix by Stochastic Optimization
papers.summary: Maintaining long-term accuracy of stereo camera calibration parameters is important for autonomous systems' perception. This work proposes Online Tracking of Essential Matrix by Stochastic Optimization (TESO). The core mechanisms of TESO are: 1) a robust loss function based on kernel correlation over tentative correspondences, 2) an adaptive online stochastic optimization on the essential manifold. TESO has low CPU and memory requirements, relies on a few hyperparameters, and eliminates the need for data-driven training, enabling the usage in resource-constrained online perception systems. We evaluated the influence of TESO on geometric precision, rectification quality, and stereo depth consistency. On the large-scale MAN TruckScenes dataset, TESO tracks rotational calibration drift with 0.12 deg precision in the Y-axis (critical for stereo accuracy) while the X- and Z-axes are five times more precise. Tracking applied to sequences with simulated drift shows similar precision with respect to the reference as tracking applied to no-drift sequences, indicating the tracker is unbiased. On the KITTI dataset, TESO revealed systematic inconsistencies in extrinsic parameters across stereo pairs, confirming previous published findings. We verified that intrinsic decalibration affected these errors, as evidenced by the conflicting behavior of the rectification and depth metrics. After correcting the reference calibration, TESO improved its rotation precision around the Y-axis 20 times to 0.025 deg and its depth accuracy 50 times. Despite its lightweight design, direct optimization of the proposed TESO loss function alone achieves accuracy comparable to that of neural network-based single-frame methods.

ai.tldr: TESO是一种通过随机优化在线跟踪本质矩阵的方法，用于长期维持立体相机标定参数的准确性，适用于资源受限的在线感知系统。
ai.motivation: 自主系统的感知需要长期保持立体相机标定参数的准确性，传统方法在在线、资源受限场景下存在局限。
ai.method: 提出基于核相关鲁棒损失函数和本质流形自适应在线随机优化的核心机制。
ai.result: 在MAN TruckScenes数据集上，Y轴旋转标定漂移跟踪精度达0.12度；在KITTI数据集上，修正参考标定后，Y轴旋转精度提升20倍至0.025度，深度精度提升50倍。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种轻量级、无需数据训练、超参数少的在线标定跟踪方案，可直接优化损失函数达到与神经网络单帧方法相当的精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将核相关鲁棒损失与自适应在线随机优化应用于本质矩阵跟踪。
idea_spark.risk: 在极端光照或纹理缺失场景下，对应点匹配可能失效，影响跟踪稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 轻量级优化方法在几何视觉任务中可达到与数据驱动方法相当的精度，为资源受限系统提供了新思路。

en.tldr: TESO is a method for online tracking of the essential matrix via stochastic optimization, designed to maintain long-term accuracy of stereo camera calibration parameters for resource-constrained online perception systems.
en.motivation: Long-term accuracy of stereo camera calibration is crucial for autonomous perception, but existing methods are limited in online, resource-constrained settings.
en.method: Core mechanisms include a robust loss function based on kernel correlation over tentative correspondences and adaptive online stochastic optimization on the essential manifold.
en.result: On the MAN TruckScenes dataset, rotational calibration drift tracking achieved 0.12 deg precision in the Y-axis. On KITTI, after correcting reference calibration, rotation precision improved 20x to 0.025 deg in the Y-axis and depth accuracy improved 50x.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, training-free, low-hyperparameter online calibration tracking solution; direct optimization of the proposed loss achieves accuracy comparable to neural network-based single-frame methods.

idea_spark.idea: Apply kernel correlation robust loss and adaptive online stochastic optimization to essential matrix tracking.
idea_spark.risk: In extreme lighting or textureless scenes, correspondence matching may fail, affecting tracking stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Lightweight optimization methods can achieve accuracy comparable to data-driven approaches in geometric vision tasks, offering a new direction for resource-constrained systems.

papers.title: AI-Enabled Image-Based Hybrid Vision/Force Control of Tendon-Driven Aerial Continuum Manipulators
papers.summary: This paper presents an AI-enabled cascaded hybrid vision/force control framework for tendon-driven aerial continuum manipulators based on constant-strain modeling in $SE(3)$ as a coupled system. The proposed controller is designed to enable autonomous, physical interaction with a static environment while stabilizing the image feature error. The developed strategy combines the cascaded fast fixed-time sliding mode control and a radial basis function neural network to cope with the uncertainties in the image acquired by the eye-in-hand monocular camera and the measurements from the force sensing apparatus. This ensures rapid, online learning of the vision- and force-related uncertainties without requiring offline training. Furthermore, the features are extracted via a state-of-the-art graph neural network architecture employed by a visual servoing framework using line features, rather than relying on heuristic geometric line extractors, to concurrently contribute to tracking the desired normal interaction force during contact and regulating the image feature error. A comparative study benchmarks the proposed controller against established rigid-arm aerial manipulation methods, evaluating robustness across diverse scenarios and feature extraction strategies. The simulation and experimental results showcase the effectiveness of the proposed methodology under various initial conditions and demonstrate robust performance in executing manipulation tasks.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的级联混合视觉/力控制框架，用于肌腱驱动空中连续体机械臂，实现与静态环境的自主物理交互。
ai.motivation: 现有刚性臂空中操纵方法在处理连续体机械臂的不确定性和复杂交互时存在局限，需要一种能同时稳定视觉特征误差和跟踪期望接触力的鲁棒控制策略。
ai.method: 采用SE(3)空间中的常应变建模，结合级联快速固定时间滑模控制和径向基函数神经网络，处理眼在手单目相机图像和力传感装置的不确定性；使用图神经网络提取线特征进行视觉伺服。
ai.result: 仿真和实验结果表明，该方法在各种初始条件下均有效，能鲁棒执行操纵任务，性能优于传统刚性臂方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为连续体空中机械臂的自主物理交互提供了一种免离线训练、能在线学习不确定性的混合控制解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将常应变建模与固定时间滑模控制结合，增强系统在SE(3)空间中对不确定性的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于准确的单目相机和力传感器测量；在动态环境或快速运动场景中性能待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将图神经网络用于其他传感器融合任务；固定时间控制与神经网络的结合可扩展至更多非线性系统。

en.tldr: This paper presents an AI-enabled cascaded hybrid vision/force control framework for tendon-driven aerial continuum manipulators to enable autonomous physical interaction with a static environment.
en.motivation: Existing rigid-arm aerial manipulation methods have limitations in handling uncertainties and complex interactions for continuum manipulators, necessitating a robust control strategy that simultaneously stabilizes image feature error and tracks desired contact forces.
en.method: Uses constant-strain modeling in SE(3), combined with cascaded fast fixed-time sliding mode control and a radial basis function neural network to cope with uncertainties from an eye-in-hand monocular camera and force sensor; employs a graph neural network for line feature extraction in visual servoing.
en.result: Simulation and experimental results demonstrate the method's effectiveness under various initial conditions and robust performance in manipulation tasks, outperforming established rigid-arm methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a hybrid control solution for autonomous physical interaction of aerial continuum manipulators that requires no offline training and enables online learning of uncertainties.

idea_spark.idea: Combining constant-strain modeling with fixed-time sliding mode control enhances system robustness against uncertainties in SE(3) space.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on accurate monocular camera and force sensor measurements; performance in dynamic environments or high-speed scenarios requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of graph neural networks for other sensor fusion tasks; the combination of fixed-time control with neural networks can be extended to more nonlinear systems.

papers.title: Kazhdan-Lusztig Basis and Optimization
papers.summary: We describe a conjectural approach to obtaining canonical bases of the Hecke algebra at $q=1$ via continuous quadratic optimization. We focus on Specht modules $S^λ$ and proper cones inside $S^λ$ that are invariant under the action of $1+s$ for all simple reflections $s\in S$. We show that there are unique minimal and maximal cones invariant under all $1+s$. For hook shapes, two-column shapes, and partitions of the form $(n-2,2)$, we prove that the Kazhdan--Lusztig basis spans this maximal cone. More generally, we define an optimization problem over bases that are unitriangular with respect to the polytabloid basis, subject to the constraint that the operators $1+s$ act non-negatively. We prove that the feasible region forms a compact semialgebraic set, and interpret it in terms of a hierarchy of invariant cones under all $1+s$. We demonstrate that minimizing the trace of the Gram matrix uniquely recovers Young's seminormal basis. Furthermore, we verify computationally that maximization uniquely recovers the Kazhdan--Lusztig basis for all partitions of $n\leq 7$. In higher ranks, the optimization detects deviations from the Kazhdan--Lusztig basis and may favour other natural positive bases, such as the Springer basis or $p$-canonical bases. Finally, we extend this framework to irreducible representations of $\mathfrak{sl}_n$. We observe that the Gelfand--Tsetlin basis corresponds to the unique minimizer, and we conjecture that the canonical basis corresponds to the maximum in small ranks.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种通过连续二次优化获得Hecke代数在q=1处典范基的猜想方法，聚焦于Specht模及其在简单反射下不变的锥，证明极值锥的存在性，并将优化问题与KL基、Young半正规基等经典基的恢复联系起来。
ai.motivation: 在表示论和代数组合中，寻找Hecke代数和sl_n不可约表示的典范基是一个核心问题。传统构造方法复杂，本文探索能否通过优化框架系统性地获得这些基。
ai.method: 在Specht模中定义由所有简单反射的1+s算子非负作用约束的可行基集合，将其表述为紧半代数集。通过最小化Gram矩阵迹或最大化其他目标函数进行优化，研究其与已知基的对应关系。
ai.result: 对于钩形、两列及(n-2,2)分拆，证明了Kazhdan-Lusztig基张成最大不变锥；最小化迹唯一恢复Young半正规基；计算验证n≤7时最大化恢复KL基；高秩时优化可能偏好Springer基或p-典范基；在sl_n表示中，Gelfand-Tsetlin基对应唯一最小化器。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解Hecke代数和李代数表示中各种典范基提供了一个统一的优化视角，将代数问题转化为可计算的优化问题，揭示了不同基之间的极值性质。

idea_spark.idea: 用‘在简单反射作用下保持非负’作为约束来筛选基，再通过优化目标（如迹最小或某种‘最大’）挑选出特定的典范基。
idea_spark.risk: 优化问题的可行域在高维情况下可能非常复杂，唯一极值点的证明在一般情形下尚未完成，目前多为猜想和小规模验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 此框架可能推广到其他Coxeter群表示或量子群，或许能通过设计不同的优化目标来发现新的、具有良好性质的基。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a conjectural approach to obtaining canonical bases of the Hecke algebra at q=1 via continuous quadratic optimization. It focuses on Specht modules and cones invariant under simple reflections, proves existence of extremal cones, and links optimization problems to the recovery of classical bases like the KL basis and Young's seminormal basis.
en.motivation: Finding canonical bases for Hecke algebras and irreducible representations of sl_n is a central problem in representation theory and algebraic combinatorics. This work explores whether an optimization framework can systematically yield these bases, offering an alternative to traditional complex constructions.
en.method: Defines a feasible set of bases within Specht modules that are unitriangular with respect to the polytabloid basis and constrained by non-negative action of all 1+s operators. Formulates this as a compact semialgebraic set and studies optimization (minimizing trace of Gram matrix or maximizing other objectives) to recover known bases.
en.result: For hook shapes, two-column shapes, and partitions (n-2,2), the Kazhdan-Lusztig basis spans the maximal invariant cone. Minimizing the trace uniquely recovers Young's seminormal basis. Computational verification shows maximization recovers the KL basis for n≤7. In higher ranks, optimization may favor other positive bases like the Springer basis. For sl_n representations, the Gelfand-Tsetlin basis corresponds to the unique minimizer.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified optimization perspective for understanding various canonical bases in Hecke algebra and Lie algebra representation theory, transforming algebraic problems into computable optimization and revealing extremal properties of different bases.

idea_spark.idea: Using 'non-negativity under the action of 1+s for all simple reflections s' as a constraint to filter bases, then selecting specific canonical bases via optimization objectives (e.g., trace minimization or a 'maximal' property).
idea_spark.risk: The feasible region of the optimization can be highly complex in high dimensions. Proofs of unique extremal points in general cases remain conjectural, currently supported mainly by small-scale verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: This framework might be generalized to representations of other Coxeter groups or quantum groups. Designing different optimization objectives could potentially discover new bases with desirable properties.

papers.title: Learning Lifted Action Models from Unsupervised Visual Traces
papers.summary: Efficient construction of models capturing the preconditions and effects of actions is essential for applying AI planning in real-world domains. Extensive prior work has explored learning such models from high-level descriptions of state and/or action sequences. In this paper, we tackle a more challenging setting: learning lifted action models from sequences of state images, without action observation. We propose a deep learning framework that jointly learns state prediction, action prediction, and a lifted action model. We also introduce a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) to prevent prediction collapse and self-reinforcing errors among predictions. The MILP takes the predicted states, actions, and action model over a subset of traces and solves for logically consistent states, actions, and action model that are as close as possible to the original predictions. Pseudo-labels extracted from the MILP solution are then used to guide further training. Experiments across multiple domains show that integrating MILP-based correction helps the model escape local optima and converge toward globally consistent solutions.

ai.tldr: 本文提出一种从无监督视觉轨迹中学习提升动作模型的深度学习框架，结合混合整数线性规划确保逻辑一致性，帮助模型逃离局部最优。
ai.motivation: 在真实世界应用AI规划需要高效构建动作的预条件与效果模型。现有方法多从高层状态/动作序列描述中学习，而本文挑战从无动作观察的纯状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型。
ai.method: 提出深度学习框架联合学习状态预测、动作预测和提升动作模型。引入混合整数线性规划（MILP）防止预测崩溃和自我强化错误，通过求解逻辑一致解生成伪标签指导训练。
ai.result: 在多领域实验中，集成MILP校正帮助模型逃离局部最优，收敛至全局一致解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供从视觉输入直接学习符号化动作模型的方法，适用于机器人、自动驾驶等需从观察中推断动作模型的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将符号推理（MILP）与深度学习结合，用优化求解器的全局一致性解校正神经网络的局部预测。
idea_spark.risk: MILP求解可能计算开销大，难以扩展到极长序列或大规模动作集。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将逻辑约束集成到视觉序列理解中，用于学习可解释的世界模型。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a deep learning framework for learning lifted action models from unsupervised visual traces, integrating mixed-integer linear programming to ensure logical consistency and help escape local optima.
en.motivation: Efficient construction of action precondition and effect models is essential for applying AI planning in real-world domains. While prior work learns from high-level state/action sequences, this paper tackles the more challenging setting of learning lifted action models from state image sequences without action observation.
en.method: A deep learning framework jointly learns state prediction, action prediction, and a lifted action model. A mixed-integer linear program (MILP) prevents prediction collapse and self-reinforcing errors by solving for logically consistent states, actions, and action model close to original predictions, with pseudo-labels guiding further training.
en.result: Experiments across multiple domains show that integrating MILP-based correction helps the model escape local optima and converge toward globally consistent solutions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to learn symbolic action models directly from visual input, applicable to robotics, autonomous driving, and other scenarios requiring inference of action models from observations.

idea_spark.idea: Combine symbolic reasoning (MILP) with deep learning, using the globally consistent solution from an optimization solver to correct local predictions of neural networks.
idea_spark.risk: MILP solving may be computationally expensive and difficult to scale to very long sequences or large action sets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires integrating logical constraints into visual sequence understanding for learning interpretable world models.

papers.title: Autonomous Skeletal Landmark Localization towards Agentic C-Arm Control
papers.summary: Purpose: Automated C-arm positioning ensures timely treatment in patients requiring emergent interventions. When a conventional Deep Learning (DL) approach for C-arm control fails, clinicians must revert to manual operation, resulting in additional delays. Consequently, an agentic C-arm control framework based on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is highly desirable, as it can incorporate clinician feedback and use reasoning to make adjustments toward more accurate positioning. Skeletal landmark localization is essential for C-arm control, and we investigate adapting MLLMs for autonomous landmark localization.   Methods: We used an annotated synthetic X-ray dataset and a real X-ray dataset. Each X-ray in both datasets is paired with several skeletal landmarks. We fine-tuned two MLLMs and tasked them with retrieving the closest landmarks from each X-ray. Quantitative evaluations of landmark localization were performed and compared against a leading DL approach. We further conducted qualitative experiments demonstrating: (1) how an MLLM can correct an initially incorrect prediction through reasoning, and (2) how the MLLM can sequentially navigate the C-arm toward a target location.   Results: On both datasets, fine-tuned MLLMs demonstrate competitive performance across all localization tasks when compared with the DL approach. In the qualitative experiments, the MLLMs provide evidence of reasoning and spatial awareness.   Conclusion: This study shows that fine-tuned MLLMs achieve accurate skeletal landmark localization and hold promise for agentic autonomous C-arm control. Our code is available athttps://github.com/marszzibros/C-arm-localization-LLMs.git

ai.tldr: 本研究通过微调多模态大语言模型，实现了X光图像中骨骼标志点的自主定位，为智能C型臂的自主控制提供了基础。
ai.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在C型臂自动定位失败时需手动操作，导致治疗延迟。需要一种能结合临床反馈并进行推理调整的智能控制框架。
ai.method: 使用标注的合成与真实X光数据集，微调两个MLLM模型进行骨骼标志点检索，并与领先的DL方法进行定量比较，同时开展定性实验展示模型的推理与空间导航能力。
ai.result: 微调后的MLLM在两个数据集的所有定位任务中均表现出与DL方法相当的竞争性能，定性实验显示其具备推理能力和空间感知。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于MLLM的骨骼标志点定位新方法，展示了模型通过推理自我修正和逐步导航的潜力，代码已开源。

idea_spark.idea: 构建一个能理解临床指令、进行空间推理并逐步调整的智能C型臂控制系统。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在复杂真实手术场景中的泛化能力、实时性及安全验证仍需深入评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将大模型的对话与推理能力嵌入到医疗机器人控制闭环中，实现人机协同的精准操作。

en.tldr: This study achieves autonomous skeletal landmark localization in X-ray images by fine-tuning multimodal large language models, providing a foundation for agentic autonomous C-arm control.
en.motivation: When conventional deep learning approaches for C-arm control fail, clinicians must revert to manual operation, causing delays. An agentic framework that incorporates clinician feedback and uses reasoning for adjustments is highly desirable.
en.method: Using annotated synthetic and real X-ray datasets, two MLLMs were fine-tuned to retrieve skeletal landmarks. Quantitative evaluation was performed against a leading DL approach, and qualitative experiments demonstrated the model's reasoning and sequential navigation capabilities.
en.result: Fine-tuned MLLMs demonstrated competitive performance across all localization tasks on both datasets compared to the DL approach. Qualitative experiments provided evidence of reasoning and spatial awareness.
en.help_to_user: Presents a novel MLLM-based approach for skeletal landmark localization, showing the model's potential for self-correction through reasoning and sequential navigation. Code is publicly available.

idea_spark.idea: Building an intelligent C-arm control system that understands clinical instructions, performs spatial reasoning, and makes sequential adjustments.
idea_spark.risk: The model's generalization to complex real-world surgical scenarios, real-time performance, and safety verification require further evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires embedding the conversational and reasoning abilities of large models into the control loop of medical robots for human-in-the-loop precise manipulation.

papers.title: An Object-Centered Data Acquisition Method for 3D Gaussian Splatting using Mobile Phones
papers.summary: Data acquisition through mobile phones remains a challenge for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). In this work we target the object-centered scenario and enable reliable mobile acquisition by providing on-device capture guidance and recording onboard sensor signals for offline reconstruction. After the calibration step, the device orientations are aligned to a baseline frame to obtain relative poses, and the optical axis of the camera is mapped to an object-centered spherical grid for uniform viewpoint indexing. To curb polar sampling bias, we compute area-weighted spherical coverage in real-time and guide the user's motion accordingly. We compare the proposed method with RealityScan and the free-capture strategy. Our method achieves superior reconstruction quality using fewer input images compared to free capture and RealityScan. Further analysis shows that the proposed method is able to obtain more comprehensive and uniform viewpoint coverage during object-centered acquisition.

ai.tldr: 提出一种面向物体的移动手机数据采集方法，通过设备端捕获指导和传感器信号记录，提升3D高斯泼溅重建质量。
ai.motivation: 移动手机采集数据对3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）仍具挑战，现有方法在物体中心化场景下视角覆盖不均，影响重建质量。
ai.method: 校准设备方向并对齐基准帧获取相对位姿；将相机光轴映射到物体中心球面网格进行均匀视角索引；实时计算面积加权球面覆盖率，指导用户移动以抑制极区采样偏差。
ai.result: 与RealityScan及自由采集策略相比，本方法使用更少输入图像实现了更优的重建质量，获得了更全面均匀的视角覆盖。
ai.help_to_user: 为使用手机进行物体3D重建的研究者或开发者提供了一套可靠的采集流程与实时引导方案，可减少采集工作量并提升重建效果。

idea_spark.idea: 将设备传感器信号与视觉重建流程深度耦合，通过量化覆盖度指标闭环指导采集行为。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于手机传感器精度与校准稳定性，在低端设备或动态环境中性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将传统离线重建中的采样理论转化为实时交互式采集指导，实现“采集即重建”的端到端优化思路。

idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于手机传感器精度与校准稳定性，在低端设备或动态环境中性能可能下降。

en.tldr: Proposes an object-centered mobile phone data acquisition method for 3D Gaussian Splatting, using on-device capture guidance and sensor signal recording to improve reconstruction quality.
en.motivation: Data acquisition via mobile phones remains challenging for 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS); existing methods suffer from non-uniform viewpoint coverage in object-centered scenarios, degrading reconstruction.
en.method: Aligns device orientations to a baseline frame for relative poses; maps the camera optical axis to an object-centered spherical grid for uniform viewpoint indexing; computes area-weighted spherical coverage in real-time to guide user motion and curb polar sampling bias.
en.result: Achieves superior reconstruction quality with fewer input images compared to RealityScan and free-capture strategies, obtaining more comprehensive and uniform viewpoint coverage.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reliable acquisition pipeline and real-time guidance for researchers or developers using mobile phones for object 3D reconstruction, reducing capture effort and improving reconstruction outcomes.

idea_spark.idea: Deeply couples device sensor signals with the visual reconstruction pipeline, using quantified coverage metrics to close-loop guide acquisition behavior.
idea_spark.risk: Method relies on mobile sensor accuracy and calibration stability; performance may degrade on low-end devices or in dynamic environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires transforming traditional offline reconstruction sampling theory into real-time interactive acquisition guidance, enabling an end-to-end “capture-as-reconstruction” optimization paradigm.

papers.title: Two-dimensional early exit optimisation of LLM inference
papers.summary: We introduce a two-dimensional (2D) early exit strategy that coordinates layer-wise and sentence-wise exiting for classification tasks in large language models. By processing input incrementally sentence-by-sentence while progressively activating deeper layers, our method achieves multiplicative computational savings that exceed those from optimizing either dimension independently. Experimental evaluation across four state-of-the-art LLMs (Llama 3.1, Llama 3.2, Gemma, Qwen; 3B-8B parameters) on three sentiment classification datasets demonstrates additional speed-ups of 1.4--2.3$\times$ over optimal layer-wise early exit for simpler tasks with vanilla models, with graceful degradation on complex multi-class problems. Fine-tuning reduces but does not eliminate this advantage. The approach is model-agnostic, requires only lightweight classification adapters, and is orthogonal to complementary efficiency methods such as quantization and pruning. Our findings indicate that 2D early exit strategies excel when semantic information accumulates predictably across input structure, suggesting possible applicability to sequence-processing tasks beyond sentiment classification.

ai.tldr: 提出一种二维早期退出策略，通过协调逐层和逐句退出，在LLM分类任务中实现乘法级计算节省。
ai.motivation: 现有早期退出方法通常只优化单一维度（层或句），未能充分利用输入结构和语义累积的规律性。
ai.method: 在句子级别增量处理输入的同时，逐步激活更深网络层，结合轻量级分类适配器实现二维退出决策。
ai.result: 在四个先进LLM和三个情感分类数据集上，相比最优逐层退出获得额外1.4-2.3倍加速，复杂任务性能下降平缓。
ai.help_to_user: 为LLM推理提供模型无关的轻量级加速方案，可与量化、剪枝等方法正交结合。

zh.motivation: 现有早期退出方法通常只优化单一维度（层或句），未能充分利用输入结构和语义累积的规律性。
zh.method: 在句子级别增量处理输入的同时，逐步激活更深网络层，结合轻量级分类适配器实现二维退出决策。

en.tldr: Proposes a two-dimensional early exit strategy coordinating layer-wise and sentence-wise exiting, achieving multiplicative computational savings in LLM classification tasks.
en.motivation: Existing early exit methods typically optimize only a single dimension (layer or sentence), failing to fully exploit regularity in input structure and semantic accumulation.
en.method: Processes input incrementally sentence-by-sentence while progressively activating deeper layers, using lightweight classification adapters for two-dimensional exit decisions.
en.result: Achieves additional speed-ups of 1.4-2.3× over optimal layer-wise early exit across four state-of-the-art LLMs on three sentiment datasets, with graceful degradation on complex tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a model-agnostic, lightweight acceleration approach for LLM inference that is orthogonal to complementary methods like quantization and pruning.

idea_spark.idea: Extend early exit dimensions from single-layer to 'layer × sentence' space by leveraging predictable semantic accumulation patterns across input structure
idea_spark.risk: May offer limited benefits for tasks with irregular semantic distributions
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore dimension extension for other structured inputs (e.g., paragraphs, code blocks) or combine with attention pattern prediction for exit points

papers.title: Towards Streaming Target Speaker Extraction via Chunk-wise Interleaved Splicing of Autoregressive Language Model
papers.summary: While generative models have set new benchmarks for Target Speaker Extraction (TSE), their inherent reliance on global context precludes deployment in real-time applications. Direct adaptation to streaming scenarios often leads to catastrophic inference performance degradation due to the severe mismatch between training and streaming inference. To bridge this gap, we present the first autoregressive (AR) models tailored for streaming TSE. Our approach introduces a Chunk-wise Interleaved Splicing Paradigm that ensures highly efficient and stable streaming inference. To ensure the coherence between the extracted speech segments, we design a historical context refinement mechanism that mitigates boundary discontinuities by leveraging historical information. Experiments on Libri2Mix show that while AR generative baseline exhibits performance degradation at low latencies, our approach maintains 100% stability and superior intelligibility. Furthermore, our streaming results are comparable to or even surpass offline baselines. Additionally, our model achieves a Real-Time-Factor (RTF) of 0.248 on consumer-level GPUs. This work provides empirical evidence that AR generative backbones are viable for latency-sensitive applications through the Chunk-wise Interleaved Splicing Paradigm.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向流式目标说话人提取的自回归模型，通过分块交错拼接范式实现高效稳定的实时推理，解决了生成模型在流式场景中的性能退化问题。
ai.motivation: 生成模型在目标说话人提取任务上表现出色，但其依赖全局上下文的特性使其无法应用于实时场景。直接适配流式推理会导致严重的性能下降。
ai.method: 设计了分块交错拼接范式，确保流式推理的高效与稳定；引入历史上下文精炼机制，利用历史信息缓解边界不连续问题，保证提取语音段的连贯性。
ai.result: 在Libri2Mix数据集上，该方法在低延迟下保持100%的稳定性与优异的可懂度，流式结果媲美甚至超越离线基线，在消费级GPU上实现0.248的实时因子。
ai.help_to_user: 为延迟敏感的应用提供了可行的自回归生成骨干网络方案，证明了通过分块交错拼接范式，自回归模型可用于实时语音处理任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将长序列生成任务分解为可重叠处理的块，并通过精炼历史信息来保证块间连贯性，是实现高效流式推理的核心思路。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能对块大小和重叠区域设计敏感，需针对不同任务和延迟要求进行调优；历史信息的使用可能引入累积误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考如何将其他非流式生成模型（如扩散模型）通过类似的块处理与上下文管理机制改造为流式版本。

en.tldr: This paper proposes an autoregressive model for streaming target speaker extraction, achieving efficient and stable real-time inference via a chunk-wise interleaved splicing paradigm, addressing the performance degradation of generative models in streaming scenarios.
en.motivation: While generative models excel at target speaker extraction, their reliance on global context prevents deployment in real-time applications. Direct adaptation to streaming inference leads to severe performance degradation.
en.method: A chunk-wise interleaved splicing paradigm is designed to ensure highly efficient and stable streaming inference. A historical context refinement mechanism leverages past information to mitigate boundary discontinuities and ensure coherence between extracted speech segments.
en.result: On Libri2Mix, the approach maintains 100% stability and superior intelligibility at low latencies, with streaming results comparable to or surpassing offline baselines. It achieves a Real-Time Factor of 0.248 on consumer-level GPUs.
en.help_to_user: Provides a viable autoregressive generative backbone for latency-sensitive applications, demonstrating that AR models can be used for real-time speech processing through the chunk-wise interleaved splicing paradigm.

idea_spark.idea: Decomposing long-sequence generation into overlapping chunks and refining historical information to ensure inter-chunk coherence is a core idea for achieving efficient streaming inference.
idea_spark.risk: The method may be sensitive to chunk size and overlap design, requiring tuning for different tasks and latency requirements. Using historical information may introduce cumulative errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires consideration of how other non-streaming generative models (e.g., diffusion models) could be adapted for streaming via similar chunk-processing and context-management mechanisms.

papers.title: A Proxy Consistency Loss for Grounded Fusion of Earth Observation and Location Encoders
papers.summary: Supervised learning with Earth observation inputs is often limited by the sparsity of high-quality labeled or in-situ measured data to use as training labels. With the abundance of geographic data products, in many cases there are variables correlated with - but different from - the variable of interest that can be leveraged. We integrate such proxy variables within a geographic prior via a trainable location encoder and introduce a proxy consistency loss (PCL) formulation to imbue proxy data into the location encoder. The first key insight behind our approach is to use the location encoder as an agile and flexible way to learn from abundantly available proxy data which can be sampled independently of training label availability. Our second key insight is that we will need to regularize the location encoder appropriately to achieve performance and robustness with limited labeled data. Our experiments on air quality prediction and poverty mapping show that integrating proxy data implicitly through the location encoder outperforms using both as input to an observation encoder and fusion strategies that use frozen, pretrained location embeddings as a geographic prior. Superior performance for in-sample prediction shows that the PCL can incorporate rich information from the proxies, and superior out-of-sample prediction shows that the learned latent embeddings help generalize to areas without training labels.

ai.tldr: 提出代理一致性损失（PCL），通过可训练的位置编码器将地理代理数据隐式融入地球观测模型，以缓解标签稀疏问题。
ai.motivation: 地球观测的监督学习常受高质量标注数据稀缺的限制，而大量地理代理变量虽与目标变量相关但未被充分利用。
ai.method: 设计代理一致性损失，用位置编码器从独立于训练标签的代理数据中学习地理先验，并通过正则化确保有限标签下的性能与鲁棒性。
ai.result: 在空气质量预测和贫困制图任务上，该方法优于将代理数据作为观测编码器输入或使用冻结预训练位置嵌入的融合策略，在样本内和样本外预测均表现更优。
ai.help_to_user: 为地理空间机器学习中利用丰富但非完美的代理数据提供了一种灵活的融合框架，尤其适用于标签稀缺场景。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个“代理对齐模块”，强制主模型的特征表示与代理数据驱动的辅助表示在潜在空间中对齐。
idea_spark.risk: 若代理变量与目标变量相关性弱或分布偏移，可能引入噪声或偏见。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发思考如何利用领域内大量弱相关、易获取的辅助信号来增强小样本学习任务的泛化能力。

en.tldr: Proposes a Proxy Consistency Loss (PCL) to implicitly integrate geographic proxy data into Earth observation models via a trainable location encoder, addressing label sparsity.
en.motivation: Supervised learning with Earth observation is often limited by scarce high-quality labels, while abundant geographic proxy variables correlated with the target are underutilized.
en.method: Designs a proxy consistency loss to learn geographic priors from proxy data sampled independently of training labels using a location encoder, regularized for performance and robustness with limited labels.
en.result: Outperforms fusion strategies using proxy data as input to an observation encoder or frozen pretrained location embeddings in air quality prediction and poverty mapping, for both in-sample and out-of-sample prediction.
en.help_to_user: Provides a flexible fusion framework for leveraging abundant but imperfect proxy data in geospatial machine learning, particularly in label-scarce scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Design a 'proxy alignment module' that forces the main model's feature representation to align with an auxiliary representation driven by proxy data in latent space.
idea_spark.risk: If proxy variables are weakly correlated with the target or suffer distribution shift, they may introduce noise or bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking on how to leverage abundant, easily accessible auxiliary signals within a domain to enhance generalization in few-shot learning tasks.

papers.title: Hamiltonian formulation for scalar and two-form gauge fields coupled to 3d gravity
papers.summary: We develop a systematic Hamiltonian formulation for a gravitating topological matter system in three-dimensional spacetime, coupling a scalar gauge field and a rank-2 antisymmetric gauge field to Einstein--Cartan gravity. We perform the Dirac--Bergmann analysis, systematically finding the full structure of the constraints, classifying them into first- and second-class ones, and computing their Poisson bracket algebra. Furthermore, we write down the explicit expression for the Hamiltonian generator of gauge symmetries on the full set of canonical variables, containing the exact number of gauge parameters, and demonstrate that, through a mapping of the gauge parameters, these gauge transformations reproduce on-shell the spacetime diffeomorphism and local Poincaré symmetries, thereby establishing the full symmetry structure of the coupled model. Our canonical analysis further reveals that the reduced phase-space admits exactly three reducibility conditions for the first-class constraints, which guarantee the consistency of the gravitating matter system by ensuring a correct count of physical degrees of freedom. The fundamental symplectic structure on the reduced phase-space is established through the explicit computation of the Dirac brackets.

ai.tldr: 本文对三维时空中标量规范场与二阶反对称规范场耦合爱因斯坦-嘉当引力的拓扑物质系统，建立了系统的哈密顿表述。
ai.motivation: 研究引力与拓扑物质系统耦合的规范对称性结构与物理自由度计数。
ai.method: 采用Dirac-Bergmann约束分析，系统分类第一类和第二类约束，计算泊松括号代数，建立Dirac括号。
ai.result: 完整揭示了约束代数结构，证明规范变换可重现时空微分同胚与局域庞加莱对称性，约化相空间满足三个可约性条件确保物理自由度计数正确。
ai.help_to_user: 为三维引力与规范场耦合系统提供了完整的哈密顿表述框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将Dirac-Bergmann程序应用于更高阶规范场耦合引力的系统
idea_spark.risk: 高维推广时约束代数可能显著复杂化
idea_spark.inspiration: 该方法可扩展至其他拓扑物质与引力耦合模型

en.tldr: A systematic Hamiltonian formulation is developed for a gravitating topological matter system coupling scalar and rank-2 antisymmetric gauge fields to 3D Einstein-Cartan gravity.
en.motivation: To investigate the gauge symmetry structure and physical degree-of-freedom counting for gravity coupled to topological matter systems.
en.method: Performing Dirac-Bergmann constraint analysis, systematically classifying first- and second-class constraints, computing Poisson bracket algebra, and establishing Dirac brackets.
en.result: The full constraint algebra structure is revealed, demonstrating that gauge transformations reproduce spacetime diffeomorphism and local Poincaré symmetries on-shell, with three reducibility conditions ensuring correct physical degree-of-freedom count.
en.help_to_user: Provides a complete Hamiltonian formulation framework for 3D gravity coupled to gauge fields.

idea_spark.idea: Apply Dirac-Bergmann procedure to higher-order gauge field couplings with gravity
idea_spark.risk: Constraint algebra may become significantly more complex in higher dimensions
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach can be extended to other topological matter models coupled to gravity

papers.title: Product-of-Experts Training Reduces Dataset Artifacts in Natural Language Inference
papers.summary: Neural NLI models overfit dataset artifacts instead of truly reasoning. A hypothesis-only model gets 57.7% in SNLI, showing strong spurious correlations, and 38.6% of the baseline errors are the result of these artifacts. We propose Product-of-Experts (PoE) training, which downweights examples where biased models are overconfident. PoE nearly preserves accuracy (89.10% vs. 89.30%) while cutting bias reliance by 4.71% (bias agreement 49.85% to 45%). An ablation finds lambda = 1.5 that best balances debiasing and accuracy. Behavioral tests still reveal issues with negation and numerical reasoning.

ai.tldr: 提出专家乘积训练方法，减少自然语言推理模型对数据集伪影的依赖，在保持准确率的同时降低偏差依赖4.71%。
ai.motivation: 神经NLI模型容易过度拟合数据集伪影而非真正推理，假设仅模型在SNLI上达到57.7%准确率，表明存在强虚假相关性。
ai.method: 采用专家乘积训练，对偏置模型过度自信的示例进行降权处理，通过λ=1.5的超参数平衡去偏与准确率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种减少模型对数据集伪影依赖的训练方法，适用于需要提升模型泛化能力的NLI任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用偏置模型的置信度作为样本权重调整信号，动态降低伪影样本的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 可能过度降低模型对某些合法模式的敏感性，需谨慎调整降权强度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索结合多源偏置模型或自适应λ调整机制，进一步提升去偏效果与泛化能力。

en.tldr: Proposes Product-of-Experts training to reduce NLI models' reliance on dataset artifacts, maintaining accuracy while cutting bias dependence by 4.71%.
en.motivation: Neural NLI models overfit dataset artifacts instead of true reasoning; a hypothesis-only model achieves 57.7% on SNLI, revealing strong spurious correlations.
en.method: Product-of-Experts training downweights examples where biased models are overconfident, with λ=1.5 balancing debiasing and accuracy.
en.result: Accuracy nearly preserved (89.10% vs. 89.30%); bias reliance reduced from 49.85% to 45.14%, a 4.71% decrease.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training method to reduce model dependence on dataset artifacts, applicable to NLI tasks requiring improved generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Use biased model confidence as a signal to dynamically downweight artifact-heavy samples during training.
idea_spark.risk: May overly suppress model sensitivity to legitimate patterns; careful tuning of downweighting intensity is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore multi-source biased models or adaptive λ adjustment to further enhance debiasing and generalization.

papers.title: Multimodal Transformer for Sample-Aware Prediction of Metal-Organic Framework Properties
papers.summary: Metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) are a major target of machine-learning-based property prediction, yet most models assume that a single framework representation maps to a single property value. This assumption becomes problematic for experimental MOFs, where samples reported as the same framework can exhibit different properties because of differences in crystallinity, phase purity, defects, and other sample-dependent factors. Here we introduce Experimental X-ray Diffraction Integrated Transformer (EXIT), a multimodal transformer for sample-aware prediction of MOF properties that combines MOFid with X-ray diffraction (XRD). In EXIT, MOFid encodes MOF identity, whereas XRD provides complementary information about the experimentally realized sample state. EXIT is pre-trained on one million hypothetical MOFs with simulated XRD to learn transferable representations, leading to improved downstream performance relative to existing approaches. EXIT is fine-tuned on literature-derived experimental datasets for surface area and pore volume prediction. Incorporating experimental XRD improves predictive performance relative to models without experimental XRD, and attention analysis and sample-level case studies further show that EXIT assigns different predictions to samples sharing the same MOF identity when their XRD patterns differ. These results establish a practical step from framework-aware to sample-aware MOF property prediction and highlight the value of incorporating experimental characterization into porous materials informatics.

ai.tldr: EXIT是一种多模态Transformer模型，结合MOFid和X射线衍射数据，实现金属有机框架的样本感知属性预测。
ai.motivation: 传统MOF属性预测模型假设单一框架对应单一属性值，但实验样品因结晶度、缺陷等因素存在差异，需要样本感知的预测方法。
ai.method: 提出EXIT模型，整合MOFid编码框架身份和XRD表征实验样品状态，通过百万假设MOF的模拟XRD预训练，在实验数据集上微调预测比表面积和孔体积。
ai.result: 加入实验XRD数据提升了预测性能，注意力分析和案例研究表明EXIT能为相同MOF身份但XRD图案不同的样本分配不同预测结果。
ai.help_to_user: 为多孔材料信息学提供了从框架感知到样本感知的实用步骤，展示了实验表征数据在材料预测中的价值。

idea_spark.idea: 将模拟数据预训练与实验数据微调相结合，缓解实验数据稀缺问题。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖实验XRD数据的可获得性和质量，可能限制模型泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发其他领域考虑样本状态差异，将理论标识与实验表征结合进行更精细的预测。

zh.motivation: 传统MOF属性预测模型假设单一框架对应单一属性值，但实验样品因结晶度、缺陷等因素存在差异，需要样本感知的预测方法。

zh.result: 加入实验XRD数据提升了预测性能，注意力分析和案例研究表明EXIT能为相同MOF身份但XRD图案不同的样本分配不同预测结果。
zh.help_to_user: 为多孔材料信息学提供了从框架感知到样本感知的实用步骤，展示了实验表征数据在材料预测中的价值。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖实验XRD数据的可获得性和质量，可能限制模型泛化能力。

en.tldr: EXIT is a multimodal transformer that combines MOFid with X-ray diffraction for sample-aware prediction of metal-organic framework properties.
en.motivation: Traditional MOF property prediction models assume a single framework maps to a single property value, but experimental samples vary due to crystallinity, defects, etc., requiring sample-aware prediction.
en.method: Propose EXIT model integrating MOFid encoding framework identity and XRD characterizing experimental sample state, pre-trained on one million hypothetical MOFs with simulated XRD and fine-tuned on experimental datasets for surface area and pore volume prediction.
en.result: Incorporating experimental XRD improves predictive performance; attention analysis and case studies show EXIT assigns different predictions to samples with same MOF identity but different XRD patterns.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical step from framework-aware to sample-aware MOF property prediction and highlights the value of experimental characterization in porous materials informatics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine simulated data pre-training with experimental data fine-tuning to mitigate experimental data scarcity.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on availability and quality of experimental XRD data may limit model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires other fields to consider sample state variations and combine theoretical identifiers with experimental characterization for finer-grained predictions.

papers.title: Diff-SBSR: Learning Multimodal Feature-Enhanced Diffusion Models for Zero-Shot Sketch-Based 3D Shape Retrieval
papers.summary: This paper presents the first exploration of text-to-image diffusion models for zero-shot sketch-based 3D shape retrieval (ZS-SBSR). Existing sketch-based 3D shape retrieval methods struggle in zero-shot settings due to the absence of category supervision and the extreme sparsity of sketch inputs. Our key insight is that large-scale pretrained diffusion models inherently exhibit open-vocabulary capability and strong shape bias, making them well suited for zero-shot visual retrieval. We leverage a frozen Stable Diffusion backbone to extract and aggregate discriminative representations from intermediate U-Net layers for both sketches and rendered 3D views. Diffusion models struggle with sketches due to their extreme abstraction and sparsity, compounded by a significant domain gap from natural images. To address this limitation without costly retraining, we introduce a multimodal feature-enhanced strategy that conditions the frozen diffusion backbone with complementary visual and textual cues from CLIP, explicitly enhancing the ability of semantic context capture and concentrating on sketch contours. Specifically, we inject global and local visual features derived from a pretrained CLIP visual encoder, and incorporate enriched textual guidance by combining learnable soft prompts with hard textual descriptions generated by BLIP. Furthermore, we employ the Circle-T loss to dynamically strengthen positive-pair attraction once negative samples are sufficiently separated, thereby adapting to sketch noise and enabling more effective sketch-3D alignment. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in ZS-SBSR.

ai.tldr: 本文首次探索使用文本到图像扩散模型进行零样本草图到3D形状检索，通过多模态特征增强策略提升冻结扩散模型对抽象草图的表征能力。
ai.motivation: 现有基于草图的3D形状检索方法在零样本场景下表现不佳，主要因为缺乏类别监督且草图输入极度稀疏。
ai.method: 利用冻结的Stable Diffusion提取草图与3D渲染视图的特征，通过CLIP的视觉与文本特征进行多模态增强，并采用Circle-T损失优化草图-3D对齐。
ai.result: 在两个公开基准测试中，本方法在零样本草图到3D形状检索任务上持续超越现有最优方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需重新训练扩散模型即可增强其草图理解能力的策略，适用于零样本跨模态检索任务。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扩散模型的形状偏置与开放词汇能力，通过外部特征注入弥补其处理抽象草图时的不足。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖多个预训练模型（Stable Diffusion、CLIP、BLIP），计算开销与集成复杂度较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发思考如何在不微调大模型的前提下，通过特征级条件注入增强模型对特定困难输入（如草图）的处理能力。

en.tldr: This paper presents the first exploration of text-to-image diffusion models for zero-shot sketch-based 3D shape retrieval, enhancing frozen diffusion models' representation of abstract sketches via a multimodal feature-enhanced strategy.
en.motivation: Existing sketch-based 3D shape retrieval methods struggle in zero-shot settings due to the absence of category supervision and the extreme sparsity of sketch inputs.
en.method: Leverages a frozen Stable Diffusion backbone to extract features from sketches and rendered 3D views, enhances it with CLIP's visual and textual features via multimodal conditioning, and employs Circle-T loss for sketch-3D alignment.
en.result: Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate that the method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in zero-shot sketch-based 3D shape retrieval.
en.help_to_user: Provides a strategy to enhance the sketch understanding capability of frozen diffusion models without costly retraining, applicable to zero-shot cross-modal retrieval tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the shape bias and open-vocabulary capability of diffusion models, and compensate for their weakness in handling abstract sketches by injecting external features.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on multiple pretrained models (Stable Diffusion, CLIP, BLIP), leading to high computational overhead and integration complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking about how to enhance a model's ability to handle specific difficult inputs (e.g., sketches) without fine-tuning the large model, via feature-level conditioning.

papers.title: OLLM: Options-based Large Language Models
papers.summary: We introduce Options LLM (OLLM), a simple, general method that replaces the single next-token prediction of standard LLMs with a \textit{set of learned options} for the next token, indexed by a discrete latent variable. Instead of relying on temperature or sampling heuristics to induce diversity, OLLM models variation explicitly: a small latent space parametrizes multiple plausible next-token options which can be selected or searched by a downstream policy. Architecturally, OLLM is a lightweight "plug-in" that inserts two layers: an encoder and a decoder, before the output head, allowing almost any pretrained LLM to be converted with minimal additional parameters. We apply OLLM to a 1.7B-parameter backbone (only $1.56\%$ of parameters trainable) trained on OpenMathReasoning and evaluated on OmniMath. The SOTA LoRA-adapted baselines peak at $51\%$ final answer correctness, while OLLM's option set allows up to $\sim 70\%$ under optimal latent selection. We then train a compact policy in the latent space that emits latents to control generation. Operating in a low-dimensional option space makes reward optimization far more sample-efficient and substantially reduces common misalignments (e.g., language switching or degenerate reasoning), as the policy is constrained to options learned during SFT. Crucially, this alignment arises from model structure rather than additional KL or handcrafted alignment losses. Our results demonstrate that optionized next-token modeling enhances controllability, robustness, and efficiency in math reasoning, and highlight latent-space policy learning as a promising direction for reinforcement learning in LLMs.

ai.tldr: OLLM是一种基于选项的大型语言模型，通过离散隐变量索引一组学习到的下一个词元选项，替代标准的单次预测，从而显式建模多样性并提升可控性。
ai.motivation: 标准LLM依赖温度或采样启发式方法引入多样性，缺乏对生成变化的显式建模和可控性。
ai.method: 在输出头前插入轻量级编码器和解码器层，将预训练LLM转换为基于选项的模型；在低维隐空间训练紧凑策略来选择隐变量控制生成。
ai.result: 在数学推理任务上，最优隐选择下正确率可达~70%（基线为51%）；隐空间策略优化样本效率更高，并能减少语言切换或退化推理等未对齐行为。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种通过隐变量显式控制LLM生成多样性的轻量级方法，无需复杂采样或额外对齐损失。

idea_spark.idea: 将离散隐空间作为生成选项的索引，允许下游策略进行高效搜索或选择。
idea_spark.risk: 选项学习依赖于监督微调数据质量；隐空间维度需要仔细设计以避免选项冗余或不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将强化学习约束在预定义选项空间内，可提高样本效率并保持生成质量。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将强化学习约束在预定义选项空间内，可提高样本效率并保持生成质量。

en.tldr: OLLM is an options-based LLM that replaces single next-token prediction with a set of learned options indexed by a discrete latent variable, explicitly modeling diversity and improving controllability.
en.motivation: Standard LLMs rely on temperature or sampling heuristics for diversity, lacking explicit modeling of variation and controllability.
en.method: Insert lightweight encoder and decoder layers before the output head to convert pretrained LLMs into options-based models; train a compact policy in the low-dimensional latent space to select latents for controlled generation.
en.result: Achieves up to ~70% final answer correctness under optimal latent selection on math reasoning (baseline: 51%); latent-space policy optimization is more sample-efficient and reduces misalignments like language switching or degenerate reasoning.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight method to explicitly control LLM generation diversity via latent variables, without complex sampling or additional alignment losses.

idea_spark.idea: Use a discrete latent space as an index for generation options, allowing downstream policies to efficiently search or select.
idea_spark.risk: Option learning depends on the quality of supervised fine-tuning data; latent space dimensionality requires careful design to avoid redundancy or insufficiency of options.
idea_spark.inspiration: Constraining reinforcement learning to a predefined option space can improve sample efficiency and maintain generation quality.

papers.title: On Solving the Multiple Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence Problem
papers.summary: This paper addresses the Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence (VGLCS) problem, a generalization of the classical LCS problem involving flexible gap constraints between consecutive solutions' characters. The problem arises in molecular sequence comparison, where structural distance constraints between residues must be respected, and in time-series analysis where events are required to occur within specified temporal delays. We propose a search framework based on the root-based state graph representation, in which the state space comprises a generally large number of rooted state subgraphs. To cope with the resulting combinatorial explosion, an iterative beam search strategy is employed, dynamically maintaining a global pool of promising candidate root nodes, enabling effective control of diversification across iterations. To exploit the search for high-quality solutions, several known heuristics from the LCS literature are utilized into the standalone beam search procedure. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive computational study on the VGLCS problem comprising 320 synthetic instances with up to 10 input sequences and up to 500 characters. Experimental results show robustness of the designed approach over the baseline beam search in comparable runtimes.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于根状态图表示和迭代波束搜索的框架，用于解决带可变间隙约束的最长公共子序列问题，并在合成实例上验证了其有效性。
ai.motivation: VGLCS问题在分子序列比较和时间序列分析中具有应用价值，其中字符间需满足灵活的间隙约束，现有方法面临组合爆炸挑战。
ai.method: 采用根状态图表示状态空间，通过迭代波束搜索动态维护候选根节点池，并结合LCS领域的启发式策略提升搜索质量。
ai.result: 在包含320个合成实例（最多10条序列、500个字符）的测试中，该方法在相近运行时间内比基线波束搜索表现出更强的鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理带可变间隙约束的序列比对问题提供了一种可扩展的搜索框架，适用于生物信息学和时间序列分析场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将全局候选根节点池与迭代波束搜索结合，以平衡搜索的多样性与深度。
idea_spark.risk: 对于更大规模或更复杂约束的实例，搜索空间可能仍会限制可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发式策略与波束搜索的融合方式可为其他组合优化问题提供设计参考。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a framework based on root-based state graph representation and iterative beam search to solve the Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence problem, demonstrating its effectiveness on synthetic instances.
en.motivation: The VGLCS problem arises in molecular sequence comparison and time-series analysis where flexible gap constraints between characters must be respected, with existing approaches facing combinatorial explosion.
en.method: A root-based state graph represents the state space, with iterative beam search dynamically maintaining a global pool of candidate root nodes, enhanced by heuristics from LCS literature.
en.result: On 320 synthetic instances with up to 10 sequences and 500 characters, the approach shows robustness over baseline beam search within comparable runtimes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable search framework for sequence alignment with variable gap constraints, applicable to bioinformatics and time-series analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combining a global candidate root pool with iterative beam search to balance diversification and depth.
idea_spark.risk: Search space may still limit scalability for larger or more complex constrained instances.
idea_spark.inspiration: The integration of heuristics with beam search offers design insights for other combinatorial optimization problems.

papers.title: Reducing the Offline-Streaming Gap for Unified ASR Transducer with Consistency Regularization
papers.summary: Unification of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems reduces development and maintenance costs, but training a single model to perform well in both offline and low-latency streaming settings remains challenging. We present a Unified ASR framework for Transducer (RNNT) training that supports both offline and streaming decoding within a single model, using chunk-limited attention with right context and dynamic chunked convolutions. To further close the gap between offline and streaming performance, we introduce an efficient Triton implementation of mode-consistency regularization for RNNT (MCR-RNNT), which encourages agreement across training modes. Experiments show that the proposed approach improves streaming accuracy at low latency while preserving offline performance and scaling to larger model sizes and training datasets. The proposed Unified ASR framework and the English model checkpoint are open-sourced.

ai.tldr: 提出一种统一的RNNT ASR框架，通过一致性正则化减小离线与流式识别性能差距，支持单一模型同时实现高精度离线识别和低延迟流式识别。
ai.motivation: 统一ASR系统可降低开发维护成本，但单一模型同时满足离线高精度和流式低延迟仍具挑战，离线与流式性能存在差距。
ai.method: 采用带右上下文的块限制注意力与动态分块卷积，并引入高效的Triton实现模式一致性正则化（MCR-RNNT），鼓励不同训练模式间的一致性。
ai.result: 方法在保持离线性能的同时提升了低延迟流式识别准确率，并能扩展到更大模型和训练数据集。
ai.help_to_user: 提供开源统一ASR框架和英文模型检查点，帮助开发者构建兼顾离线与流式场景的单一ASR模型。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练中显式约束不同解码模式（如全序列与分块）的中间表示或输出分布一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 若模式间任务差异过大，强制一致性可能损害优势模式的性能；需平衡正则化强度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发于多任务学习中的参数共享与表示对齐，将其应用于同一模型的不同推理配置。

zh.tldr: 提出一种统一的RNNT ASR框架，通过一致性正则化减小离线与流式识别性能差距，支持单一模型同时实现高精度离线识别和低延迟流式识别。
zh.motivation: 统一ASR系统可降低开发维护成本，但单一模型同时满足离线高精度和流式低延迟仍具挑战，离线与流式性能存在差距。

zh.result: 方法在保持离线性能的同时提升了低延迟流式识别准确率，并能扩展到更大模型和训练数据集。
zh.help_to_user: 提供开源统一ASR框架和英文模型检查点，帮助开发者构建兼顾离线与流式场景的单一ASR模型。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练中显式约束不同解码模式（如全序列与分块）的中间表示或输出分布一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 若模式间任务差异过大，强制一致性可能损害优势模式的性能；需平衡正则化强度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发于多任务学习中的参数共享与表示对齐，将其应用于同一模型的不同推理配置。

en.tldr: Proposes a unified RNNT ASR framework with consistency regularization to reduce the offline-streaming performance gap, enabling a single model to perform both high-accuracy offline and low-latency streaming recognition.
en.motivation: Unifying ASR systems reduces development costs, but training a single model to perform well in both offline and low-latency streaming settings remains challenging, with a performance gap between modes.
en.method: Uses chunk-limited attention with right context and dynamic chunked convolutions, and introduces an efficient Triton implementation of mode-consistency regularization (MCR-RNNT) to encourage agreement across training modes.
en.result: The approach improves streaming accuracy at low latency while preserving offline performance, and scales to larger models and training datasets.
en.help_to_user: Provides an open-source unified ASR framework and English model checkpoint to help developers build single ASR models that work well for both offline and streaming scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly constrain consistency of intermediate representations or output distributions across different decoding modes (e.g., full-sequence vs. chunked) during training.
idea_spark.risk: If the task differences between modes are too large, forced consistency may harm the performance of the superior mode; regularization strength needs balancing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by parameter sharing and representation alignment in multi-task learning, applied to different inference configurations of the same model.

papers.title: Denoising, Fast and Slow: Difficulty-Aware Adaptive Sampling for Image Generation
papers.summary: Diffusion- and flow-based models usually allocate compute uniformly across space, updating all patches with the same timestep and number of function evaluations. While convenient, this ignores the heterogeneity of natural images: some regions are easy to denoise, whereas others benefit from more refinement or additional context. Motivated by this, we explore patch-level noise scales for image synthesis. We find that naively varying timesteps across image tokens performs poorly, as it exposes the model to overly informative training states that do not occur at inference. We therefore introduce a timestep sampler that explicitly controls the maximum patch-level information available during training, and show that moving from global to patch-level timesteps already improves image generation over standard baselines. By further augmenting the model with a lightweight per-patch difficulty head, we enable adaptive samplers that allocate compute dynamically where it is most needed. Combined with noise levels varying over both space and diffusion time, this yields Patch Forcing (PF), a framework that advances easier regions earlier so they can provide context for harder ones. PF achieves superior results on class-conditional ImageNet, remains orthogonal to representation alignment and guidance methods, and scales to text-to-image synthesis. Our results suggest that patch-level denoising schedules provide a promising foundation for adaptive image generation.

ai.tldr: 提出Patch Forcing框架，通过感知图像区域难度，在空间和扩散时间上自适应分配计算资源，提升图像生成质量。
ai.motivation: 传统扩散模型对所有图像块采用统一的去噪计算，忽略了自然图像区域的异质性：有些区域容易去噪，有些则需要更多细化或上下文信息。
ai.method: 引入时间步采样器控制训练时最大块级信息，并添加轻量级每块难度头，使采样器能动态分配计算到最需要的区域，形成Patch Forcing框架。
ai.result: 在类别条件ImageNet上取得优异结果，与表示对齐和引导方法正交，并可扩展到文本到图像合成。
ai.help_to_user: 为图像生成任务提供了一种根据内容难度自适应分配计算资源的方法，可能提升生成效率与质量。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练中显式控制局部信息暴露，使模型学会区分并优先处理困难区域。
idea_spark.risk: 难度头的设计与训练稳定性需要仔细平衡，可能增加模型复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中“快与慢”系统启发，将简单区域提前推进以为困难区域提供上下文。

idea_spark.risk: 难度头的设计与训练稳定性需要仔细平衡，可能增加模型复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受认知科学中“快与慢”系统启发，将简单区域提前推进以为困难区域提供上下文。

en.tldr: Proposes Patch Forcing, a framework that adaptively allocates compute across space and diffusion time based on patch difficulty, improving image generation quality.
en.motivation: Standard diffusion models apply uniform compute across all image patches, ignoring the heterogeneity of natural images where some regions are easy to denoise while others require more refinement or context.
en.method: Introduces a timestep sampler to control maximum patch-level information during training, augmented with a lightweight per-patch difficulty head to enable dynamic compute allocation, forming the Patch Forcing framework.
en.result: Achieves superior results on class-conditional ImageNet, remains orthogonal to representation alignment and guidance methods, and scales to text-to-image synthesis.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method for adaptive compute allocation in image generation based on content difficulty, potentially improving efficiency and quality.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly control local information exposure during training to teach the model to prioritize difficult regions.
idea_spark.risk: Design and training stability of the difficulty head require careful balancing, potentially increasing model complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by 'fast and slow' systems in cognitive science, advancing easier regions early to provide context for harder ones.

papers.title: Multi-view Crowd Tracking Transformer with View-Ground Interactions Under Large Real-World Scenes
papers.summary: Multi-view crowd tracking estimates each person's tracking trajectories on the ground of the scene. Recent research works mainly rely on CNNs-based multi-view crowd tracking architectures, and most of them are evaluated and compared on relatively small datasets, such as Wildtrack and MultiviewX. Since these two datasets are collected in small scenes and only contain tens of frames in the evaluation stage, it is difficult for the current methods to be applied to real-world applications where scene size and occlusion are more complicated. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based multi-view crowd tracking model, \textit{MVTrackTrans}, which adopts interactions between camera views and the ground plane for enhanced multi-view tracking performance. Besides, for better evaluation, we collect and label two large real-world multi-view tracking datasets, MVCrowdTrack and CityTrack, which contain a much larger scene size over a longer time period. Compared with existing methods on the two large and new datasets, the proposed MVTrackTrans model achieves better performance, demonstrating the advantages of the model design in dealing with large scenes. We believe the proposed datasets and model will push the frontiers of the task to more practical scenarios, and the datasets and code are available at: https://github.com/zqyq/MVTrackTrans.

ai.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的多视角人群跟踪模型MVTrackTrans，通过视角-地面交互提升性能，并发布两个大型真实场景数据集MVCrowdTrack和CityTrack。
ai.motivation: 现有方法多基于CNN，且在Wildtrack等小场景数据集上评估，难以应对真实大场景中复杂的遮挡和规模问题。
ai.method: 设计Transformer架构，引入相机视角与地面平面的交互机制，增强多视角跟踪能力。
ai.result: 在新建的大型数据集MVCrowdTrack和CityTrack上，MVTrackTrans优于现有方法，证明其处理大场景的优势。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了更贴近实际应用的模型与数据集，推动多视角人群跟踪向实用化发展。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Transformer捕捉跨视角的长程依赖，结合几何约束（地面平面）提升跟踪一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在极端密集或动态遮挡场景下可能仍存在轨迹断裂风险；新数据集虽大，但场景多样性可能有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发构建更多大规模、长时序的真实世界数据集，并探索视觉-几何融合的通用架构。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Transformer捕捉跨视角的长程依赖，结合几何约束（地面平面）提升跟踪一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在极端密集或动态遮挡场景下可能仍存在轨迹断裂风险；新数据集虽大，但场景多样性可能有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发构建更多大规模、长时序的真实世界数据集，并探索视觉-几何融合的通用架构。

en.tldr: Proposes MVTrackTrans, a Transformer-based multi-view crowd tracking model with view-ground interactions, and releases two large real-world datasets: MVCrowdTrack and CityTrack.
en.motivation: Existing CNN-based methods are mainly evaluated on small-scale datasets (e.g., Wildtrack), limiting their applicability to large real-world scenes with complex occlusions.
en.method: Designs a Transformer architecture that incorporates interactions between camera views and the ground plane to enhance multi-view tracking.
en.result: MVTrackTrans outperforms existing methods on the new large-scale datasets, demonstrating its advantage in handling large scenes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more practical model and datasets, advancing multi-view crowd tracking toward real-world applications.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage Transformer to capture long-range dependencies across views, combined with geometric constraints (ground plane) to improve tracking consistency.
idea_spark.risk: The model may still suffer from trajectory fragmentation in extremely dense or dynamically occluded scenarios; new datasets are large but may have limited scene diversity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the creation of more large-scale, long-term real-world datasets and exploration of general architectures that fuse visual and geometric information.

papers.title: How Do Answer Tokens Read Reasoning Traces? Self-Reading Patterns in Thinking LLMs for Quantitative Reasoning
papers.summary: Thinking LLMs produce reasoning traces before answering. Prior activation steering work mainly targets on shaping these traces. It remains less understood how answer tokens actually read and integrate the reasoning to produce reliable outcomes. Focusing on quantitative reasoning, we analyze the answer-to-reasoning attention and observe a benign self-reading pattern aligned with correctness, characterized by a forward drift of the reading focus along the reasoning trace and a persistent concentration on key semantic anchors, whereas incorrect solutions exhibit diffuse and irregular attention pattern. We interpret this as internal certainty during answer decoding, where the model commits to a viable solution branch and integrates key evidence. Following this, we propose a training-free steering method driven by Self-Reading Quality (SRQ) scores combining geometric metrics for process control with semantic metrics for content monitoring. SRQ selects data to build steering vectors that guide inference toward benign self-reading and away from uncertain and disorganized reading. Experiments show that our method yields consistent accuracy gains.

ai.tldr: 研究LLM在定量推理中答案token如何读取推理轨迹，发现正确解存在良性的自读模式，并据此提出基于自读质量的免训练引导方法。
ai.motivation: 现有激活引导工作主要关注塑造推理轨迹，但答案token如何实际读取和整合推理信息以产生可靠结果尚不清楚。
ai.method: 分析答案对推理的注意力模式，提出结合几何过程控制与语义内容监控的自读质量评分，构建引导向量。
ai.result: 实验表明该方法能引导模型朝向良性自读模式，并带来一致的准确率提升。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了LLM内部答案生成时对推理信息的整合机制，并提供了一种基于注意力模式分析的模型引导框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模型解码过程中的自读一致性作为置信度信号，指导推理过程。
idea_spark.risk: 模式可能因模型架构或任务类型而异，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将模型的“阅读行为”可视化并量化，为理解其决策过程提供新视角。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将模型的“阅读行为”可视化并量化，为理解其决策过程提供新视角。

en.tldr: Investigates how answer tokens read reasoning traces in LLMs for quantitative reasoning, identifies a benign self-reading pattern aligned with correctness, and proposes a training-free steering method based on Self-Reading Quality scores.
en.motivation: Prior work on activation steering mainly focuses on shaping reasoning traces, but how answer tokens actually read and integrate reasoning to produce reliable outcomes remains less understood.
en.method: Analyzes answer-to-reasoning attention patterns, proposes Self-Reading Quality scores combining geometric and semantic metrics, and constructs steering vectors to guide inference.
en.result: Experiments show the method steers models toward benign self-reading and yields consistent accuracy gains.
en.help_to_user: Reveals the internal mechanism of how LLMs integrate reasoning information during answer generation and provides a steering framework based on attention pattern analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Use the consistency of the model's self-reading during decoding as a confidence signal to guide the reasoning process.
idea_spark.risk: Patterns may vary with model architecture or task type, requiring validation of generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Visualizing and quantifying the model's 'reading behavior' offers a new perspective for understanding its decision-making process.

papers.title: Deep Supervised Contrastive Learning of Pitch Contours for Robust Pitch Accent Classification in Seoul Korean
papers.summary: The intonational structure of Seoul Korean has been defined with discrete tonal categories within the Autosegmental-Metrical model of intonational phonology. However, it is challenging to map continuous $F_0$ contours to these invariant categories due to variable $F_0$ realizations in real-world speech. Our paper proposes Dual-Glob, a deep supervised contrastive learning framework to robustly classify fine-grained pitch accent patterns in Seoul Korean. Unlike conventional local predictive models, our approach captures holistic $F_0$ contour shapes by enforcing structural consistency between clean and augmented views in a shared latent space. To this aim, we introduce the first large-scale benchmark dataset, consisting of manually annotated 10,093 Accentual Phrases in Seoul Korean. Experimental results show that our Dual-Glob significantly outperforms strong baseline models with state-of-the-art accuracy (77.75%) and F1-score (51.54%). Therefore, our work supports AM-based intonational phonology using data-driven methodology, showing that deep contrastive learning effectively captures holistic structural features of continuous $F_0$ contours.

ai.tldr: 本文提出Dual-Glob，一种深度监督对比学习框架，用于鲁棒地分类首尔韩语的细粒度音高重音模式。该方法通过强制干净视图与增强视图在共享潜在空间中的结构一致性，捕捉整体F0轮廓形状。
ai.motivation: 在自主节律-韵律语调模型中，首尔韩语的语调结构由离散的声调类别定义，但由于实际语音中F0实现的变异性，将连续的F0轮廓映射到这些不变类别具有挑战性。
ai.method: 提出Dual-Glob框架，采用深度监督对比学习，在共享潜在空间中强制干净视图与增强视图的结构一致性，以捕捉整体F0轮廓形状。构建了首个大规模基准数据集，包含10,093个手动标注的首尔韩语重音短语。
ai.result: 实验结果表明，Dual-Glob显著优于强基线模型，达到了最先进的准确率（77.75%）和F1分数（51.54%）。
ai.help_to_user: 本研究展示了深度对比学习如何有效捕捉连续F0轮廓的整体结构特征，支持基于数据驱动方法的自主节律-韵律语调音系学。

idea_spark.idea: 将整体轮廓形状一致性作为监督信号，而非局部预测，可提升对连续语音特征的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于大规模手动标注数据，可能限制其在低资源语言或方言中的应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将音系学理论与数据驱动方法结合，可为语音处理提供新的建模视角。
