en.tldr: This paper proposes Dual-Glob, a deep supervised contrastive learning framework for robust classification of fine-grained pitch accent patterns in Seoul Korean. The method captures holistic F0 contour shapes by enforcing structural consistency between clean and augmented views in a shared latent space.
en.motivation: The intonational structure of Seoul Korean is defined with discrete tonal categories in the Autosegmental-Metrical model, but mapping continuous F0 contours to these invariant categories is challenging due to variable F0 realizations in real-world speech.
en.method: Proposes the Dual-Glob framework using deep supervised contrastive learning, enforcing structural consistency between clean and augmented views in a shared latent space to capture holistic F0 contour shapes. Introduces the first large-scale benchmark dataset of 10,093 manually annotated Accentual Phrases in Seoul Korean.
en.result: Experimental results show that Dual-Glob significantly outperforms strong baseline models with state-of-the-art accuracy (77.75%) and F1-score (51.54%).
en.help_to_user: This work demonstrates how deep contrastive learning effectively captures holistic structural features of continuous F0 contours, supporting AM-based intonational phonology with data-driven methodology.

idea_spark.idea: Using holistic contour shape consistency as a supervisory signal, rather than local prediction, may improve robustness to continuous speech features.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on large-scale manually annotated data, which may limit its application to low-resource languages or dialects.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining phonological theory with data-driven methods could offer new modeling perspectives for speech processing.

papers.title: Probing for Reading Times
papers.summary: Probing has shown that language model representations encode rich linguistic information, but it remains unclear whether they also capture cognitive signals about human processing. In this work, we probe language model representations for human reading times. Using regularized linear regression on two eye-tracking corpora spanning five languages (English, Greek, Hebrew, Russian, and Turkish), we compare the representations from every model layer against scalar predictors -- surprisal, information value, and logit-lens surprisal. We find that the representations from early layers outperform surprisal in predicting early-pass measures such as first fixation and gaze duration. The concentration of predictive power in the early layers suggests that human-like processing signatures are captured by low-level structural or lexical representations, pointing to a functional alignment between model depth and the temporal stages of human reading. In contrast, for late-pass measures such as total reading time, scalar surprisal remains superior, despite its being a much more compressed representation. We also observe performance gains when using both surprisal and early-layer representations. Overall, we find that the best-performing predictor varies strongly depending on the language and eye-tracking measure.

ai.tldr: 通过正则化线性回归，探究语言模型表征是否编码人类阅读时间信号，发现早期层表征在预测早期眼动指标上优于惊奇度。
ai.motivation: 语言模型表征已被证明编码丰富的语言学信息，但尚不清楚它们是否也捕获人类阅读处理过程中的认知信号。
ai.method: 使用两个眼动追踪语料库（涵盖英语、希腊语、希伯来语、俄语和土耳其语），对每个模型层的表征进行正则化线性回归，并与惊奇度、信息价值和logit-lens惊奇度等标量预测因子进行比较。
ai.result: 早期层表征在预测首次注视时间和凝视持续时间等早期眼动指标上优于惊奇度；预测能力集中在早期层，表明人类处理特征由低层结构或词汇表征捕获；对于总阅读时间等晚期指标，标量惊奇度仍更优；结合惊奇度和早期层表征可提升性能；最佳预测因子因语言和眼动指标而异。
ai.help_to_user: 本研究揭示了语言模型表征与人类阅读处理之间的功能对齐，为认知建模和可解释AI提供了实证依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用早期层表征改进文本可读性评估或自适应学习系统。
idea_spark.risk: 眼动数据受实验设置和个体差异影响，跨语言泛化需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将模型深度与处理时间尺度关联的认知架构设计。

zh.tldr: 通过正则化线性回归，探究语言模型表征是否编码人类阅读时间信号，发现早期层表征在预测早期眼动指标上优于惊奇度。
zh.motivation: 语言模型表征已被证明编码丰富的语言学信息，但尚不清楚它们是否也捕获人类阅读处理过程中的认知信号。
zh.method: 使用两个眼动追踪语料库（涵盖英语、希腊语、希伯来语、俄语和土耳其语），对每个模型层的表征进行正则化线性回归，并与惊奇度、信息价值和logit-lens惊奇度等标量预测因子进行比较。
zh.result: 早期层表征在预测首次注视时间和凝视持续时间等早期眼动指标上优于惊奇度；预测能力集中在早期层，表明人类处理特征由低层结构或词汇表征捕获；对于总阅读时间等晚期指标，标量惊奇度仍更优；结合惊奇度和早期层表征可提升性能；最佳预测因子因语言和眼动指标而异。
zh.help_to_user: 本研究揭示了语言模型表征与人类阅读处理之间的功能对齐，为认知建模和可解释AI提供了实证依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用早期层表征改进文本可读性评估或自适应学习系统。
idea_spark.risk: 眼动数据受实验设置和个体差异影响，跨语言泛化需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将模型深度与处理时间尺度关联的认知架构设计。

en.tldr: Using regularized linear regression, we probe whether language model representations encode human reading times, finding that early-layer representations outperform surprisal in predicting early eye-tracking measures.
en.motivation: While language model representations have been shown to encode rich linguistic information, it remains unclear whether they also capture cognitive signals about human reading processing.
en.method: Using two eye-tracking corpora spanning five languages (English, Greek, Hebrew, Russian, Turkish), we perform regularized linear regression on representations from each model layer and compare them against scalar predictors (surprisal, information value, logit-lens surprisal).
en.result: Early-layer representations outperform surprisal in predicting early-pass measures like first fixation and gaze duration; predictive power concentrates in early layers, suggesting human-like processing signatures are captured by low-level representations; for late-pass measures like total reading time, scalar surprisal remains superior; combining surprisal and early-layer representations improves performance; the best predictor varies strongly by language and eye-tracking measure.
en.help_to_user: This study reveals a functional alignment between model representations and human reading processes, providing empirical grounding for cognitive modeling and interpretable AI.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage early-layer representations to improve text readability assessment or adaptive learning systems.
idea_spark.risk: Eye-tracking data is sensitive to experimental settings and individual differences; cross-linguistic generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires cognitive architecture designs that align model depth with processing time scales.

papers.title: ConvVitMamba: Efficient Multiscale Convolution, Transformer, and Mamba-Based Sequence modelling for Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification remains challenging due to high spectral dimensionality, redundancy, and limited labeled data. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance by exploiting spectral-spatial information and long-range dependencies, they often incur high computational cost and large model size, limiting practical use. To address these limitations, a unified hybrid framework, termed ConvVitMamba, is proposed for efficient HSI classification. The architecture integrates three components: a multiscale convolutional feature extractor to capture local spectral, spatial, and joint patterns; a Vision Transformer based tokenization and encoding stage to model global contextual relationships; and a lightweight Mamba inspired gated sequence mixing module for efficient content-aware refinement without quadratic self-attention. Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is used as preprocessing to reduce redundancy and improve efficiency. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including Houston and three UAV borne QUH datasets (Pingan, Qingyun, and Tangdaowan), demonstrate that ConvVitMamba consistently outperforms CNN, Transformer, and Mamba based methods while maintaining a favorable balance between accuracy, model size, and inference efficiency. Ablation studies confirm the complementary contributions of all components. The results indicate that the proposed framework provides an effective and efficient solution for HSI classification in diverse scenarios. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/ConvVitMamba

ai.tldr: ConvVitMamba是一个用于高光谱图像分类的高效混合框架，结合了多尺度卷积、Vision Transformer和Mamba序列建模，在精度、模型大小和推理效率之间取得了良好平衡。
ai.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临高光谱维度、冗余和标记数据有限的挑战。现有CNN和ViT方法虽然性能强，但计算成本高、模型大，限制了实际应用。
ai.method: 提出ConvVitMamba统一混合框架：1) 多尺度卷积特征提取器捕获局部光谱、空间和联合模式；2) Vision Transformer进行标记化和编码以建模全局上下文关系；3) 轻量级Mamba启发的门控序列混合模块进行高效内容感知细化，无需二次自注意力。使用PCA进行预处理以减少冗余。
ai.result: 在四个基准数据集（包括Houston和三个无人机载QUH数据集）上的实验表明，ConvVitMamba在精度、模型大小和推理效率方面均优于基于CNN、Transformer和Mamba的方法。消融研究证实了所有组件的互补贡献。
ai.help_to_user: 为高光谱图像分类提供了一个有效且高效的解决方案，特别适用于计算资源有限或需要实时处理的实际场景。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将这种多尺度卷积+Transformer+Mamba的混合范式应用于其他序列或时空数据分类任务，如视频分析或时间序列预测？
idea_spark.risk: 框架对特定预处理（如PCA）和数据集特性的依赖可能影响泛化能力；Mamba模块在极长序列上的稳定性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过组件化集成不同范式的优势，而非单一架构竞争，为构建平衡性能与效率的模型提供了新方向。

en.tldr: ConvVitMamba is an efficient hybrid framework for hyperspectral image classification, integrating multiscale convolution, Vision Transformer, and Mamba-based sequence modeling, achieving a favorable balance between accuracy, model size, and inference efficiency.
en.motivation: Hyperspectral image classification remains challenging due to high spectral dimensionality, redundancy, and limited labeled data. Existing CNN and ViT methods achieve strong performance but incur high computational cost and large model size, limiting practical use.
en.method: Proposes the unified hybrid framework ConvVitMamba: 1) a multiscale convolutional feature extractor to capture local spectral, spatial, and joint patterns; 2) a Vision Transformer-based tokenization and encoding stage to model global contextual relationships; 3) a lightweight Mamba-inspired gated sequence mixing module for efficient content-aware refinement without quadratic self-attention. Uses PCA as preprocessing to reduce redundancy.
en.result: Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including Houston and three UAV-borne QUH datasets, demonstrate that ConvVitMamba consistently outperforms CNN, Transformer, and Mamba-based methods in accuracy, model size, and inference efficiency. Ablation studies confirm the complementary contributions of all components.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective and efficient solution for HSI classification, particularly suitable for practical scenarios with limited computational resources or requiring real-time processing.

idea_spark.idea: Could this multiscale convolution + Transformer + Mamba hybrid paradigm be applied to other sequence or spatiotemporal data classification tasks, such as video analysis or time series forecasting?
idea_spark.risk: The framework's reliance on specific preprocessing (e.g., PCA) and dataset characteristics may affect generalization; the stability of the Mamba module on extremely long sequences requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating the strengths of different paradigms through componentization, rather than single-architecture competition, offers a new direction for building models that balance performance and efficiency.

papers.title: Match-Any-Events: Zero-Shot Motion-Robust Feature Matching Across Wide Baselines for Event Cameras
papers.summary: Event cameras have recently shown promising capabilities in instantaneous motion estimation due to their robustness to low light and fast motions. However, computing wide-baseline correspondence between two arbitrary views remains a significant challenge, since event appearance changes substantially with motion, and learning-based approaches are constrained by both scalability and limited wide-baseline supervision. We therefore introduce the first event matching model that achieves cross-dataset wide-baseline correspondence in a zero-shot manner: a single model trained once is deployed on unseen datasets without any target-domain fine-tuning or adaptation. To enable this capability, we introduce a motion-robust and computationally efficient attention backbone that learns multi-timescale features from event streams, augmented with sparsity-aware event token selection, making large-scale training on diverse wide-baseline supervision computationally feasible. To provide the supervision needed for wide-baseline generalization, we develop a robust event motion synthesis framework to generate large-scale event-matching datasets with augmented viewpoints, modalities, and motions. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that our framework achieves a 37.7% improvement over the previous best event feature matching methods. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/spikelab-jhu/Match-Any-Events.

ai.tldr: 首个用于事件相机的零样本宽基线特征匹配模型，无需目标域微调即可跨数据集泛化。
ai.motivation: 事件相机在快速运动估计中表现出色，但任意视角间的宽基线匹配仍具挑战，现有学习方法受限于可扩展性和监督数据不足。
ai.method: 提出运动鲁棒的高效注意力主干网络，从事件流中学习多时间尺度特征，结合稀疏感知的事件令牌选择；开发事件运动合成框架生成大规模宽基线匹配数据集用于训练。
ai.result: 在多个基准测试中，相比之前最佳事件特征匹配方法提升37.7%，实现跨数据集零样本泛化。
ai.help_to_user: 为事件相机提供了一种通用的宽基线特征匹配解决方案，无需针对新场景重新训练。

idea_spark.idea: 将合成数据与高效注意力架构结合，实现事件流数据的零-shot跨域匹配。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实数据的域差距可能影响极端场景性能；计算效率对实时应用仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可启发其他模态（如点云、雷达）的零-shot特征匹配，或用于动态SLAM中的长期特征跟踪。

idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实数据的域差距可能影响极端场景性能；计算效率对实时应用仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 该框架可启发其他模态（如点云、雷达）的零-shot特征匹配，或用于动态SLAM中的长期特征跟踪。

en.tldr: The first zero-shot wide-baseline feature matching model for event cameras, achieving cross-dataset generalization without target-domain fine-tuning.
en.motivation: Event cameras show promise for instantaneous motion estimation, but wide-baseline correspondence between arbitrary views remains challenging due to appearance changes with motion and limitations in learning-based approaches.
en.method: Proposes a motion-robust efficient attention backbone learning multi-timescale features from event streams with sparsity-aware token selection; develops an event motion synthesis framework to generate large-scale wide-baseline matching datasets for training.
en.result: Achieves 37.7% improvement over previous best event feature matching methods across multiple benchmarks, enabling zero-shot cross-dataset generalization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general-purpose wide-baseline feature matching solution for event cameras without retraining for new scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combining synthetic data with efficient attention architecture for zero-shot cross-domain matching of event streams.
idea_spark.risk: Domain gap between synthetic and real data may affect extreme scenario performance; computational efficiency for real-time applications requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The framework could inspire zero-shot feature matching for other modalities (e.g., point clouds, radar) or long-term feature tracking in dynamic SLAM.

papers.title: Plausible Reasoning and First-Order Plausible Logic
papers.summary: Defeasible statements are statements that are likely, or probable, or usually true, but may occasionally be false. Plausible reasoning makes conclusions from statements that are either facts or defeasible statements without using numbers. So there are no probabilities or suchlike involved. Seventeen principles of logics that do plausible reasoning are suggested and several important plausible reasoning examples are considered. There are 14 necessary principles and 3 desirable principles, one of which is not formally stated. A first-order logic, called Plausible Logic (PL), is defined that satisfies all but two of the desirable principles and reasons correctly with all the examples. As far as we are aware, this is the only such logic. PL has 8 reasoning algorithms because, from a given plausible reasoning situation, there are different sensible conclusions. This article is a condensation of my book `Plausible Reasoning and Plausible Logic' (PRPL), which is to be submitted. Each section of this article corresponds to a chapter in PRPL, and vice versa. The proofs of all the results are in PRPL, so they are omitted in this article.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Plausible Logic（PL）的一阶逻辑，用于处理可废止陈述的合理推理，无需使用概率等数值。它满足17条逻辑原则中的大部分，并提供了8种推理算法来处理不同的合理结论。
ai.motivation: 可废止陈述（通常为真但偶尔为假）的推理在传统逻辑中难以处理，且现有方法常依赖数值概率。需要一种纯逻辑的、非数值的推理形式化方法。
ai.method: 提出了17条合理推理的逻辑原则（14条必要，3条理想）。基于这些原则定义了一阶Plausible Logic（PL），并设计了8种推理算法以应对同一情境下可能的不同合理结论。
ai.result: PL满足了除两条理想原则外的所有原则，并能正确处理所有考虑的合理推理示例。据作者所知，这是唯一满足此特性的逻辑。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为你提供了一种处理日常中“通常成立但有例外”的常识推理的形式化逻辑工具，无需引入概率计算，纯粹基于逻辑规则。

idea_spark.idea: 通过定义一组核心的推理原则（而非数值度量）来刻画“合理”这一模糊概念，并基于此构建完整的逻辑演算。
idea_spark.risk: 逻辑系统可能过于复杂（有8种算法），在实际知识表示与推理系统中实现和高效计算可能存在挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 为AI中基于规则的常识推理、法律论证建模、或任何需要处理默认规则和例外的领域提供了新的逻辑基础。

idea_spark.idea: 通过定义一组核心的推理原则（而非数值度量）来刻画“合理”这一模糊概念，并基于此构建完整的逻辑演算。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a first-order logic called Plausible Logic (PL) for plausible reasoning with defeasible statements without using numbers like probabilities. It satisfies most of 17 suggested logical principles and provides 8 reasoning algorithms to handle different sensible conclusions.
en.motivation: Reasoning with defeasible statements (usually true but occasionally false) is challenging in traditional logic, and existing approaches often rely on numerical probabilities. A purely logical, non-numerical formalization of such reasoning is needed.
en.method: Proposes 17 principles of logic for plausible reasoning (14 necessary, 3 desirable). Defines first-order Plausible Logic (PL) based on these principles and designs 8 reasoning algorithms to account for different sensible conclusions from the same situation.
en.result: PL satisfies all but two of the desirable principles and reasons correctly with all considered examples of plausible reasoning. To the author's knowledge, it is the only such logic.
en.help_to_user: This paper provides you with a formal logical tool for handling commonsense reasoning about statements that are 'usually true but have exceptions,' without introducing probabilistic calculations, purely based on logical rules.

idea_spark.idea: Capturing the vague notion of 'plausibility' by defining a core set of reasoning principles (rather than numerical measures) and building a complete logical calculus upon them.
idea_spark.risk: The logic system may be complex (with 8 algorithms), posing challenges for implementation and efficient computation in practical knowledge representation and reasoning systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Offers a new logical foundation for rule-based commonsense reasoning in AI, modeling legal arguments, or any domain requiring handling of default rules and exceptions.

papers.title: TS-Attn: Temporal-wise Separable Attention for Multi-Event Video Generation
papers.summary: Generating high-quality videos from complex temporal descriptions that contain multiple sequential actions is a key unsolved problem. Existing methods are constrained by an inherent trade-off: using multiple short prompts fed sequentially into the model improves action fidelity but compromises temporal consistency, while a single complex prompt preserves consistency at the cost of prompt-following capability. We attribute this problem to two primary causes: 1) temporal misalignment between video content and the prompt, and 2) conflicting attention coupling between motion-related visual objects and their associated text conditions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel, training-free attention mechanism, Temporal-wise Separable Attention (TS-Attn), which dynamically rearranges attention distribution to ensure temporal awareness and global coherence in multi-event scenarios. TS-Attn can be seamlessly integrated into various pre-trained text-to-video models, boosting StoryEval-Bench scores by 33.5% and 16.4% on Wan2.1-T2V-14B and Wan2.2-T2V-A14B with only a 2% increase in inference time. It also supports plug-and-play usage across models for multi-event image-to-video generation. The source code and project page are available at https://github.com/Hong-yu-Zhang/TS-Attn.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的时间可分离注意力机制TS-Attn，用于解决多事件视频生成中的时间对齐与注意力耦合问题，可即插即用提升现有模型性能。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在生成多动作序列视频时面临两难：分步提示损害时间一致性，单一复杂提示降低指令跟随能力，根源在于时间错位和注意力耦合冲突。
ai.method: 设计动态重分布注意力的TS-Attn机制，确保时间感知与全局连贯性，无需额外训练即可集成到各类预训练文本到视频模型中。
ai.result: 在Wan2.1-T2V-14B和Wan2.2-T2V-A14B模型上，仅增加2%推理时间即提升StoryEval-Bench分数33.5%和16.4%，支持多事件图像到视频生成。
ai.help_to_user: 为视频生成研究者提供即插即用的注意力优化方案，显著改善多事件序列生成的时间一致性与指令跟随精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间维度与内容维度解耦的注意力设计，可启发多模态序列生成的结构化建模。
idea_spark.risk: 在极长序列或密集事件场景下，动态重分布的计算开销可能增加，需平衡效率与效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“时间可分离”角度重构注意力，为视频生成中的时空解耦提供了新范式。

zh.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的时间可分离注意力机制TS-Attn，用于解决多事件视频生成中的时间对齐与注意力耦合问题，可即插即用提升现有模型性能。
zh.motivation: 现有方法在生成多动作序列视频时面临两难：分步提示损害时间一致性，单一复杂提示降低指令跟随能力，根源在于时间错位和注意力耦合冲突。
zh.method: 设计动态重分布注意力的TS-Attn机制，确保时间感知与全局连贯性，无需额外训练即可集成到各类预训练文本到视频模型中。
zh.result: 在Wan2.1-T2V-14B和Wan2.2-T2V-A14B模型上，仅增加2%推理时间即提升StoryEval-Bench分数33.5%和16.4%，支持多事件图像到视频生成。
zh.help_to_user: 为视频生成研究者提供即插即用的注意力优化方案，显著改善多事件序列生成的时间一致性与指令跟随精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间维度与内容维度解耦的注意力设计，可启发多模态序列生成的结构化建模。
idea_spark.risk: 在极长序列或密集事件场景下，动态重分布的计算开销可能增加，需平衡效率与效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“时间可分离”角度重构注意力，为视频生成中的时空解耦提供了新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes TS-Attn, a training-free temporal-wise separable attention mechanism that addresses temporal alignment and attention coupling in multi-event video generation, offering plug-and-play performance gains.
en.motivation: Existing methods face a dilemma: sequential short prompts harm temporal consistency while single complex prompts reduce prompt-following capability, due to temporal misalignment and conflicting attention coupling.
en.method: Designs TS-Attn to dynamically redistribute attention for temporal awareness and global coherence, seamlessly integrable into pre-trained text-to-video models without additional training.
en.result: Boosts StoryEval-Bench scores by 33.5% and 16.4% on Wan2.1-T2V-14B and Wan2.2-T2V-A14B with only 2% increased inference time, supporting plug-and-play multi-event image-to-video generation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a plug-and-play attention optimization solution for video generation researchers, significantly improving temporal consistency and prompt-following accuracy in multi-event sequences.

idea_spark.idea: Attention design decoupling temporal and content dimensions may inspire structured modeling for multimodal sequence generation.
idea_spark.risk: Computational overhead of dynamic redistribution may increase in extremely long or dense event sequences, requiring efficiency-effectiveness trade-offs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reconstructing attention from a 'temporal-wise separable' perspective offers a new paradigm for spatiotemporal decoupling in video generation.

papers.title: LLM-Viterbi: Semantic-Aware Decoding for Convolutional Codes
papers.summary: Traditional wireless communications rely solely on bit-level channel coding for error correction, without exploiting the inherent linguistic structure of the data source. This paper proposes a large language model (LLM) Viterbi decoder that integrates LLM priors into the Viterbi decoding for text transmission over AWGN channels. The proposed decoder maintains multiple candidate paths during the Viterbi decoding and periodically evaluates path reliabilities using a fine-tuned Byte-level T5 (ByT5) language model. By combining channel reliability metrics with semantic probability from the LLM, it outputs the path that maximizes the joint likelihood of channel observations and linguistic coherence. Simulations show that our decoder achieves significant performance gains over conventional Viterbi decoding in terms of both block error rate (BLER) and semantic similarity. For convolutional codes with constraint length 3, it achieves approximately 1.5 dB more coding gain in BLER, with over 50% improvements in semantic similarity. The framework can extend to other structured data sources beyond text.

ai.tldr: 提出LLM-Viterbi解码器，将大语言模型先验融入维特比解码，用于AWGN信道上的文本传输，显著提升误块率和语义相似度。
ai.motivation: 传统无线通信仅依赖比特级信道编码纠错，未利用数据源的固有语言结构。
ai.method: 在维特比解码中维护多条候选路径，定期使用微调的字节级T5语言模型评估路径可靠性，结合信道可靠性指标和LLM语义概率，输出联合似然最大的路径。
ai.result: 对于约束长度为3的卷积码，在误块率上获得约1.5 dB的编码增益，语义相似度提升超过50%。
ai.help_to_user: 为文本传输提供了一种结合语义理解的增强型解码方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM评估解码路径的语义合理性，辅助传统信道解码决策。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖于特定语言模型的微调质量与计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在通信系统中引入语义层优化，超越纯比特级处理。

en.tldr: Proposes LLM-Viterbi decoder that integrates LLM priors into Viterbi decoding for text transmission over AWGN channels, significantly improving block error rate and semantic similarity.
en.motivation: Traditional wireless communications rely solely on bit-level channel coding for error correction, without exploiting the inherent linguistic structure of the data source.
en.method: Maintains multiple candidate paths during Viterbi decoding and periodically evaluates path reliabilities using a fine-tuned Byte-level T5 language model, combining channel reliability metrics with semantic probability from the LLM to output the path maximizing joint likelihood.
en.result: For convolutional codes with constraint length 3, achieves approximately 1.5 dB more coding gain in BLER, with over 50% improvements in semantic similarity.
en.help_to_user: Provides an enhanced decoding scheme for text transmission that incorporates semantic understanding.

idea_spark.idea: Use LLM to evaluate the semantic plausibility of decoding paths to assist traditional channel decoding decisions.
idea_spark.risk: Depends on the fine-tuning quality and computational cost of specific language models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the introduction of semantic-layer optimization in communication systems, going beyond pure bit-level processing.

papers.title: Three-Module SC-VAMP for LDPC-Coded Nonlinear Channels
papers.summary: We propose a three-module extension of score-based VAMP (SC-VAMP) for signal recovery in nonlinear channels, where the received signal is obtained by applying a nonlinearity to a linear mixture of the transmitted signal, followed by additive Gaussian noise. The key idea is to introduce a latent variable representing the output of the linear mixing stage, which decomposes the inference problem into three modules: a likelihood module that handles the nonlinear observation via Gauss--Hermite quadrature, a coupling module that enforces the linear constraint between the transmitted signal and the latent variable via LMMSE estimation, and a denoiser module that incorporates the code constraint using belief propagation (BP) decoding. Each module exchanges extrinsic scalar-Gaussian messages with Onsager corrections derived from posterior variances that are computed in closed form or to quadrature accuracy. Numerical experiments with BPSK-modulated LDPC codewords transmitted through a hyperbolic tangent channel demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a clear waterfall in bit error rate (BER), with the gap to the capacity estimate narrowing as the block length increases from 128 to 2304. The framework provides a modular receiver architecture applicable to a broad class of nonlinear channels. Since only the likelihood module depends on the channel nonlinearity, the architecture readily adapts to other channel models by replacing a single module while leaving the coupling and decoder modules unchanged.

ai.tldr: 提出一种三模块SC-VAMP方法，用于非线性信道中的信号恢复，通过引入潜变量分解推理问题，在双曲正切信道中实现接近容量的误码率性能。
ai.motivation: 非线性信道中的信号恢复需要处理观测非线性与编码约束的联合推理问题，传统方法难以高效处理此类复杂耦合。
ai.method: 引入表示线性混合输出的潜变量，将问题分解为三个模块：使用高斯-埃尔米特积分的似然模块处理非线性观测，使用LMMSE估计的耦合模块强制线性约束，使用BP解码的去噪模块整合编码约束，各模块通过带Onsager校正的外在标量高斯消息传递交换信息。
ai.result: 在BPSK调制的LDPC码通过双曲正切信道的实验中，该方法在误码率曲线上呈现明显瀑布区，且随着块长度从128增至2304，与容量估计的差距逐渐缩小。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种模块化接收机架构，仅似然模块依赖信道非线性，便于适配其他非线性信道模型。

idea_spark.idea: 将非线性信道推理分解为独立处理的模块，通过标准化接口实现灵活组合
idea_spark.risk: 模块间消息传递的收敛性需严格保证，计算复杂度随非线性复杂度增加
idea_spark.inspiration: 可扩展至其他联合估计与解码问题，如图像恢复中的非线性退化模型

en.tldr: Proposes a three-module SC-VAMP extension for signal recovery in nonlinear channels, using a latent variable to decompose inference, achieving near-capacity BER performance in tanh channels.
en.motivation: Signal recovery in nonlinear channels requires joint inference of nonlinear observations and code constraints, which is challenging for conventional methods.
en.method: Introduces a latent variable for the linear mixing output, decomposing inference into three modules: likelihood module using Gauss-Hermite quadrature for nonlinear observations, coupling module using LMMSE estimation for linear constraints, and denoiser module using BP decoding for code constraints, with extrinsic scalar-Gaussian message passing and Onsager corrections.
en.result: Experiments with BPSK-modulated LDPC codewords over a tanh channel show clear BER waterfall, with gap to capacity estimate narrowing as block length increases from 128 to 2304.
en.help_to_user: Provides a modular receiver architecture where only the likelihood module is channel-specific, enabling easy adaptation to other nonlinear channel models.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose nonlinear channel inference into independently handled modules with standardized interfaces
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of inter-module message passing requires guarantees, complexity scales with nonlinearity
idea_spark.inspiration: Extendable to other joint estimation-decoding problems, e.g., nonlinear degradation models in image recovery

papers.title: An Answer is just the Start: Related Insight Generation for Open-Ended Document-Grounded QA
papers.summary: Answering open-ended questions remains challenging for AI systems because it requires synthesis, judgment, and exploration beyond factual retrieval, and users often refine answers through multiple iterations rather than accepting a single response. Existing QA benchmarks do not explicitly support this refinement process. To address this gap, we introduce a new task, document-grounded related insight generation, where the goal is to generate additional insights from a document collection that help improve, extend, or rethink an initial answer to an open-ended question, ultimately supporting richer user interaction and a better overall question answering experience. We curate and release SCOpE-QA (Scientific Collections for Open-Ended QA), a dataset of 3,000 open-ended questions across 20 research collections. We present InsightGen, a two-stage approach that first constructs a thematic representation of the document collection using clustering, and then selects related context based on neighborhood selection from the thematic graph to generate diverse and relevant insights using LLMs. Extensive evaluation on 3,000 questions using two generation models and two evaluation settings shows that InsightGen consistently produces useful, relevant, and actionable insights, establishing a strong baseline for this new task.

ai.tldr: 提出文档驱动的相关见解生成新任务，并发布SCOpE-QA数据集与InsightGen两阶段方法，通过主题图与邻域选择生成帮助改进开放问答的多样化见解。
ai.motivation: 开放问答需要综合、判断与探索，用户常通过多轮迭代精炼答案，现有基准缺乏对此过程的显式支持。
ai.method: InsightGen两阶段方法：先对文档集进行聚类构建主题表示，再从主题图中通过邻域选择相关上下文，最后用大语言模型生成多样化见解。
ai.result: 在3000个问题上的评估表明，InsightGen能持续生成有用、相关且可操作的见解，为该新任务建立了强基线。
ai.help_to_user: 为开放问答系统提供答案精炼支持，通过生成相关见解帮助用户扩展、改进或重新思考初始答案。

idea_spark.idea: 将答案作为探索起点而非终点，通过系统化见解生成支持迭代式问答交互。
idea_spark.risk: 见解的相关性与实用性高度依赖文档质量与主题表示的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发设计支持多轮探索的问答界面，将单次检索扩展为持续的知识发现过程。

zh.tldr: 提出文档驱动的相关见解生成新任务，并发布SCOpE-QA数据集与InsightGen两阶段方法，通过主题图与邻域选择生成帮助改进开放问答的多样化见解。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发设计支持多轮探索的问答界面，将单次检索扩展为持续的知识发现过程。

en.tldr: Introduces a new task of document-grounded related insight generation, releases the SCOpE-QA dataset, and proposes InsightGen—a two-stage method using thematic graphs and neighborhood selection to generate diverse insights for improving open-ended QA.
en.motivation: Open-ended QA requires synthesis, judgment, and exploration, with users often refining answers through multiple iterations, but existing benchmarks lack explicit support for this refinement process.
en.method: InsightGen: first constructs thematic representations of document collections via clustering, then selects related context through neighborhood selection from the thematic graph, and finally uses LLMs to generate diverse insights.
en.result: Evaluation on 3,000 questions shows InsightGen consistently produces useful, relevant, and actionable insights, establishing a strong baseline for the new task.
en.help_to_user: Supports answer refinement in open-ended QA by generating related insights that help users extend, improve, or rethink initial answers.

idea_spark.idea: Treat answers as starting points for exploration rather than endpoints, supporting iterative QA interaction through systematic insight generation.
idea_spark.risk: Relevance and usefulness of insights heavily depend on document quality and accuracy of thematic representations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires designing multi-turn exploratory QA interfaces that transform single retrieval into continuous knowledge discovery.

papers.title: Where Fake Citations Are Made: Tracing Field-Level Hallucination to Specific Neurons in LLMs
papers.summary: LLMs frequently generate fictitious yet convincing citations, often expressing high confidence even when the underlying reference is wrong. We study this failure across 9 models and 108{,}000 generated references, and find that author names fail far more often than other fields across all models and settings. Citation style has no measurable effect, while reasoning-oriented distillation degrades recall. Probes trained on one field transfer at near-chance levels to the others, suggesting that hallucination signals do not generalize across fields. Building on this finding, we apply elastic-net regularization with stability selection to neuron-level CETT values of Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct and identify a sparse set of field-specific hallucination neurons (FH-neurons). Causal intervention further confirms their role: amplifying these neurons increases hallucination, while suppressing them improves performance across fields, with larger gains in some fields. These results suggest a lightweight approach to detecting and mitigating citation hallucination using internal model signals alone.

ai.tldr: 研究发现大语言模型生成虚假引用时，作者名字字段的幻觉率最高。通过弹性网络正则化和稳定性选择，在Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct中识别出稀疏的字段特异性幻觉神经元（FH-neurons）。因果干预证实这些神经元的作用：放大它们会增加幻觉，抑制它们则能提升各字段性能。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型经常生成虚构但看似可信的引用，即使底层引用错误也表现出高度自信。这种引用幻觉现象普遍存在，但其内部机制和可检测性尚不明确。
ai.method: 在9个模型和108,000个生成引用上分析幻觉模式。使用弹性网络正则化结合稳定性选择，基于Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct的神经元级CETT值识别FH-neurons。通过因果干预（放大/抑制这些神经元）验证其功能。
ai.result: 作者名字字段的幻觉失败率远高于其他字段。幻觉信号在不同字段间不具泛化性。识别出的FH-neurons具有因果作用：放大它们增加幻觉，抑制它们改善性能，在某些字段提升更明显。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种仅使用内部模型信号的轻量级方法来检测和缓解引用幻觉。识别出的字段特异性幻觉神经元可作为干预目标，为模型可靠性改进提供新途径。

idea_spark.idea: 开发实时FH-neuron监控插件，在模型生成过程中动态抑制幻觉神经元。构建跨模型FH-neuron映射库，实现幻觉模式的模型间比较。
idea_spark.risk: 神经元干预可能破坏模型其他能力。FH-neurons的稀疏性可能导致检测遗漏。不同模型架构的神经元可比性未知。
idea_spark.inspiration: 幻觉可能由模型中少量特异性神经元介导，而非全局性故障。字段特异性表明幻觉机制具有模块化特征，为针对性修复提供了可能。

en.tldr: The study finds that author name fields have the highest hallucination rates when LLMs generate fake citations. Using elastic-net regularization with stability selection, sparse field-specific hallucination neurons (FH-neurons) are identified in Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct. Causal intervention confirms their role: amplifying them increases hallucination, while suppressing them improves performance across fields.
en.motivation: LLMs frequently generate fictitious yet convincing citations, often expressing high confidence even when the underlying reference is wrong. This citation hallucination is prevalent, but its internal mechanisms and detectability remain unclear.
en.method: Analyze hallucination patterns across 9 models and 108,000 generated references. Apply elastic-net regularization with stability selection to neuron-level CETT values of Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct to identify FH-neurons. Validate their function through causal intervention (amplifying/suppressing these neurons).
en.result: Author name fields fail far more often than other fields. Hallucination signals do not generalize across fields. Identified FH-neurons play a causal role: amplifying them increases hallucination, while suppressing them improves performance, with larger gains in some fields.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight approach to detecting and mitigating citation hallucination using internal model signals alone. Identified field-specific hallucination neurons can serve as intervention targets, offering new avenues for improving model reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a real-time FH-neuron monitoring plugin to dynamically suppress hallucination neurons during model generation. Build a cross-model FH-neuron mapping library to compare hallucination patterns across models.
idea_spark.risk: Neuron intervention may impair other model capabilities. The sparsity of FH-neurons could lead to detection omissions. The comparability of neurons across different model architectures is unknown.
idea_spark.inspiration: Hallucination may be mediated by a small set of specific neurons in the model, rather than being a global failure. Field-specificity suggests hallucination mechanisms have modular characteristics, enabling targeted fixes.

papers.title: HarmoniDiff-RS: Training-Free Diffusion Harmonization for Satellite Image Composition
papers.summary: Satellite image composition plays a critical role in remote sensing applications such as data augmentation, disaste simulation, and urban planning. We propose HarmoniDiff-RS, a training-free diffusion-based framework for harmonizing composite satellite images under diverse domain conditions. Our method aligns the source and target domains through a Latent Mean Shift operation that transfers radiometric characteristics between them. To balance harmonization and content preservation, we introduce a Timestep-wise Latent Fusion strategy by leveraging early inverted latents for high harmonization and late latents for semantic consistency to generate a set of composite candidates. A lightweight harmony classifier is trained to further automatically select the most coherent result among them. We also construct RSIC-H, a benchmark dataset for satellite image harmonization derived from fMoW, providing 500 paired composition samples. Experiments demonstrate that our method effectively performs satellite image composition, showing strong potential for scalable remote-sensing synthesis and simulation tasks. Code is available at: https://github.com/XiaoqiZhuang/HarmoniDiff-RS.

ai.tldr: HarmoniDiff-RS是一种无需训练的扩散模型框架，用于卫星图像合成的视觉协调，通过潜在均值偏移和时序潜在融合实现跨域协调，并构建了RSIC-H基准数据集。
ai.motivation: 卫星图像合成在数据增强、灾害模拟和城市规划等遥感应用中至关重要，但现有方法难以在不同域条件下实现协调的合成效果。
ai.method: 提出潜在均值偏移操作对齐源域和目标域的辐射特征；使用时序潜在融合策略平衡协调性与内容保持；训练轻量级协调分类器自动选择最佳合成结果。
ai.result: 实验表明该方法能有效执行卫星图像合成，在RSIC-H基准上表现良好，展示了可扩展的遥感合成与模拟潜力。
ai.help_to_user: 为遥感研究人员提供无需训练的图像协调工具，支持数据增强和场景模拟应用，代码已开源。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扩散模型不同时间步的潜在特征分别优化协调性和语义一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 在极端域差异下可能无法保持内容完整性，依赖预训练扩散模型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将训练自由范式应用于多模态遥感数据合成，或扩展至视频序列协调。

en.tldr: HarmoniDiff-RS is a training-free diffusion framework for satellite image composition harmonization, using Latent Mean Shift and Timestep-wise Latent Fusion for cross-domain alignment, with the RSIC-H benchmark dataset.
en.motivation: Satellite image composition is critical for remote sensing applications like data augmentation and disaster simulation, but existing methods struggle with harmonization under diverse domain conditions.
en.method: Proposes Latent Mean Shift to align radiometric characteristics; Timestep-wise Latent Fusion balances harmonization and content preservation; a lightweight harmony classifier selects the most coherent composite.
en.result: Experiments show effective satellite image composition, with strong potential for scalable remote-sensing synthesis and simulation tasks, validated on the RSIC-H benchmark.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free harmonization tool for remote sensing researchers, supporting data augmentation and scene simulation applications, with open-source code.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage early and late diffusion latents separately for high harmonization and semantic consistency.
idea_spark.risk: May struggle with extreme domain gaps affecting content preservation; relies on pre-trained diffusion models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying training-free paradigms to multimodal remote sensing data synthesis or extending to video sequence harmonization.

papers.title: DASH-KV: Accelerating Long-Context LLM Inference via Asymmetric KV Cache Hashing
papers.summary: The quadratic computational complexity of the standard attention mechanism constitutes a fundamental bottleneck for large language models in long-context inference. While existing KV cache compression methods alleviate memory pressure, they often sacrifice generation quality and fail to address the high overhead of floating-point arithmetic. This paper introduces DASH-KV, an innovative acceleration framework that reformulates attention as approximate nearest-neighbor search via asymmetric deep hashing. Under this paradigm, we design an asymmetric encoding architecture that differentially maps queries and keys to account for their distinctions in precision and reuse characteristics. To balance efficiency and accuracy, we further introduce a dynamic mixed-precision mechanism that adaptively retains full-precision computation for critical tokens. Extensive experiments on LongBench demonstrate that DASH-KV significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baseline methods while matching the performance of full attention, all while reducing inference complexity from O(N^2) to linear O(N). The code is available at https://github.com/Zhihan-Zh/DASH-KV

ai.tldr: DASH-KV 是一种通过非对称深度哈希将注意力重新表述为近似最近邻搜索的框架，将长上下文LLM推理复杂度从O(N²)降至线性O(N)，同时保持生成质量。
ai.motivation: 标准注意力机制的二次计算复杂度是长上下文推理的根本瓶颈。现有KV缓存压缩方法虽缓解内存压力，但常牺牲生成质量且未解决浮点运算高开销问题。
ai.method: 设计非对称编码架构，对查询和键进行差异化映射以适配其精度和复用特性差异；引入动态混合精度机制，自适应地为关键令牌保留全精度计算。
ai.result: 在LongBench上的实验表明，DASH-KV显著优于现有基线方法，同时匹配全注意力性能，并将推理复杂度从O(N²)降至线性O(N)。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要处理长文本（如文档分析、长对话）的LLM应用提供高效推理方案，在保持质量的同时大幅降低计算开销。

idea_spark.idea: 用哈希桶快速筛选相关键值对，避免全量相似度计算；通过动态精度分配平衡效率与精度。
idea_spark.risk: 哈希冲突可能导致关键上下文信息丢失；动态精度阈值需要精细调优以适应不同任务分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴数据库索引思想加速注意力；将计算瓶颈转化为检索问题，结合传统近似算法与现代深度学习。

en.tldr: DASH-KV is a framework that reformulates attention as approximate nearest-neighbor search via asymmetric deep hashing, reducing long-context LLM inference complexity from O(N²) to linear O(N) while maintaining generation quality.
en.motivation: The quadratic computational complexity of standard attention is a fundamental bottleneck for long-context inference. Existing KV cache compression methods alleviate memory pressure but often sacrifice generation quality and fail to address high floating-point arithmetic overhead.
en.method: Design an asymmetric encoding architecture that differentially maps queries and keys to account for distinctions in precision and reuse characteristics; introduce a dynamic mixed-precision mechanism that adaptively retains full-precision computation for critical tokens.
en.result: Extensive experiments on LongBench show DASH-KV significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines while matching full attention performance, reducing inference complexity from O(N²) to linear O(N).
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient inference solution for LLM applications requiring long-text processing (e.g., document analysis, long dialogues), significantly reducing computational overhead while maintaining quality.

idea_spark.idea: Use hash buckets to quickly filter relevant key-value pairs, avoiding full similarity computation; balance efficiency and accuracy through dynamic precision allocation.
idea_spark.risk: Hash collisions may cause loss of critical contextual information; dynamic precision thresholds require fine-tuning for different task distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw inspiration from database indexing to accelerate attention; transform computational bottlenecks into retrieval problems, combining traditional approximation algorithms with modern deep learning.

papers.title: ReImagine: Rethinking Controllable High-Quality Human Video Generation via Image-First Synthesis
papers.summary: Human video generation remains challenging due to the difficulty of jointly modeling human appearance, motion, and camera viewpoint under limited multi-view data. Existing methods often address these factors separately, resulting in limited controllability or reduced visual quality. We revisit this problem from an image-first perspective, where high-quality human appearance is learned via image generation and used as a prior for video synthesis, decoupling appearance modeling from temporal consistency. We propose a pose- and viewpoint-controllable pipeline that combines a pretrained image backbone with SMPL-X-based motion guidance, together with a training-free temporal refinement stage based on a pretrained video diffusion model. Our method produces high-quality, temporally consistent videos under diverse poses and viewpoints. We also release a canonical human dataset and an auxiliary model for compositional human image synthesis. Code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/Taited/ReImagine.

ai.tldr: 提出ReImagine，一种基于图像优先合成的高质量可控人体视频生成方法，通过解耦外观建模与时间一致性，实现姿态与视角可控的高质量视频生成。
ai.motivation: 现有方法难以在有限多视角数据下联合建模人体外观、运动和相机视角，导致可控性或视觉质量受限。
ai.method: 采用图像优先视角：1) 使用预训练图像主干学习高质量人体外观作为先验；2) 结合SMPL-X运动引导进行姿态与视角控制；3) 基于预训练视频扩散模型进行免训练时序细化。
ai.result: 方法能生成高质量、时序一致且姿态与视角多样的人体视频，并发布了规范人体数据集和组合人体图像合成辅助模型。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要生成高质量可控人体视频的研究者提供了新的图像优先框架、公开代码与数据集。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂视频生成分解为高质量静态生成与可控运动合成两个相对独立的子问题。
idea_spark.risk: 对预训练图像/视频模型依赖较强，数据偏差可能影响生成多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用现有强大生成模型作为组件，通过模块化设计解决复杂生成任务。

zh.tldr: 提出ReImagine，一种基于图像优先合成的高质量可控人体视频生成方法，通过解耦外观建模与时间一致性，实现姿态与视角可控的高质量视频生成。

zh.help_to_user: 为需要生成高质量可控人体视频的研究者提供了新的图像优先框架、公开代码与数据集。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂视频生成分解为高质量静态生成与可控运动合成两个相对独立的子问题。
idea_spark.risk: 对预训练图像/视频模型依赖较强，数据偏差可能影响生成多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用现有强大生成模型作为组件，通过模块化设计解决复杂生成任务。

en.tldr: Proposes ReImagine, an image-first controllable high-quality human video generation method that decouples appearance modeling from temporal consistency for pose- and viewpoint-controllable synthesis.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle to jointly model human appearance, motion, and camera viewpoint with limited multi-view data, leading to limited controllability or reduced visual quality.
en.method: Adopts an image-first perspective: 1) learns high-quality human appearance via a pretrained image backbone as prior; 2) combines SMPL-X-based motion guidance for pose/viewpoint control; 3) employs training-free temporal refinement using a pretrained video diffusion model.
en.result: Produces high-quality, temporally consistent videos under diverse poses and viewpoints, and releases a canonical human dataset and auxiliary model for compositional human image synthesis.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new image-first framework, public code, and dataset for researchers needing high-quality controllable human video generation.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose complex video generation into two relatively independent subproblems: high-quality static generation and controllable motion synthesis.
idea_spark.risk: Heavy reliance on pretrained image/video models; data bias may affect generation diversity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires leveraging existing powerful generative models as components to solve complex generation tasks through modular design.

papers.title: PanDA: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Multimodal 3D Panoptic Segmentation in Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: This paper presents the first study on Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) for multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation (mm-3DPS), aiming to improve generalization under domain shifts commonly encountered in real-world autonomous driving. A straightforward solution is to employ a pseudo-labeling strategy, which is widely used in UDA to generate supervision for unlabeled target data, combined with an mm-3DPS backbone. However, existing supervised mm-3DPS methods rely heavily on strong cross-modal complementarity between LiDAR and RGB inputs, making them fragile under domain shifts where one modality degrades (e.g., poor lighting or adverse weather). Moreover, conventional pseudo-labeling typically retains only high-confidence regions, leading to fragmented masks and incomplete object supervision, which are issues particularly detrimental to panoptic segmentation. To address these challenges, we propose PanDA, the first UDA framework specifically designed for multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation. To improve robustness against single-sensor degradation, we introduce an asymmetric multimodal augmentation that selectively drops regions to simulate domain shifts and improve robust representation learning. To enhance pseudo-label completeness and reliability, we further develop a dual-expert pseudo-label refinement module that extracts domain-invariant priors from both 2D and 3D modalities. Extensive experiments across diverse domain shifts, spanning time, weather, location, and sensor variations, significantly surpass state-of-the-art UDA baselines for 3D semantic segmentation.

ai.tldr: 首个针对自动驾驶中多模态3D全景分割的无监督域适应框架PanDA，通过非对称多模态增强和双专家伪标签优化解决域偏移问题。
ai.motivation: 现有监督式多模态3D全景分割方法严重依赖LiDAR与RGB的跨模态互补性，在单传感器退化（如恶劣天气）时性能脆弱；传统伪标签方法仅保留高置信区域，导致掩码碎片化，对全景分割尤为不利。
ai.method: 提出PanDA框架：1）非对称多模态增强，选择性丢弃区域以模拟域偏移，提升鲁棒表征学习；2）双专家伪标签优化模块，从2D和3D模态提取域不变先验，增强伪标签完整性与可靠性。
ai.result: 在涵盖时间、天气、地点和传感器变化的多种域偏移场景中，实验显著超越现有3D语义分割的UDA基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶中多模态3D全景分割的域适应问题提供了首个专用解决方案，提升了模型在真实世界域偏移下的泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 通过模拟单传感器退化来训练鲁棒的多模态融合模型；利用多模态一致性先验优化伪标签质量。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟的退化模式可能与真实域偏移存在差异；双专家模块的计算开销需权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索更精细的模态退化模拟方法；考虑将框架扩展至动态场景或更多传感器模态。

zh.tldr: 首个针对自动驾驶中多模态3D全景分割的无监督域适应框架PanDA，通过非对称多模态增强和双专家伪标签优化解决域偏移问题。

zh.method: 提出PanDA框架：1）非对称多模态增强，选择性丢弃区域以模拟域偏移，提升鲁棒表征学习；2）双专家伪标签优化模块，从2D和3D模态提取域不变先验，增强伪标签完整性与可靠性。

zh.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶中多模态3D全景分割的域适应问题提供了首个专用解决方案，提升了模型在真实世界域偏移下的泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 通过模拟单传感器退化来训练鲁棒的多模态融合模型；利用多模态一致性先验优化伪标签质量。

idea_spark.inspiration: 可探索更精细的模态退化模拟方法；考虑将框架扩展至动态场景或更多传感器模态。

en.tldr: PanDA: the first unsupervised domain adaptation framework for multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation in autonomous driving, addressing domain shifts via asymmetric multimodal augmentation and dual-expert pseudo-label refinement.
en.motivation: Supervised mm-3DPS methods heavily rely on cross-modal complementarity between LiDAR and RGB, making them fragile under domain shifts where one modality degrades. Conventional pseudo-labeling retains only high-confidence regions, leading to fragmented masks harmful to panoptic segmentation.
en.method: Propose PanDA framework: 1) asymmetric multimodal augmentation that selectively drops regions to simulate domain shifts for robust representation learning; 2) dual-expert pseudo-label refinement module extracting domain-invariant priors from both 2D and 3D modalities to enhance pseudo-label completeness and reliability.
en.result: Extensive experiments across diverse domain shifts (time, weather, location, sensor variations) significantly surpass state-of-the-art UDA baselines for 3D semantic segmentation.
en.help_to_user: Provides the first dedicated solution for domain adaptation in multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation, improving model generalization under real-world domain shifts in autonomous driving.

idea_spark.idea: Train robust multimodal fusion models by simulating single-sensor degradation; leverage multimodal consistency priors to refine pseudo-label quality.
idea_spark.risk: Simulated degradation patterns may differ from real domain shifts; computational overhead of dual-expert module needs balancing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore more refined modality degradation simulation methods; consider extending framework to dynamic scenes or more sensor modalities.

papers.title: Divide-and-Conquer Approach to Holistic Cognition in High-Similarity Contexts with Limited Data
papers.summary: Ultra-fine-grained visual categorization (Ultra-FGVC) aims to classify highly similar subcategories within fine-grained objects using limited training samples. However, holistic yet discriminative cues, such as leaf contours in extremely similar cultivars, remain under-explored in current studies, thereby limiting recognition performance. Though crucial, modeling holistic cues with complex morphological structures typically requires massive training samples, posing significant challenges in data-limited scenarios. To address this challenge, we propose a novel Divide-and-Conquer Holistic Cognition Network (DHCNet) that implements a divide-and-conquer strategy by decomposing holistic cues into spatially-associated subtle discrepancies and progressively establishing the holistic cognition process, significantly simplifying holistic cognition while reducing dependency on training data. Technically, DHCNet begins by progressively analyzing subtle discrepancies, transitioning from smaller local patches to larger ones using a self-shuffling operation on local regions. Simultaneously, it leverages the unaffected local regions to potentially guide the perception of the original topological structure among the shuffled patches, thereby aiding in the establishment of spatial associations for these discrepancies. Additionally, DHCNet incorporates the online refinement of these holistic cues discovered from local regions into the training process to iteratively improve their quality. As a result, DHCNet uses these holistic cues as supervisory signals to fine-tune the parameters of the recognition model, thus improving its sensitivity to holistic cues across the entire objects. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that DHCNet achieves remarkable performance on five widely-used Ultra-FGVC datasets.

ai.tldr: 提出DHCNet，一种分治策略网络，通过分解整体线索为空间关联的细微差异，在有限数据下实现超细粒度视觉分类的显著性能提升。
ai.motivation: 超细粒度视觉分类（Ultra-FGVC）在数据有限时，难以建模具有复杂形态结构的整体判别性线索（如叶片轮廓），限制了识别性能。
ai.method: 采用分治策略：1）通过局部区域自打乱操作，从局部到全局渐进分析细微差异；2）利用未受影响的局部区域引导感知原始拓扑结构，建立差异的空间关联；3）在线精炼从局部发现的整体线索，并作为监督信号微调模型。
ai.result: 在五个广泛使用的Ultra-FGVC数据集上取得了卓越的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种在数据有限场景下，通过分治策略简化整体认知、降低对训练数据依赖的有效方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将复杂的整体认知问题分解为空间关联的局部差异分析，并通过在线精炼迭代提升线索质量。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能对局部区域划分和打乱操作的设定敏感；在差异极其细微或拓扑结构高度不规则时可能面临挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将认知科学中的分治思想与计算机视觉结合，通过模拟渐进认知过程来设计数据高效的模型。

en.tldr: Proposes DHCNet, a divide-and-conquer strategy network that decomposes holistic cues into spatially-associated subtle discrepancies, achieving significant performance improvement in Ultra-FGVC with limited data.
en.motivation: Ultra-fine-grained visual categorization (Ultra-FGVC) struggles to model holistic yet discriminative cues (e.g., leaf contours) with complex morphological structures under limited training data, hindering recognition performance.
en.method: Employs a divide-and-conquer strategy: 1) progressively analyzes subtle discrepancies from local to global patches via a self-shuffling operation on local regions; 2) leverages unaffected local regions to guide perception of original topological structure, establishing spatial associations for discrepancies; 3) incorporates online refinement of discovered holistic cues as supervisory signals to fine-tune the model.
en.result: Demonstrates remarkable performance on five widely-used Ultra-FGVC datasets.
en.help_to_user: Provides an effective approach to simplify holistic cognition and reduce dependency on training data in data-limited scenarios via a divide-and-conquer strategy.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the complex holistic cognition problem into analyzing spatially-associated local discrepancies and iteratively improve cue quality through online refinement.
idea_spark.risk: The method may be sensitive to the settings of local region partitioning and shuffling operations; may face challenges when differences are extremely subtle or topological structures are highly irregular.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining the divide-and-conquer idea from cognitive science with computer vision to design data-efficient models by simulating progressive cognitive processes.

papers.title: Rank-Turbulence Delta and Interpretable Approaches to Stylometric Delta Metrics
papers.summary: This article introduces two new measures for authorship attribution - Rank-Turbulence Delta and Jensen-Shannon Delta - which generalise Burrows's classical Delta by applying distance functions designed for probabilistic distributions. We first set out the theoretical basis of the measures, contrasting centred and uncentred z-scoring of word-frequency vectors and re-casting the uncentred vectors as probability distributions. Building on this representation, we develop a token-level decomposition that renders every Delta distance numerically interpretable, thereby facilitating close reading and the validation of results. The effectiveness of the methods is assessed on four literary corpora in English, German, French and Russian. The English, German and French datasets are compiled from Project Gutenberg, whereas the Russian benchmark is the SOCIOLIT corpus containing 755 works by 180 authors spanning the eighteenth to the twenty-first centuries. Rank-Turbulence Delta attains attribution accuracy comparable with Cosine Delta; Jensen-Shannon Delta consistently matches or exceeds the performance of canonical Burrows's Delta. Finally, several established attribution algorithms are re-evaluated on the extended SOCIOLIT corpus.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了两种新的作者归属度量方法：Rank-Turbulence Delta 和 Jensen-Shannon Delta，它们通过应用为概率分布设计的距离函数来推广经典的Burrows's Delta。
ai.motivation: 经典的Burrows's Delta方法在作者归属任务中应用广泛，但缺乏对距离度量的概率解释和可解释性分解。
ai.method: 首先建立理论框架，对比词频向量的中心化和非中心化z-scoring，并将非中心化向量重新表述为概率分布。在此基础上，开发了令牌级分解，使每个Delta距离在数值上可解释。
ai.result: 在英语、德语、法语和俄语四个文学语料库上评估方法有效性。Rank-Turbulence Delta达到与Cosine Delta相当的归属准确率；Jensen-Shannon Delta始终匹配或超过经典Burrows's Delta的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了两种改进的作者归属度量方法，具有更好的理论基础和可解释性，支持多语言文学文本分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将词频向量重新解释为概率分布，应用信息论距离度量
idea_spark.risk: 需要足够大的文本样本才能获得稳定的概率分布估计
idea_spark.inspiration: 这种方法可以扩展到其他文本分类任务，如风格分析、抄袭检测等

en.tldr: This article introduces two new measures for authorship attribution - Rank-Turbulence Delta and Jensen-Shannon Delta - which generalize Burrows's classical Delta by applying distance functions designed for probabilistic distributions.
en.motivation: Classical Burrows's Delta is widely used in authorship attribution but lacks probabilistic interpretation and interpretable decomposition of distance metrics.
en.method: First establish theoretical framework contrasting centered and uncentered z-scoring of word-frequency vectors, recasting uncentered vectors as probability distributions. Then develop token-level decomposition making every Delta distance numerically interpretable.
en.result: Evaluate effectiveness on four literary corpora in English, German, French and Russian. Rank-Turbulence Delta attains attribution accuracy comparable with Cosine Delta; Jensen-Shannon Delta consistently matches or exceeds performance of canonical Burrows's Delta.
en.help_to_user: Provides two improved authorship attribution measures with better theoretical foundation and interpretability, supporting multilingual literary text analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Reinterpret word-frequency vectors as probability distributions and apply information-theoretic distance measures
idea_spark.risk: Requires sufficiently large text samples for stable probability distribution estimation
idea_spark.inspiration: This approach could be extended to other text classification tasks such as style analysis, plagiarism detection, etc.

papers.title: AutoAWG: Adverse Weather Generation with Adaptive Multi-Controls for Automotive Videos
papers.summary: Perception robustness under adverse weather remains a critical challenge for autonomous driving, with the core bottleneck being the scarcity of real-world video data in adverse weather. Existing weather generation approaches struggle to balance visual quality and annotation reusability. We present AutoAWG, a controllable Adverse Weather video Generation framework for Autonomous driving. Our method employs a semantics-guided adaptive fusion of multiple controls to balance strong weather stylization with high-fidelity preservation of safety-critical targets; leverages a vanishing point-anchored temporal synthesis strategy to construct training sequences from static images, thereby reducing reliance on synthetic data; and adopts masked training to enhance long-horizon generation stability. On the nuScenes validation set, AutoAWG significantly outperforms prior state-of-the-art methods: without first-frame conditioning, FID and FVD are relatively reduced by 50.0% and 16.1%; with first-frame conditioning, they are further reduced by 8.7% and 7.2%, respectively. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate advantages in style fidelity, temporal consistency, and semantic--structural integrity, underscoring the practical value of AutoAWG for improving downstream perception in autonomous driving. Our code is available at: https://github.com/higherhu/AutoAWG

ai.tldr: AutoAWG是一个可控的恶劣天气视频生成框架，通过多控制自适应融合和时序合成策略，为自动驾驶感知提供高质量合成数据。
ai.motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的感知鲁棒性面临挑战，核心瓶颈是真实恶劣天气视频数据的稀缺。现有天气生成方法难以平衡视觉质量和标注可重用性。
ai.method: 采用语义引导的自适应多控制融合来平衡天气风格化与安全关键目标的高保真保留；利用消失点锚定的时序合成策略从静态图像构建训练序列；采用掩码训练增强长时程生成稳定性。
ai.result: 在nuScenes验证集上显著优于现有方法：无首帧条件时FID和FVD相对降低50.0%和16.1%；有首帧条件时进一步降低8.7%和7.2%。在风格保真度、时序一致性和语义结构完整性方面具有优势。
ai.help_to_user: 为自动驾驶感知模型训练提供高质量的恶劣天气合成视频数据，减少对真实数据或完全合成数据的依赖，提升下游感知任务的性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将恶劣天气生成分解为可独立控制的风格化与保真度组件，并通过语义引导进行自适应融合。
idea_spark.risk: 生成视频的物理真实性和与真实传感器数据的对齐程度可能存在局限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将时序合成与内容保真分离控制的思想应用于其他需要保持特定结构信息的生成任务中。

en.tldr: AutoAWG is a controllable adverse weather video generation framework that uses adaptive multi-control fusion and temporal synthesis strategies to provide high-quality synthetic data for autonomous driving perception.
en.motivation: Perception robustness under adverse weather remains a critical challenge for autonomous driving, with the core bottleneck being the scarcity of real-world video data in adverse weather. Existing weather generation approaches struggle to balance visual quality and annotation reusability.
en.method: Employs semantics-guided adaptive fusion of multiple controls to balance weather stylization with high-fidelity preservation of safety-critical targets; leverages vanishing point-anchored temporal synthesis to construct training sequences from static images; adopts masked training to enhance long-horizon generation stability.
en.result: Significantly outperforms prior methods on nuScenes validation set: without first-frame conditioning, FID and FVD are relatively reduced by 50.0% and 16.1%; with first-frame conditioning, further reduced by 8.7% and 7.2%. Demonstrates advantages in style fidelity, temporal consistency, and semantic-structural integrity.
en.help_to_user: Provides high-quality synthetic adverse weather video data for training autonomous driving perception models, reducing reliance on real data or fully synthetic data, and improving downstream perception performance.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose adverse weather generation into independently controllable stylization and fidelity components, with semantic-guided adaptive fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Potential limitations in physical realism of generated videos and alignment with real sensor data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the idea of separating temporal synthesis from content fidelity control for other generation tasks requiring preservation of specific structural information.

papers.title: Geometry-Guided Self-Supervision for Ultra-Fine-Grained Recognition with Limited Data
papers.summary: This paper investigates the intrinsic geometrical features of highly similar objects and introduces a general self-supervised framework called the Geometric Attribute Exploration Network (GAEor), which is designed to address the ultra-fine-grained visual categorization (Ultra-FGVC) task in data-limited scenarios. Unlike prior work that often captures subtle yet critical distinctions, GAEor generates geometric attributes as novel alternative recognition cues. These attributes are determined by various details within the object, aligned with its geometric patterns, such as the intricate vein structures in soybean leaves. Crucially, each category exhibits distinct geometric descriptors that serve as powerful cues, even among objects with minimal visual variation -- a factor largely overlooked in recent research. GAEor discovers these geometric attributes by first amplifying geometry-relevant details via visual feedback from a backbone network, then embedding the relative polar coordinates of these details into the final representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GAEor significantly sets new state-of-the-art records in five widely-used Ultra-FGVC benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 本文提出GAEor框架，通过挖掘物体的几何属性作为识别线索，解决数据有限场景下的超细粒度视觉分类问题。
ai.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉高度相似物体间的细微差异，尤其在数据有限时。几何模式（如叶片脉络）可作为稳定且具判别性的特征，但当前研究对此关注不足。
ai.method: GAEor首先通过骨干网络的视觉反馈放大与几何相关的细节，然后将这些细节的相对极坐标嵌入最终表示，从而发现几何属性。
ai.result: 在五个广泛使用的Ultra-FGVC基准测试中，GAEor显著创造了新的最先进记录。
ai.help_to_user: 为数据有限的细粒度分类任务提供了一种不依赖大量标注、利用几何内在特征的通用自监督框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用相对极坐标编码局部细节的空间关系，作为几何描述符。
idea_spark.risk: 对几何模式不显著或混乱的物体类别可能效果有限；依赖骨干网络初始反馈的质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物体的内在几何结构（如生物形态、纹理走向）转化为可学习的、与类别强相关的描述符，而非仅依赖外观像素差异。

zh.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉高度相似物体间的细微差异，尤其在数据有限时。几何模式（如叶片脉络）可作为稳定且具判别性的特征，但当前研究对此关注不足。

idea_spark.risk: 对几何模式不显著或混乱的物体类别可能效果有限；依赖骨干网络初始反馈的质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将物体的内在几何结构（如生物形态、纹理走向）转化为可学习的、与类别强相关的描述符，而非仅依赖外观像素差异。

en.tldr: This paper proposes the GAEor framework, which addresses Ultra-Fine-Grained Visual Categorization in data-limited scenarios by exploring geometric attributes as recognition cues.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle to capture subtle distinctions among highly similar objects, especially with limited data. Geometric patterns (e.g., leaf veins) can serve as stable and discriminative features, but are largely overlooked in recent research.
en.method: GAEor discovers geometric attributes by first amplifying geometry-relevant details via visual feedback from a backbone network, then embedding the relative polar coordinates of these details into the final representation.
en.result: Extensive experiments show that GAEor significantly sets new state-of-the-art records on five widely-used Ultra-FGVC benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general self-supervised framework for fine-grained recognition with limited data, leveraging intrinsic geometric features without heavy reliance on annotations.

idea_spark.idea: Encode spatial relationships of local details using relative polar coordinates as geometric descriptors.
idea_spark.risk: May be less effective for object categories with insignificant or chaotic geometric patterns; depends on the quality of initial feedback from the backbone network.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transform intrinsic geometric structures of objects (e.g., biological morphology, texture orientation) into learnable, category-strong descriptors, rather than relying solely on appearance pixel differences.

papers.title: DanceCrafter: Fine-Grained Text-Driven Controllable Dance Generation via Choreographic Syntax
papers.summary: Text-driven controllable dance generation remains under-explored, primarily due to the severe scarcity of high-quality datasets and the inherent difficulty of articulating complex choreographies. Characterizing dance is particularly challenging owing to its intricate spatial dynamics, strong directionality, and the highly decoupled movements of distinct body parts. To overcome these bottlenecks, we bridge principles from dance studies, human anatomy, and biomechanics to propose \textit{Choreographic Syntax}, a novel theoretical framework with a tailored annotation system. Grounded in this syntax, we combine professional dance archives with high-fidelity motion capture data to construct \textbf{DanceFlow}, the most fine-grained dance dataset to date. It encompasses 41 hours of high-quality motions paired with 6.34 million words of detailed descriptions. At the model level, we introduce \textbf{DanceCrafter}, a tailored motion transformer built upon the Momentum Human Rig. To circumvent optimization instabilities, we construct a continuous manifold motion representation paired with a hybrid normalization strategy. Furthermore, we design an anatomy-aware loss to explicitly regulate the decoupled nature of body parts. Together, these adaptations empower DanceCrafter to achieve the high-fidelity and stable generation of complex dance sequences. Extensive evaluations and user studies demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in motion quality, fine-grained controllability, and generation naturalness.

ai.tldr: DanceCrafter通过提出舞蹈语法框架和构建精细数据集DanceFlow，实现了基于文本的细粒度可控舞蹈生成。
ai.motivation: 现有文本驱动舞蹈生成面临高质量数据稀缺和复杂舞蹈动作难以描述的挑战。
ai.method: 结合舞蹈研究、人体解剖学和生物力学提出舞蹈语法框架，构建精细数据集DanceFlow，并基于Momentum Human Rig设计运动变换器，采用连续流形运动表示、混合归一化策略和解剖感知损失。
ai.result: 模型在运动质量、细粒度可控性和生成自然度方面达到最先进水平，能够稳定生成高保真复杂舞蹈序列。
ai.help_to_user: 为动画制作、虚拟角色控制和舞蹈教育提供了高质量的文本到舞蹈生成工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将解剖学约束显式融入生成模型，以更好地控制身体各部分的解耦运动。
idea_spark.risk: 舞蹈语法的普适性需要更多舞蹈风格验证；实时生成可能面临计算效率挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合领域知识（如舞蹈理论）与数据驱动方法，能有效解决复杂结构化生成问题。

zh.tldr: DanceCrafter通过提出舞蹈语法框架和构建精细数据集DanceFlow，实现了基于文本的细粒度可控舞蹈生成。

zh.method: 结合舞蹈研究、人体解剖学和生物力学提出舞蹈语法框架，构建精细数据集DanceFlow，并基于Momentum Human Rig设计运动变换器，采用连续流形运动表示、混合归一化策略和解剖感知损失。
zh.result: 模型在运动质量、细粒度可控性和生成自然度方面达到最先进水平，能够稳定生成高保真复杂舞蹈序列。
zh.help_to_user: 为动画制作、虚拟角色控制和舞蹈教育提供了高质量的文本到舞蹈生成工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将解剖学约束显式融入生成模型，以更好地控制身体各部分的解耦运动。
idea_spark.risk: 舞蹈语法的普适性需要更多舞蹈风格验证；实时生成可能面临计算效率挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合领域知识（如舞蹈理论）与数据驱动方法，能有效解决复杂结构化生成问题。

en.tldr: DanceCrafter achieves fine-grained text-driven controllable dance generation via a novel choreographic syntax framework and the construction of the detailed DanceFlow dataset.
en.motivation: Text-driven dance generation remains under-explored due to scarcity of high-quality datasets and difficulty in articulating complex choreographies.
en.method: Proposes Choreographic Syntax bridging dance studies, anatomy, and biomechanics; constructs DanceFlow dataset; designs DanceCrafter motion transformer with continuous manifold representation, hybrid normalization, and anatomy-aware loss.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance in motion quality, fine-grained controllability, and generation naturalness, enabling stable high-fidelity generation of complex dance sequences.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-quality text-to-dance generation tool for animation production, virtual character control, and dance education.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly incorporate anatomical constraints into generative models to better regulate decoupled movements of body parts.
idea_spark.risk: Generality of choreographic syntax needs validation across more dance styles; real-time generation may face computational efficiency challenges.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining domain knowledge (e.g., dance theory) with data-driven approaches effectively addresses complex structured generation problems.

papers.title: Colour Extraction Pipeline for Odonates using Computer Vision
papers.summary: The correlation between insect morphological traits and climate has been documented in physiological studies, but such studies remain limited by the time-consuming nature of the data analysis. In particular, the open source datasets often lack annotations of species' morphological traits, making dedicated annotations campaigns necessary; these efforts are typically local in scale and costly. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to identify and segment body parts of Odonates (dragonflies and damselflies) using deep neural networks, with the ultimate goal of extracting body parts' colouration. The pipeline is trained on a limited annotated dataset and refined with pseudo supervised data. We show that, by using open source images from citizen science platforms, our approach can segment each visible subject (Odonates) into head, thorax, abdomen, and wings and then extract a colour palette for each body part. This will enable large-scale statistical analysis of ecological correlations (e.g., between colouration and climate change, habitat loss, or geolocation) which are crucial for quantifying and assessing ecosystem biodiversity status.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的蜻蜓目昆虫颜色提取流程，利用深度学习分割身体部位并提取颜色信息，以支持大规模生态相关性分析。
ai.motivation: 昆虫形态特征与气候的关联已有生理学研究，但数据分析耗时且开源数据集常缺乏形态特征标注，导致研究规模受限、成本高昂。
ai.method: 使用深度神经网络识别和分割蜻蜓目昆虫的身体部位（头、胸、腹、翅），在有限标注数据集上训练，并通过伪监督数据进行优化，利用公民科学平台的开放图像进行颜色提取。
ai.result: 流程能够从开放图像中分割每个可见昆虫的身体部位，并为每个部位提取颜色调色板，为大规模生态统计分析（如颜色与气候变化、栖息地丧失或地理位置的关联）奠定基础。
ai.help_to_user: 该流程自动化了昆虫形态特征提取过程，减少了人工标注成本，使大规模生态相关性研究成为可能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用公民科学平台的开放图像和伪监督学习，解决标注数据稀缺问题，实现自动化形态特征分析。
idea_spark.risk: 图像质量、光照条件和物种多样性可能影响分割和颜色提取的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将计算机视觉与生态学结合，利用开放数据推动生物多样性量化评估。

idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将计算机视觉与生态学结合，利用开放数据推动生物多样性量化评估。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a computer vision pipeline for colour extraction in Odonates, using deep learning to segment body parts and extract colour information to enable large-scale ecological correlation analysis.
en.motivation: Correlations between insect morphological traits and climate are documented but limited by time-consuming data analysis; open-source datasets often lack morphological annotations, making dedicated campaigns local and costly.
en.method: A pipeline using deep neural networks to identify and segment Odonate body parts (head, thorax, abdomen, wings), trained on limited annotated data and refined with pseudo-supervised data, leveraging open-source images from citizen science platforms for colour extraction.
en.result: The approach segments each visible subject into body parts and extracts a colour palette for each part, enabling large-scale statistical analysis of ecological correlations (e.g., colouration with climate change, habitat loss, or geolocation).
en.help_to_user: The pipeline automates insect morphological trait extraction, reducing manual annotation costs and enabling large-scale ecological correlation studies.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage open images from citizen science platforms and pseudo-supervised learning to address scarce annotation data for automated morphological analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Image quality, lighting conditions, and species diversity may affect segmentation and colour extraction accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining computer vision with ecology to use open data for biodiversity quantification and assessment.

papers.title: CityRAG: Stepping Into a City via Spatially-Grounded Video Generation
papers.summary: We address the problem of generating a 3D-consistent, navigable environment that is spatially grounded: a simulation of a real location. Existing video generative models can produce a plausible sequence that is consistent with a text (T2V) or image (I2V) prompt. However, the capability to reconstruct the real world under arbitrary weather conditions and dynamic object configurations is essential for downstream applications including autonomous driving and robotics simulation. To this end, we present CityRAG, a video generative model that leverages large corpora of geo-registered data as context to ground generation to the physical scene, while maintaining learned priors for complex motion and appearance changes. CityRAG relies on temporally unaligned training data, which teaches the model to semantically disentangle the underlying scene from its transient attributes. Our experiments demonstrate that CityRAG can generate coherent minutes-long, physically grounded video sequences, maintain weather and lighting conditions over thousands of frames, achieve loop closure, and navigate complex trajectories to reconstruct real-world geography.

ai.tldr: CityRAG是一种利用地理注册数据生成空间接地的、3D一致可导航城市环境视频的模型，支持长时间序列、天气光照一致性和复杂轨迹重建。
ai.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能生成与文本或图像提示一致的序列，但缺乏对真实世界任意天气和动态物体配置的重建能力，而这对于自动驾驶和机器人仿真等下游应用至关重要。
ai.method: 利用大规模地理注册数据作为上下文，将生成过程接地到物理场景，同时保持对复杂运动和外观变化的先验学习；采用时间未对齐的训练数据，使模型能语义解耦底层场景与瞬态属性。
ai.result: 能够生成连贯的分钟级物理接地视频序列，在数千帧中保持天气和光照条件，实现闭环一致性，并导航复杂轨迹以重建真实世界地理。
ai.help_to_user: 为需要高保真、可导航城市环境仿真的应用（如自动驾驶测试、机器人训练）提供了一种数据生成解决方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用时间未对齐数据训练模型以解耦场景与瞬态属性，这一思路可应用于视频编辑中的背景/前景分离。
idea_spark.risk: 对大规模地理注册数据的依赖可能限制模型在数据稀缺区域的适用性；生成结果的物理准确性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将空间先验与生成模型结合，为增强现实、虚拟旅游等应用创造更真实的沉浸式环境。

en.tldr: CityRAG is a video generative model that leverages geo-registered data to produce spatially-grounded, 3D-consistent navigable urban environments, supporting long sequences, weather/lighting consistency, and complex trajectory reconstruction.
en.motivation: Existing video generative models can produce sequences consistent with text or image prompts but lack the capability to reconstruct the real world under arbitrary weather and dynamic object configurations, which is essential for downstream applications like autonomous driving and robotics simulation.
en.method: Utilizes large corpora of geo-registered data as context to ground generation to the physical scene while maintaining learned priors for complex motion and appearance changes; employs temporally unaligned training data to semantically disentangle the underlying scene from transient attributes.
en.result: Generates coherent minutes-long, physically grounded video sequences, maintains weather and lighting conditions over thousands of frames, achieves loop closure, and navigates complex trajectories to reconstruct real-world geography.
en.help_to_user: Provides a data generation solution for applications requiring high-fidelity, navigable urban environment simulations, such as autonomous vehicle testing and robotics training.

idea_spark.idea: Training with temporally unaligned data to disentangle scene from transient attributes could inspire video editing techniques for background/foreground separation.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on large-scale geo-registered data may limit applicability in data-scarce regions; physical accuracy of generated outputs requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining spatial priors with generative models to create more realistic immersive environments for applications like augmented reality and virtual tourism.

papers.title: Crash-free Deductive Verifiers
papers.summary: As deductive verifiers mature, their potential user base is growing from the initial core developers to other users. To convince external users of the suitability of verifiers, these tools must run reliably out of the box, give meaningful error messages and display correct results. Yet deductive verifiers are large and complex software systems and their own full verification is often out of reach. We therefore need complementary means to provide such guarantees. This paper advocates the use of fuzzing as a practical way to improve the quality and robustness of deductive verifiers. We outline how fuzz testing can be applied to deductive verifiers, and demonstrate the idea with the prototype tool AValAnCHE, which is integrated with the VerCors verifier. We report on our experiments in which AValAnCHE uncovered several issues in VerCors and demonstrate that the approach also works for other deductive verifiers

ai.tldr: 本文主张使用模糊测试作为提高演绎验证器质量和鲁棒性的实用方法，并通过原型工具AValAnCHE在VerCors验证器上的实验证明了其有效性。
ai.motivation: 随着演绎验证器成熟，其潜在用户群从核心开发者扩展到外部用户。要说服外部用户使用，验证器必须开箱即用地可靠运行、提供有意义的错误消息并显示正确结果。然而，验证器是大型复杂软件系统，其完全形式化验证往往难以实现，因此需要补充手段来提供质量保证。
ai.method: 提出将模糊测试应用于演绎验证器，并开发了与VerCors验证器集成的原型工具AValAnCHE来演示该方法。
ai.result: AValAnCHE在VerCors中发现了若干问题，且该方法也适用于其他演绎验证器。
ai.help_to_user: 为验证器开发者提供了一种实用的质量改进方法，通过模糊测试增强验证器的可靠性和用户体验，无需完全形式化验证。

idea_spark.idea: 对验证器本身进行模糊测试，而非验证器所分析的程序。
idea_spark.risk: 模糊测试可能无法覆盖所有边界情况，且需要针对验证器的特定输入格式进行适配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发对形式化工具本身进行质量保障的新思路，平衡形式化验证与实践测试。
